question: What are the names of authors who have not published a paper in ACL?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Author WHERE author_id NOT IN (SELECT T1.author_id FROM Author_list AS T1 JOIN Paper AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id WHERE T2.venue  =  "ACL")

question: Find all papers with titles and paper IDs co-authored by Mckeown, Kathleen and Rambow, Owen.
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T1.paper_id FROM Paper AS T1 JOIN Author_list AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.author_id  =  T3.author_id WHERE T3.name LIKE "%Mckeown ,  Kathleen%" INTERSECT SELECT T1.title ,  T1.paper_id FROM Paper AS T1 JOIN Author_list AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.author_id  =  T3.author_id WHERE T3.name LIKE "%Rambow ,  Owen%"

question: What are the titles and paper ids for papers written in affiliation with Harvard University?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.title ,  T1.paper_id FROM Paper AS T1 JOIN Author_list AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id JOIN Affiliation AS T3 ON T2.affiliation_id  =  T3.affiliation_id WHERE T3.name  =  "Harvard University"

question: Find the titles and paper IDs for papers written by Harvard University.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.title ,  T1.paper_id FROM Paper AS T1 JOIN Author_list AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id JOIN Affiliation AS T3 ON T2.affiliation_id  =  T3.affiliation_id WHERE T3.name  =  "Harvard University"

question: What are the distinct venues for papers, ordered by year?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT venue ,  YEAR FROM paper ORDER BY YEAR

question: What are the names and addresses for all affiliations?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT name ,  address FROM Affiliation

question: Find the titles and paper IDs for papers which have Mckeown but not Rambow in author list.
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T1.paper_id FROM Paper AS T1 JOIN Author_list AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.author_id  =  T3.author_id WHERE T3.name LIKE "%Mckeown%" EXCEPT SELECT T1.title ,  T1.paper_id FROM Paper AS T1 JOIN Author_list AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.author_id  =  T3.author_id WHERE T3.name LIKE "%Rambow%"

question: Which author had the most papers in the year 2009?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Paper AS T1 JOIN Author_list AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id JOIN Author AS T3 ON T3.author_id  =  T2.author_id WHERE T1.year  =  2009 GROUP BY T2.author_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List names of all authors who have more than 50 papers.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Author AS T1 JOIN Author_list AS T2 ON T1.author_id  =  T2.author_id GROUP BY T1.author_id HAVING count(*)  >  50

question: Find all papers with titles and paper IDs collaborated by Stanford University and Columbia University.

question: Count the number of papers Stanford University had between 2000 and 2009.

question: What is the name of the author who has co-authored the most papers with Mckeown , Kathleen ?

question: return me the keywords related to " H. V. Jagadish " .

question: return me the number of papers in PVLDB in " University of Michigan " .

question: return me the number of citations of " Making database systems usable " before 2010 .

question: return me the domain where " H. V. Jagadish " is focused .

question: return me the authors who have cited the papers by " H. V. Jagadish " .

original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT allergy) FROM Allergy_type

question: Show all allergies with type food.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT allergy FROM Allergy_type WHERE allergytype  =  "food"

question: Show all student IDs who have at least two allergies.
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM Has_allergy GROUP BY StuID HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Find the first name and gender of the student who has allergy to milk but not cat.
original_query: SELECT fname ,  sex FROM Student WHERE StuID IN (SELECT StuID FROM Has_allergy WHERE Allergy  =  "Milk" EXCEPT SELECT StuID FROM Has_allergy WHERE Allergy  =  "Cat")

question: How many students are 18 years old?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Student WHERE age  =  18

question: Find the average age of the students who have allergies with food and animal types.
original_query: SELECT avg(age) FROM Student WHERE StuID IN ( SELECT T1.StuID FROM Has_allergy AS T1 JOIN Allergy_Type AS T2 ON T1.Allergy  =  T2.Allergy WHERE T2.allergytype  =  "food" INTERSECT SELECT T1.StuID FROM Has_allergy AS T1 JOIN Allergy_Type AS T2 ON T1.Allergy  =  T2.Allergy WHERE T2.allergytype  =  "animal")

question: Who is the advisor of student with ID 1004?
original_query: SELECT Advisor FROM Student WHERE StuID  =  1004

question: How many students are over 18 and do not have allergy to food type or animal type?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Student WHERE age  >  18 AND StuID NOT IN ( SELECT StuID FROM Has_allergy AS T1 JOIN Allergy_Type AS T2 ON T1.Allergy  =  T2.Allergy WHERE T2.allergytype  =  "food" OR T2.allergytype  =  "animal")

question: Return the apartment number with the largest number of bedrooms.
original_query: SELECT apt_number FROM Apartments ORDER BY bedroom_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the first names and last names of all the guests?
original_query: SELECT guest_first_name ,  guest_last_name FROM Guests

question: Which guests have apartment bookings with status code "Confirmed"? Return their first names and last names.
original_query: SELECT T2.guest_first_name ,  T2.guest_last_name FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Guests AS T2 ON T1.guest_id  =  T2.guest_id WHERE T1.booking_status_code  =  "Confirmed"

question: What are the address and phone number of the buildings managed by "Brenden"?
original_query: SELECT building_address ,  building_phone FROM Apartment_Buildings WHERE building_manager	 =  "Brenden"

question: Which apartment type code appears the most often?
original_query: SELECT apt_type_code FROM Apartments GROUP BY apt_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the booking start date and end date for the apartments that have more than two bedrooms.
original_query: SELECT T1.booking_start_date ,  T1.booking_start_date FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T2.bedroom_count  >  2

question: Return the date of birth for all the guests with gender code "Male".
original_query: SELECT date_of_birth FROM Guests WHERE gender_code  =  "Male"

question: Sort the apartment numbers in ascending order of room count.
original_query: SELECT apt_number FROM Apartments ORDER BY room_count ASC

question: Find the number of apartments that have no facility.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Apartments WHERE apt_id NOT IN (SELECT apt_id FROM Apartment_Facilities)

question: How many rooms in total are there in the apartments in the building with short name "Columbus Square"?
original_query: SELECT sum(T2.room_count) FROM Apartment_Buildings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.building_id  =  T2.building_id WHERE T1.building_short_name  =  "Columbus Square"

question: What are dates of birth of all the guests whose gender is "Male"?
original_query: SELECT date_of_birth FROM Guests WHERE gender_code  =  "Male"

question: Show the facility codes of apartments with more than 4 bedrooms.
original_query: SELECT T1.facility_code FROM Apartment_Facilities AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T2.bedroom_count  >  4

question: Find the average number of bedrooms of all the apartments.
original_query: SELECT avg(bedroom_count) FROM Apartments

question: Show each gender code and the corresponding count of guests sorted by the count in descending order.
original_query: SELECT gender_code ,  COUNT(*) FROM Guests GROUP BY gender_code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

question: Sort the gender codes in descending order of their corresponding number of guests. Return both the gender codes and counts.
original_query: SELECT gender_code ,  COUNT(*) FROM Guests GROUP BY gender_code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

question: What are the building full names that contain the word "court"?
original_query: SELECT building_full_name FROM Apartment_Buildings WHERE building_full_name LIKE "%court%"

question: Show the total number of rooms of all apartments with facility code "Gym".
original_query: SELECT sum(T2.room_count) FROM Apartment_Facilities AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T1.facility_code  =  "Gym"

question: What are the apartment number and the room count of each apartment?
original_query: SELECT apt_number ,  room_count FROM Apartments

question: Give me a list of all the distinct building descriptions.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT building_description FROM Apartment_Buildings

question: Show the apartment type codes and the corresponding number of apartments sorted by the number of apartments in ascending order.
original_query: SELECT apt_type_code ,  COUNT(*) FROM Apartments GROUP BY apt_type_code ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC

question: What are the booking start and end dates of the apartments with more than 2 bedrooms?
original_query: SELECT T1.booking_start_date ,  T1.booking_start_date FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T2.bedroom_count  >  2

question: Show the average room count of the apartments that have booking status code "Provisional".
original_query: SELECT avg(room_count) FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T1.booking_status_code  =  "Provisional"

question: Find all the building full names containing the word "court".
original_query: SELECT building_full_name FROM Apartment_Buildings WHERE building_full_name LIKE "%court%"

question: Which apartments have bookings with status code "Confirmed"? Return their apartment numbers.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.apt_number FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T1.booking_status_code  =  "Confirmed"

question: Show the addresses and phones of all the buildings managed by "Brenden".
original_query: SELECT building_address ,  building_phone FROM Apartment_Buildings WHERE building_manager	 =  "Brenden"

question: Show the most common apartment type code.
original_query: SELECT apt_type_code FROM Apartments GROUP BY apt_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the apartment numbers of apartments with bookings that have status code both "Provisional" and "Confirmed"
original_query: SELECT T2.apt_number FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T1.booking_status_code  =  "Confirmed" INTERSECT SELECT T2.apt_number FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T1.booking_status_code  =  "Provisional"

question: Return the first names and last names of all guests
original_query: SELECT guest_first_name ,  guest_last_name FROM Guests

question: How many apartment bookings are there in total?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Apartment_Bookings

question: Show each apartment type code, and the maximum and minimum number of rooms for each type.
original_query: SELECT apt_type_code ,  max(room_count) ,  min(room_count) FROM Apartments GROUP BY apt_type_code

question: Show the start dates and end dates of all the apartment bookings made by guests with gender code "Female".
original_query: SELECT T1.booking_start_date ,  T1.booking_start_date FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Guests AS T2 ON T1.guest_id  =  T2.guest_id WHERE T2.gender_code  =  "Female"

question: Return the apartment number and the number of rooms for each apartment.
original_query: SELECT apt_number ,  room_count FROM Apartments

question: Show the apartment numbers of apartments with unit status availability of both 0 and 1.
original_query: SELECT T1.apt_number FROM Apartments AS T1 JOIN View_Unit_Status AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T2.available_yn  =  0 INTERSECT SELECT T1.apt_number FROM Apartments AS T1 JOIN View_Unit_Status AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T2.available_yn  =  1

question: Show all distinct building descriptions.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT building_description FROM Apartment_Buildings

question: Show the start dates and end dates of all the apartment bookings.
original_query: SELECT booking_start_date ,  booking_end_date FROM Apartment_Bookings

question: What are the booking start and end dates of the apartments with type code "Duplex"?
original_query: SELECT T1.booking_start_date ,  T1.booking_start_date FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T2.apt_type_code  =  "Duplex"

question: What is the average number of bedrooms of all apartments?
original_query: SELECT avg(bedroom_count) FROM Apartments

question: Tell me the booking status code for the apartment with number "Suite 634".
original_query: SELECT T1.booking_status_code FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T2.apt_number  =  "Suite 634"

question: Show the first names and last names of all the guests that have apartment bookings with status code "Confirmed".
original_query: SELECT T2.guest_first_name ,  T2.guest_last_name FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Guests AS T2 ON T1.guest_id  =  T2.guest_id WHERE T1.booking_status_code  =  "Confirmed"

question: What are the start date and end date of each apartment booking?
original_query: SELECT booking_start_date ,  booking_end_date FROM Apartment_Bookings

question: What are the names and year of construction for the mills of 'Grondzeiler' type?
original_query: SELECT name ,  built_year FROM mill WHERE TYPE  =  'Grondzeiler'

question: How many architects are female?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM architect WHERE gender  =  'female'

question: What are the distinct types of mills that are built by American or Canadian architects?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.type FROM mill AS T1 JOIN architect AS t2 ON T1.architect_id  =  T2.id WHERE T2.nationality  =  'American' OR T2.nationality  =  'Canadian'

question: What is the location of the bridge named 'Kolob Arch' or 'Rainbow Bridge'?
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM bridge WHERE name  =  'Kolob Arch' OR name  =  'Rainbow Bridge'

question: What are the distinct names and nationalities of the architects who have ever built a mill?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name ,  T1.nationality FROM architect AS T1 JOIN mill AS t2 ON T1.id  =  T2.architect_id

question: What is the id, name and nationality of the architect who built most mills?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name ,  T1.nationality FROM architect AS T1 JOIN mill AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.architect_id GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the maximum length in meters for the bridges and what are the architects' names?
original_query: SELECT max(T1.length_meters) ,  T2.name FROM bridge AS T1 JOIN architect AS T2 ON T1.architect_id  =  T2.id

question: How many architects haven't built a mill before year 1850?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM architect WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT architect_id FROM mill WHERE built_year  <  1850 );

question: What are the paintings called and where are they located?
original_query: SELECT title ,  LOCATION FROM paintings

question: List the names of all distinct paintings from shortest to longest in height.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT title FROM paintings ORDER BY height_mm

question: What are the first and last names of the artists who have not only medium oil paintings but also paintings with the lithographic medium?
original_query: SELECT T1.lname ,  T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID WHERE T2.medium  =  "oil" INTERSECT SELECT T3.lname ,  T3.fname FROM artists AS T3 JOIN paintings AS T4 ON T3.artistID  =  T4.painterID WHERE T4.medium  =  "lithograph"

question: What is the age of the artist who had the shortest life?
original_query: SELECT deathYear - birthYear FROM artists ORDER BY deathYear - birthYear LIMIT 1

question: Find the average height and width of paintings grouped by painters and ordered by name
original_query: SELECT avg(height_mm) ,  avg(width_mm) ,  painterID FROM paintings GROUP BY painterID ORDER BY title

question: Find the first and last names of the artists who have both works of paintings and sculptures?
original_query: SELECT T1.lname ,  T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN sculptures AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.sculptorID INTERSECT SELECT T3.lname ,  T3.fname FROM artists AS T3 JOIN paintings AS T4 ON T3.artistID  =  T4.painterID

question: What is the id of the artist who has the highest number of painting works before 1900?
original_query: SELECT T1.artistID FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID WHERE T2.year  <  1900 GROUP BY T1.artistID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the painting count of the artist with the longest life ?
original_query: select count(*) from artists as t1 join paintings as t2 on t1.artistid  =  t2.painterid group by t2.painterid order by t1.deathyear - t1.birthyear desc limit 1

question: When did each artist who created less than 4 paintings die ?
original_query: select t1.deathyear from artists as t1 join paintings as t2 on t1.artistid  =  t2.painterid group by t2.painterid having count(*)  <  4

question: Find the death year of all artists who have at most 3 paintings?
original_query: SELECT T1.deathYear FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID GROUP BY T2.painterID HAVING count(*)  <=  3

question: What are the locations that have paintings in the mediums of on panels and on canvas?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT LOCATION FROM paintings WHERE mediumOn  =  "panel" INTERSECT SELECT DISTINCT LOCATION FROM paintings WHERE mediumOn  =  "canvas"

question: Which locations have paintings in the mediums of on panel and on canvas?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT LOCATION FROM paintings WHERE mediumOn  =  "panel" INTERSECT SELECT DISTINCT LOCATION FROM paintings WHERE mediumOn  =  "canvas"

question: Give the full names of artists who have created paintings and sculptures.
original_query: SELECT T1.lname ,  T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN sculptures AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.sculptorID INTERSECT SELECT T3.lname ,  T3.fname FROM artists AS T3 JOIN paintings AS T4 ON T3.artistID  =  T4.painterID

question: List the title and location of all paintings.
original_query: SELECT title ,  LOCATION FROM paintings

question: What is the total number of paintings exhibited in gallery 240?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM paintings WHERE LOCATION  =  "Gallery 240"

question: What is the first and last name of each distinct artists who made a sculpture before 1900?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.lname ,  T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN sculptures AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.sculptorID WHERE T2.year  <  1900

question: What is the first name of the sculptor with the greatest number of works?
original_query: SELECT T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN sculptures AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.sculptorID GROUP BY T2.sculptorID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the sculptures called and where are they located?
original_query: SELECT title ,  LOCATION FROM sculptures

question: What is the first name of the artist who has the highest number of sculptures?
original_query: SELECT T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN sculptures AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.sculptorID GROUP BY T2.sculptorID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the first and last names of all artists who were born after 1850.
original_query: SELECT lname ,  fname FROM artists WHERE birthYear  >  1850

question: Find the first and last name of artists who have painting but no sculpture work.
original_query: SELECT T1.lname ,  T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID EXCEPT SELECT T3.lname ,  T3.fname FROM artists AS T3 JOIN sculptures AS T4 ON T3.artistID  =  T4.sculptorID

question: List the year, location and title of paintings whose height is longer than 1000 ordered by title.
original_query: SELECT title ,  LOCATION ,  YEAR FROM paintings WHERE height_mm  >  1000 ORDER BY title

question: List the painting id, location and title of the medium oil paintings ordered by year.
original_query: SELECT paintingID ,  title ,  LOCATION FROM paintings WHERE medium  =  "oil" ORDER BY YEAR

question: What is the id of the artist with the most paintings before 1900?
original_query: SELECT T1.artistID FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID WHERE T2.year  <  1900 GROUP BY T1.artistID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which artists have the most paintings in oil?
original_query: SELECT T1.lname ,  T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID WHERE T2.medium  =  "oil" GROUP BY T2.painterID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many works are there in each medium?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  medium FROM paintings GROUP BY medium

question: List the ids of all paintings that are taller than the longest painting created after 1900.
original_query: SELECT paintingID FROM paintings WHERE height_mm  >   (SELECT max(height_mm) FROM paintings WHERE YEAR  >  1900)

question: What is the height and id of the tallest painting created before 1900?
original_query: SELECT max(height_mm) ,  paintingID FROM paintings WHERE YEAR  <  1900

question: Order all of the oil paintings by date of creation and list their ids, locations, and titles.
original_query: SELECT paintingID ,  title ,  LOCATION FROM paintings WHERE medium  =  "oil" ORDER BY YEAR

question: What are the first names of all artists who have at least two paintings, and how many works did each create?
original_query: SELECT T1.fname ,  count(*) FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID GROUP BY T2.painterID HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What are the ids of the paintings whose height is longer than the height of all paintings created after 1900?
original_query: SELECT paintingID FROM paintings WHERE height_mm  >   (SELECT max(height_mm) FROM paintings WHERE YEAR  >  1900)

question: What are the distinct titles of every painting that has a greater height than some painting on canvas?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT title FROM paintings WHERE height_mm  >  (SELECT min(height_mm) FROM paintings WHERE mediumOn  =  "canvas")

question: What are first names of the artists with oil paintings in gallery 241?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID WHERE T2.medium  =  "oil" AND LOCATION  =  "Gallery 241"

question: What are the unique first names of the artists who had medium oil paintings located in gallery 241?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID WHERE T2.medium  =  "oil" AND LOCATION  =  "Gallery 241"

question: What are the maximum height and id of paintings painted before 1900?
original_query: SELECT max(height_mm) ,  paintingID FROM paintings WHERE YEAR  <  1900

question: How wide were the paintings by the artist who was born prior to 1850?
original_query: SELECT T2.width_mm FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID WHERE T1.birthYear  <  1850

question: What is the title of the sculpture that was created in the most recent year ?
original_query: select title from sculptures order by year desc limit 1

question: What are the first and last names of all distinct artists who made sculptures before 1900?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.lname ,  T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN sculptures AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.sculptorID WHERE T2.year  <  1900

question: What mediums were used for the painting with id 80 ?
original_query: select medium from paintings where paintingid  =  80

question: How many paintings were created before 1900 in different locations?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  LOCATION FROM paintings WHERE YEAR  <  1900 GROUP BY LOCATION

question: Find the names of all sculptures located in gallery 226.
original_query: SELECT title FROM sculptures WHERE LOCATION  =  "Gallery 226"

question: What are the first and last name of the artist who had a sculpture work whose title has the word “female” in it?
original_query: SELECT T1.lname ,  T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN sculptures AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.sculptorID WHERE T2.title LIKE "%female%"

question: What are the full names of artists born after 1850?
original_query: SELECT lname ,  fname FROM artists WHERE birthYear  >  1850

question: List the title and location of all sculptures.
original_query: SELECT title ,  LOCATION FROM sculptures

question: Find the distinct titles of all the paintings that have a longer height than some painting on canvas?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT title FROM paintings WHERE height_mm  >  (SELECT min(height_mm) FROM paintings WHERE mediumOn  =  "canvas")

question: Find the id of the oldest painting.
original_query: SELECT paintingID FROM paintings ORDER BY YEAR LIMIT 1

question: List the names of all distinct paintings ordered by length.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT title FROM paintings ORDER BY height_mm

question: What is the first name and age of the artist who lived the longest?
original_query: SELECT fname  ,  deathYear - birthYear FROM artists ORDER BY deathYear - birthYear DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the top 3 artists who have the biggest number of painting works whose medium is oil?
original_query: SELECT T1.lname ,  T1.fname FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID WHERE T2.medium  =  "oil" GROUP BY T2.painterID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the locations that have works painted before 1885 and after 1930?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT LOCATION FROM paintings WHERE YEAR  <  1885 INTERSECT SELECT DISTINCT LOCATION FROM paintings WHERE YEAR  >  1930

question: What are the names of both paintings and sculptures created between 1900 and 1950?
original_query: SELECT title FROM paintings WHERE YEAR BETWEEN 1900 AND 1950 UNION SELECT title FROM sculptures WHERE YEAR BETWEEN 1900 AND 1950

question: What is the name and year of each painting created by the artist whose first name is Mary?
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,   T2.year FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID WHERE T1.fname  =  "Mary"

question: Find the first names and number of works of all artists who have at least two paintings?
original_query: SELECT T1.fname ,  count(*) FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID GROUP BY T2.painterID HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What are the numbers of paintings created before 1900 in different places?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  LOCATION FROM paintings WHERE YEAR  <  1900 GROUP BY LOCATION

question: What is the name of every distinct painting in alphabetical order?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT title FROM paintings ORDER BY title

question: When did the artist who made the fewest sculptures die?
original_query: SELECT T1.deathYear FROM artists AS T1 JOIN sculptures AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.sculptorID GROUP BY T2.sculptorID ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the scuplture that was created most recently ?
original_query: select title from sculptures order by year desc limit 1

question: Which assets have 2 parts and have less than 2 fault logs? List the asset id and detail.
original_query: SELECT T1.asset_id ,  T1.asset_details FROM Assets AS T1 JOIN Asset_Parts AS T2 ON T1.asset_id  =  T2.asset_id GROUP BY T1.asset_id HAVING count(*)  =  2 INTERSECT SELECT T1.asset_id ,  T1.asset_details FROM Assets AS T1 JOIN Fault_Log AS T2 ON T1.asset_id  =  T2.asset_id GROUP BY T1.asset_id HAVING count(*)  <  2

question: What are all the distinct last names of all the engineers?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT last_name FROM Maintenance_Engineers

question: Which part has the least chargeable amount? List the part id and amount.
original_query: SELECT part_id ,  chargeable_amount FROM Parts ORDER BY chargeable_amount ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which part fault requires the most number of skills to fix? List part id and name.
original_query: SELECT T1.part_id ,  T1.part_name FROM Parts AS T1 JOIN Part_Faults AS T2 ON T1.part_id  =  T2.part_id JOIN Skills_Required_To_Fix AS T3 ON T2.part_fault_id  =  T3.part_fault_id GROUP BY T1.part_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among those engineers who have visited, which engineer makes the least number of visits? List the engineer id, first name and last name.
original_query: SELECT T1.engineer_id ,  T1.first_name ,  T1.last_name FROM Maintenance_Engineers AS T1 JOIN Engineer_Visits AS T2 ON T1.engineer_id  =  T2.engineer_id GROUP BY T1.engineer_id ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which gender makes up the majority of the staff?
original_query: SELECT gender FROM staff GROUP BY gender ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which engineers have never visited to maintain the assets? List the engineer first name and last name.
original_query: SELECT first_name ,  last_name FROM Maintenance_Engineers WHERE engineer_id NOT IN (SELECT engineer_id FROM Engineer_Visits)

question: How many engineer visits are required at most for a single fault log? List the number and the log entry id.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.fault_log_entry_id FROM Fault_Log AS T1 JOIN Engineer_Visits AS T2 ON T1.fault_log_entry_id  =  T2.fault_log_entry_id GROUP BY T1.fault_log_entry_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which kind of part has the least number of faults? List the part name.
original_query: SELECT T1.part_name FROM Parts AS T1 JOIN Part_Faults AS T2 ON T1.part_id  =  T2.part_id GROUP BY T1.part_name ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: List the asset id, details, make and model for every asset.
original_query: SELECT asset_id ,  asset_details ,  asset_make ,  asset_model FROM Assets

question: What is the description of the type of the company who concluded its contracts most recently?
original_query: SELECT T1.company_name FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 JOIN Maintenance_Contracts AS T2 ON T1.company_id  =  T2.maintenance_contract_company_id JOIN Ref_Company_Types AS T3 ON T1.company_type_code  =  T3.company_type_code ORDER BY T2.contract_end_date DESC LIMIT 1

question: When was the first asset acquired?
original_query: SELECT asset_acquired_date FROM Assets ORDER BY asset_acquired_date ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which company started the earliest the maintenance contract? Show the company name.
original_query: SELECT T1.company_name FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 JOIN Maintenance_Contracts AS T2 ON T1.company_id  =  T2.maintenance_contract_company_id ORDER BY T2.contract_start_date ASC LIMIT 1

question: For all the faults of different parts, what are all the decriptions of the skills required to fix them? List the name of the faults and the skill description.
original_query: SELECT T1.fault_short_name ,  T3.skill_description FROM Part_Faults AS T1 JOIN Skills_Required_To_Fix AS T2 ON T1.part_fault_id  =  T2.part_fault_id JOIN Skills AS T3 ON T2.skill_id  =  T3.skill_id

question: Which fault log included the most number of faulty parts? List the fault log id, description and record time.
original_query: SELECT T1.fault_log_entry_id ,  T1.fault_description ,  T1.fault_log_entry_datetime FROM Fault_Log AS T1 JOIN Fault_Log_Parts AS T2 ON T1.fault_log_entry_id  =  T2.fault_log_entry_id GROUP BY T1.fault_log_entry_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the receipt numbers for instances where both cakes and cookies were purchased?
original_query: SELECT T1.receipt FROM items AS T1 JOIN goods AS T2 ON T1.item  =  T2.id WHERE T2.food  =  "Cake" INTERSECT SELECT T1.receipt FROM items AS T1 JOIN goods AS T2 ON T1.item  =  T2.id WHERE T2.food  =  "Cookie"

question: Give the last names of customers who have been to the bakery more than 10 times?
original_query: SELECT T2.LastName FROM receipts AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerId  =  T2.id GROUP BY T2.id HAVING count(*)  >  10

question: List all the flavors of Croissant available in this bakery.
original_query: SELECT flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Croissant"

question: On which day did the bakery sell more than 100 dollars in total.
original_query: SELECT T3.date FROM goods AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.item JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.receipt  =  T3.ReceiptNumber GROUP BY T3.date HAVING sum(T1.price)  >  100

question: What is the receipt number and date corresponding to the receipt for which the most expensive item was purchased?
original_query: SELECT T1.ReceiptNumber ,  T1.Date FROM receipts AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.ReceiptNumber  =  T2.receipt JOIN goods AS T3 ON T2.item  =  T3.id ORDER BY T3.price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find all the receipt numbers in which customer with last name LOGAN purchased Croissant.
original_query: SELECT T1.ReceiptNumber FROM receipts AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.ReceiptNumber  =  T2.receipt JOIN goods AS T3 ON T2.item  =  T3.id JOIN customers AS T4 ON T4.Id  =  T1.CustomerId WHERE T3.food  =  "Croissant" AND T4.LastName  =  'LOGAN'

question: Give the customer id of the customer that made the most purchases, as well as the number of purchases made.
original_query: SELECT CustomerId ,  count(*) FROM receipts GROUP BY CustomerId ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find all receipts which has the latest date. Also tell me that date.
original_query: SELECT ReceiptNumber ,  date FROM receipts WHERE date  =  (SELECT date FROM receipts ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1)

question: What are the last names of the customers in alphabetical order?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT LastName FROM customers ORDER BY LastName

question: What are the items with chocolate flavor that were purchased at most 10 times.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.item FROM items AS T1 JOIN goods AS T2 ON T1.item  =  T2.id WHERE T2.flavor  =  "Chocolate" GROUP BY item HAVING count(*)  <=  10

question: Give the distinct ids for goods that cost less than any Tart.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT id FROM goods WHERE price  <  (SELECT max(price) FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Tart")

question: Give me the distinct id and price for all goods whose price is below the average of all goods?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT id ,  price FROM goods WHERE price  <  (SELECT avg(price) FROM goods)

question: How many customers have bought each food?
original_query: SELECT T1.food ,  count(DISTINCT T3.CustomerId) FROM goods AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Item JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.Receipt  =  T3.ReceiptNumber GROUP BY T1.food

question: Give the id and flavor of the most expensive cake.
original_query: SELECT id ,  flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cake" ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1

question: On which date did some customer buy a good that costs more than 15 dollars?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.date FROM receipts AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.ReceiptNumber  =  T2.receipt JOIN goods AS T3 ON T2.item  =  T3.id WHERE T3.price  >  15

question: What are the minimum and maximum prices of food goods, ordered by food?
original_query: SELECT min(price) ,  max(price) ,  food FROM goods GROUP BY food ORDER BY food

question: Order the distinct good ids.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT id FROM goods ORDER BY id

question: What are the ids of Cookies whose price is lower than any Croissant?
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cookie" AND price  <  (SELECT min(price) FROM goods WHERE food  =  'Croissant')

question: How many types of Cake does this bakery sell?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cake"

question: What are the ids of customers who spend more than 5 on average for each good?
original_query: SELECT T3.CustomerId FROM goods AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.item JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.receipt  =  T3.ReceiptNumber GROUP BY T3.CustomerId HAVING avg(T1.price)  >  5

question: What are highest, lowest, and average prices of goods, grouped and ordered by flavor?
original_query: SELECT max(price) ,  min(price) ,  avg(price) ,  flavor FROM goods GROUP BY flavor ORDER BY flavor

question: Give me a list of all the distinct items bought by the customer number 15.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.item FROM items AS T1 JOIN receipts AS T2 ON T1.receipt  =  T2.ReceiptNumber WHERE T2.CustomerId  =  15

question: Find the first name and last name of a customer who visited on the earliest date.
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName ,  T1.LastName FROM customers AS T1 JOIN receipts AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.CustomerId ORDER BY T2.date LIMIT 1

question: For each type of food, what are the average, maximum and minimum price?
original_query: SELECT food ,  avg(price) ,  max(price) ,  min(price) FROM goods GROUP BY food

question: Give me the ids of Cakes whose price is at least as much as the average price of Tart?
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cake" AND price  >=  (SELECT avg(price) FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Tart")

question: What is the cheapest good with cheese flavor?
original_query: SELECT min(price) FROM goods WHERE flavor  =  "Cheese"

question: Find flavor of cakes that cost more than 10 dollars.
original_query: SELECT flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cake" AND price  >  10

question: What are all the ids of goods with an id which contains "APP"?
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE id LIKE "%APP%"

question: What is the last name of the customers who shopped at the bakery more than 10 times?
original_query: SELECT T2.LastName FROM receipts AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerId  =  T2.id GROUP BY T2.id HAVING count(*)  >  10

question: Find all receipts in which either apple flavor pie was bought or customer id 12 shopped.
original_query: SELECT T1.receipt FROM items AS T1 JOIN goods AS T2 ON T1.item  =  T2.id WHERE T2.flavor  =  "Apple" AND T2.food  =  "Pie" UNION SELECT ReceiptNumber FROM receipts WHERE CustomerId  =  12

question: Count the number of types of cake this bakery sells.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cake"

question: For each type of food, tell me how many customers have ever bought it.
original_query: SELECT T1.food ,  count(DISTINCT T3.CustomerId) FROM goods AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Item JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.Receipt  =  T3.ReceiptNumber GROUP BY T1.food

question: Give me the list of ids of all goods whose id has "APP".
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE id LIKE "%APP%"

question: What are the ids of Cookie and Cake that cost between 3 and 7 dollars.
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cookie" OR food  =  "Cake" AND price BETWEEN 3 AND 7

question: Give the three most purchased items at this bakery.
original_query: SELECT item FROM items GROUP BY item ORDER BY COUNT (*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the average, minimum and maximum prices for each food?
original_query: SELECT food ,  avg(price) ,  max(price) ,  min(price) FROM goods GROUP BY food

question: What are the ids of cakes that are at least as expensive as the average Tart?
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cake" AND price  >=  (SELECT avg(price) FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Tart")

question: Find the ids of customers whose average spending for each good is above 5.
original_query: SELECT T3.CustomerId FROM goods AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.item JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.receipt  =  T3.ReceiptNumber GROUP BY T3.CustomerId HAVING avg(T1.price)  >  5

question: List the id, flavor and type of food of goods ordered by price.
original_query: SELECT id ,  flavor ,  food FROM goods ORDER BY price

question: What are ids of the goods that have Apricot flavor and are cheaper than 5 dollars?
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE flavor  =  "Apricot" AND price  <  5

question: What are the flavors of cakes that cost more than 10 dollars?
original_query: SELECT flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cake" AND price  >  10

question: What are the distinct ids of all goods that are cheaper than some goods of type Tart?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT id FROM goods WHERE price  <  (SELECT max(price) FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Tart")

question: What are all the flavors of croissant?
original_query: SELECT flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Croissant"

question: Which date corresponds to when a customer purchased a good costing over 15 dollars?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.date FROM receipts AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.ReceiptNumber  =  T2.receipt JOIN goods AS T3 ON T2.item  =  T3.id WHERE T3.price  >  15

question: What are the ids of goods whose price is above twice the average price of all goods?
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE price  >  (SELECT avg(price) FROM goods)

question: Find the top three dates with the most receipts.
original_query: SELECT date FROM receipts GROUP BY date ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: On what dates did the bakery sell more than 100 dollars worth of goods in total?
original_query: SELECT T3.date FROM goods AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.item JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.receipt  =  T3.ReceiptNumber GROUP BY T3.date HAVING sum(T1.price)  >  100

question: What is the three most popular goods in this bakery?
original_query: SELECT item FROM items GROUP BY item ORDER BY COUNT (*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: Give the ids of cookes that are cheaper than any croissant.
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cookie" AND price  <  (SELECT min(price) FROM goods WHERE food  =  'Croissant')

question: What is the item that was bought the least number of times?
original_query: SELECT item FROM items GROUP BY item ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: For each date, return how many distinct customers visited on that day.
original_query: SELECT date ,  COUNT (DISTINCT CustomerId) FROM receipts GROUP BY date

question: What is the id and flavor of the cheapest cookie?
original_query: SELECT id ,  flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cookie" ORDER BY price LIMIT 1

question: List the maximum scores of the team Boston Red Stockings when the team won in postseason?
original_query: SELECT max(T1.wins) FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_winner  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings';

question: Find the year in which the least people enter hall of fame.
original_query: SELECT yearid FROM hall_of_fame GROUP BY yearid ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1;

question: How many times in total did the team Boston Red Stockings participate in postseason games?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT * FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_winner  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings' UNION SELECT * FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_loser  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings' );

question: How many players were in the team Boston Red Stockings in 2000?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM salary AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  = 'Boston Red Stockings' AND T1.year  =  2000

question: Find the full name and id of the college that has the most baseball players.
original_query: SELECT T1.name_full ,  T1.college_id FROM college AS T1 JOIN player_college AS T2 ON T1.college_id  =  T2.college_id GROUP BY T1.college_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many players enter hall of fame each year?
original_query: SELECT yearid ,  count(*) FROM hall_of_fame GROUP BY yearid;

question: Which park did the most people attend in 2008?
original_query: SELECT T2.park_name FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN park AS T2 ON T1.park_id  =  T2.park_id WHERE T1.year = 2008 ORDER BY T1.attendance DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the average number of attendance at home games for each year?
original_query: SELECT YEAR ,  avg(attendance) FROM home_game GROUP BY YEAR;

question: Find the team that attended the least number of home games in 1980.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.team_id_br WHERE T1.year = 1980 ORDER BY T1.attendance ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What are the name and id of the team with the most victories in 2008 postseason?
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T1.team_id_winner FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_winner  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T1.year  =  2008 GROUP BY T1.team_id_winner ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many parks does Atlanta city have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM park WHERE city = 'Atlanta';

question: What is the highest salary among each team? List the team name, id and maximum salary.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.team_id ,  max(T2.salary) FROM team AS T1 JOIN salary AS T2 ON T1.team_id  =  T2.team_id GROUP BY T1.team_id;

question: Find the players' first name and last name who won award both in 1960 and in 1961.
original_query: SELECT T1.name_first , T1.name_last FROM player AS T1 JOIN player_award AS T2 WHERE T2.year  =  1960 INTERSECT SELECT T1.name_first , T1.name_last FROM player AS T1 JOIN player_award AS T2 WHERE T2.year  =  1961

question: List all the salary values players received in 2010 and 2001.
original_query: SELECT salary FROM salary WHERE YEAR  =  2010 UNION SELECT salary FROM salary WHERE YEAR  =  2001

question: Count the number of players who were born in USA and have bats information 'R'.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM player WHERE birth_country = 'USA' AND bats  =  'R';

question: Find all the players' first name and last name who have empty death record.
original_query: SELECT name_first ,  name_last FROM player WHERE death_year = '';

question: How many home games did the team Boston Red Stockings play from 1990 to 2000 in total?
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.games) FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name = 'Boston Red Stockings' AND T1.year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2000;

question: Count the total number of games the team Boston Red Stockings attended from 1990 to 2000.
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.games) FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name = 'Boston Red Stockings' AND T1.year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2000;

question: Compute the average salary of the players in the team called 'Boston Red Stockings'.
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.salary) FROM salary AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  = 'Boston Red Stockings'

question: How many players born in USA are right-handed batters? That is, have the batter value 'R'.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM player WHERE birth_country = 'USA' AND bats  =  'R';

question: For each year, return the year and the number of times the team Boston Red Stockings won in the postseasons.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.year FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_winner  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings' GROUP BY T1.year

question: What are the first name and last name of the players who were paid salary by team Washington Nationals in both 2005 and 2007?
original_query: SELECT T2.name_first ,  T2.name_last FROM salary AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id JOIN team AS T3 ON T3.team_id_br = T1.team_id WHERE T1.year = 2005 AND T3.name = 'Washington Nationals' INTERSECT SELECT T2.name_first , T2.name_last FROM salary AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id JOIN team AS T3 ON T3.team_id_br = T1.team_id WHERE T1.year = 2007 AND T3.name = 'Washington Nationals'

question: Find the number of games taken place in city Atlanta in 2000.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN park AS T2 ON T1.park_id  =  T2.park_id WHERE T1.year  =  2000 AND T2.city  =  'Atlanta';

question: How much salary did the top 3 well-paid players get in 2001?
original_query: SELECT salary FROM salary WHERE YEAR  =  2001 ORDER BY salary DESC LIMIT 3;

question: What is the total number of postseason games that team Boston Red Stockings participated in?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT * FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_winner  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings' UNION SELECT * FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_loser  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings' );

question: Find the name and id of the team that won the most times in 2008 postseason.
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T1.team_id_winner FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_winner  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T1.year  =  2008 GROUP BY T1.team_id_winner ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the total home game attendance of team Boston Red Stockings from 2000 to 2010?
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.attendance) FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings' AND T1.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010;

question: Which players won awards in both 1960 and 1961? Return their first names and last names.
original_query: SELECT T1.name_first , T1.name_last FROM player AS T1 JOIN player_award AS T2 WHERE T2.year  =  1960 INTERSECT SELECT T1.name_first , T1.name_last FROM player AS T1 JOIN player_award AS T2 WHERE T2.year  =  1961

question: How many games in total did team Boston Red Stockings attend from 2000 to 2010?
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.attendance) FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings' AND T1.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010;

question: What are the first name and last name of the players whose death record is empty?
original_query: SELECT name_first ,  name_last FROM player WHERE death_year = '';

question: What is the number of wins the team Boston Red Stockings got in the postseasons each year in history?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.year FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_winner  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings' GROUP BY T1.year

question: How many games in 1885 postseason resulted in ties (that is, the value of "ties" is '1')?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM postseason WHERE YEAR  =  1885 AND ties  =  1;

question: In which year did the least people enter hall of fame?
original_query: SELECT yearid FROM hall_of_fame GROUP BY yearid ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Find the id and rank of the team that has the highest average attendance rate in 2014.
original_query: SELECT T2.team_id ,  T2.rank FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id  =  T2.team_id WHERE T1.year  =  2014 GROUP BY T1.team_id ORDER BY avg(T1.attendance) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: For each year, return the year and the average number of attendance at home games.
original_query: SELECT YEAR ,  avg(attendance) FROM home_game GROUP BY YEAR;

question: List players' first name and last name who have weight greater than 220 or height shorter than 75.
original_query: SELECT name_first ,  name_last FROM player WHERE weight  >  220 OR height  <  75

question: How many games were played in city Atlanta in 2000?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN park AS T2 ON T1.park_id  =  T2.park_id WHERE T1.year  =  2000 AND T2.city  =  'Atlanta';

question: Show me the number of parks the state of NY has.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM park WHERE state  =  'NY';

question: How many times did Boston Red Stockings lose in 2009 postseason?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_loser  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings' AND T1.year = 2009;

question: What is the total salary expenses of team Boston Red Stockings in 2010?
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.salary) FROM salary AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  = 'Boston Red Stockings' AND T1.year  =  2010

question: Which 3 players won the most player awards? List their full name and id.
original_query: SELECT T1.name_first ,  T1.name_last ,  T1.player_id FROM player AS T1 JOIN player_award AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T1.player_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3;

question: What are the death and injury situations caused by the ship with tonnage 't'?
original_query: SELECT T1.killed ,  T1.injured FROM death AS T1 JOIN ship AS t2 ON T1.caused_by_ship_id  =  T2.id WHERE T2.tonnage  =  't'

question: What are the distinct battle names which are between bulgarian commander 'Kaloyan' and latin commander 'Baldwin I'?
original_query: SELECT name FROM battle WHERE bulgarian_commander  =  'Kaloyan' AND latin_commander  =  'Baldwin I'

question: How many different results are there for the battles?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT RESULT) FROM battle

question: List the name, date and result of each battle.
original_query: SELECT name ,  date FROM battle

question: Show names, results and bulgarian commanders of the battles with no ships lost in the 'English Channel'.
original_query: SELECT name ,  RESULT ,  bulgarian_commander FROM battle EXCEPT SELECT T1.name ,  T1.result ,  T1.bulgarian_commander FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle WHERE T2.location  =  'English Channel'

question: What are the different ids and names of the battles that lost any 'Brig' type shipes?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle WHERE T2.ship_type  =  'Brig'

question: List the name and tonnage ordered by in descending alphaetical order for the names.
original_query: SELECT name ,  tonnage FROM ship ORDER BY name DESC

question: List the name and date the battle that has lost the ship named 'Lettice' and the ship named 'HMS Atalanta'
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.date FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle WHERE T2.name  =  'Lettice' INTERSECT SELECT T1.name ,  T1.date FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle WHERE T2.name  =  'HMS Atalanta'

question: Find the name and website link of the channels that have more than one program.
original_query: SELECT t1.name ,  t1.internet FROM channel AS t1 JOIN program AS t2 ON t1.channel_id  =  t2.channel_id GROUP BY t1.channel_id HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Find the id and name of the channel that is not directed by Hank Baskett.
original_query: SELECT t1.name ,  t1.channel_id FROM channel AS t1 JOIN director_admin AS t2 ON t1.channel_id  =  t2.channel_id JOIN director AS t3 ON t2.director_id  =  t3.director_id WHERE t3.name != "Hank Baskett"

question: Find the name of the directors whose age is between 30 and 60.
original_query: SELECT name FROM director WHERE age BETWEEN 30 AND 60

question: Find the name and age of the director who is in charge of the most programs?
original_query: SELECT t2.name ,  t2.age FROM program AS t1 JOIN director AS t2 ON t1.director_id  =  t2.director_id GROUP BY t1.director_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the names of directors who are older than the average age.
original_query: SELECT name FROM director WHERE age  >  (SELECT avg(age) FROM director)

question: Find the name and internet web of the channel that is directed by the most directors.
original_query: SELECT t1.name ,  t1.internet FROM channel AS t1 JOIN director_admin AS t2 ON t1.channel_id  =  t2.channel_id GROUP BY t1.channel_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all program titles in the order of starting year. List the most recent one first.
original_query: SELECT title FROM program ORDER BY start_year DESC

question: Find the number of channels that do not run any program.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM channel WHERE channel_id NOT IN (SELECT channel_id FROM program)

question: Find the last names of teachers who are not involved in any detention.
original_query: SELECT last_name FROM Teachers EXCEPT SELECT T1.last_name FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Detention AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id

question: What are the line 1 and average monthly rentals of all student addresses?
original_query: SELECT T1.line_1 ,  avg(T2.monthly_rental) FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Student_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id GROUP BY T2.address_id

question: How many distinct students have been in detention?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT student_id) FROM Students_in_Detention

question: How many addresses have zip code 197?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM ADDRESSES WHERE zip_postcode  =  "197"

question: Find the id and last name of the teacher that has the most detentions with detention type code "AFTER"?
original_query: SELECT T1.teacher_id ,  T2.last_name FROM Detention AS T1 JOIN Teachers AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id WHERE T1.detention_type_code  =  "AFTER" GROUP BY T1.teacher_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find all information about student addresses, and sort by monthly rental in descending order.
original_query: SELECT * FROM Student_Addresses ORDER BY monthly_rental DESC

question: Find the start and end dates of behavior incidents of students with last name "Fahey".
original_query: SELECT T1.date_incident_start ,  date_incident_end FROM Behavior_Incident AS T1 JOIN Students AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id WHERE T2.last_name  =  "Fahey"

question: What are the id and zip code of the address with the highest monthly rental?
original_query: SELECT T2.address_id ,  T1.zip_postcode FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Student_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id ORDER BY monthly_rental DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the first names and last names of students with address in Wisconsin state?
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name ,  T2.last_name FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Students AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id WHERE T1.state_province_county  =  "Wisconsin"

question: What is the email of the student with first name "Emma" and last name "Rohan"?
original_query: SELECT email_address FROM Students WHERE first_name  =  "Emma" AND last_name  =  "Rohan"

question: What is the zip code of the address where the teacher with first name "Lyla" lives?
original_query: SELECT T1.zip_postcode FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Teachers AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id WHERE T2.first_name  =  "Lyla"

question: Return all distinct detention type codes.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT detention_type_code FROM Detention

question: Find the id and last name of the student that has the most behavior incidents?
original_query: SELECT T1.student_id ,  T2.last_name FROM Behavior_Incident AS T1 JOIN Students AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many assessment notes are there in total?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM ASSESSMENT_NOTES

question: Return all detention summaries.
original_query: SELECT detention_summary FROM Detention

question: What are the dates of the assessment notes?
original_query: SELECT date_of_notes FROM Assessment_Notes

question: What are the monthly rentals of student addresses in Texas state?
original_query: SELECT T2.monthly_rental FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Student_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id WHERE T1.state_province_county  =  "Texas"

question: Find the id and city of the student address with the highest average monthly rental.
original_query: SELECT T2.address_id ,  T1.city FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Student_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id GROUP BY T2.address_id ORDER BY AVG(monthly_rental) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the start and end dates of detentions of teachers with last name "Schultz".
original_query: SELECT T1.datetime_detention_start ,  datetime_detention_end FROM Detention AS T1 JOIN Teachers AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id WHERE T2.last_name  =  "Schultz"

question: Find the ids and first names of the 3 teachers that have the most number of assessment notes?
original_query: SELECT T1.teacher_id ,  T2.first_name FROM Assessment_Notes AS T1 JOIN Teachers AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id GROUP BY T1.teacher_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: For each zip code, return the average mean temperature of August there.
original_query: SELECT zip_code  ,  avg(mean_temperature_f) FROM weather WHERE date LIKE "8/%" GROUP BY zip_code

question: For each zip code, select all those that have an average mean visiblity below 10.
original_query: SELECT zip_code FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code HAVING avg(mean_visibility_miles)  <  10

question: For each station, return its longitude and the average duration of trips that started from the station.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.long ,  avg(T2.duration) FROM station AS T1 JOIN trip AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.start_station_id GROUP BY T2.start_station_id

question: What is the name, latitude, and city of the station that is located the furthest South?
original_query: SELECT name ,  lat ,  city FROM station ORDER BY lat LIMIT 1

question: Which days had a minimum dew point smaller than any day in zip code 94107, and in which zip codes were those measurements taken?
original_query: SELECT date ,  zip_code FROM weather WHERE min_dew_point_f  <  (SELECT min(min_dew_point_f) FROM weather WHERE zip_code  =  94107)

question: For each zip code, return how many times max wind speed reached 25?
original_query: SELECT zip_code , count(*) FROM weather WHERE max_wind_Speed_mph  >=  25 GROUP BY zip_code

question: Find all the zip codes in which the max dew point have never reached 70.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT zip_code FROM weather EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT zip_code FROM weather WHERE max_dew_point_f  >=  70

question: What is the id of the bike that traveled the most in 94002?
original_query: SELECT bike_id FROM trip WHERE zip_code  =  94002 GROUP BY bike_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total and maximum duration for all trips with the bike id 636?
original_query: SELECT sum(duration) ,  max(duration) FROM trip WHERE bike_id  =  636

question: Which bike traveled the most often in zip code 94002?
original_query: SELECT bike_id FROM trip WHERE zip_code  =  94002 GROUP BY bike_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of all stations with a latitude smaller than 37.5?
original_query: SELECT name FROM station WHERE lat  <  37.5

question: How many stations are in Mountain View?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM station WHERE city  =  "Mountain View"

question: What are all the different start station names for a trip that lasted less than 100?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT start_station_name FROM trip WHERE duration  <  100

question: Give me ids for all the trip that took place in a zip code area with average mean temperature above 60.
original_query: SELECT T1.id FROM trip AS T1 JOIN weather AS T2 ON T1.zip_code  =  T2.zip_code GROUP BY T2.zip_code HAVING avg(T2.mean_temperature_f)  >  60

question: What zip codes have a station with a max temperature greater than or equal to 80 and when did it reach that temperature?
original_query: SELECT date ,  zip_code FROM weather WHERE max_temperature_f  >=  80

question: What are the dates that have an average sea level pressure between 30.3 and 31?
original_query: SELECT date FROM weather WHERE mean_sea_level_pressure_inches BETWEEN 30.3 AND 31

question: Count the number of trips that did not end in San Francisco city.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM trip AS T1 JOIN station AS T2 ON T1.end_station_id  =  T2.id WHERE T2.city !=  "San Francisco"

question: Find the id for the trips that lasted at least as long as the average duration of trips in zip code 94103.
original_query: SELECT id FROM trip WHERE duration  >=  (SELECT avg(duration) FROM trip WHERE zip_code  =  94103)

question: On which day has it neither been foggy nor rained in the zip code of 94107?
original_query: SELECT date FROM weather WHERE zip_code  =  94107 AND EVENTS != "Fog" AND EVENTS != "Rain"

question: What is the average bike availability in stations that are not located in Palo Alto?
original_query: SELECT avg(bikes_available) FROM status WHERE station_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM station WHERE city  =  "Palo Alto")

question: What is the id of the trip that has the shortest duration?
original_query: SELECT id FROM trip ORDER BY duration LIMIT 1

question: What are the name, latitude, and city of the station with the lowest latitude?
original_query: SELECT name ,  lat ,  city FROM station ORDER BY lat LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the stations that are located in Palo Alto but have never been the ending point of the trips
original_query: SELECT name FROM station WHERE city  =  "Palo Alto" EXCEPT SELECT end_station_name FROM trip GROUP BY end_station_name HAVING count(*)  >  100

question: What are the different names for each station that has ever had 7 bikes available?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM station AS T1 JOIN status AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.station_id WHERE T2.bikes_available  =  7

question: What are the ids of stations that have latitude above 37.4 and never had bike availability below 7?
original_query: SELECT id FROM station WHERE lat  >  37.4 EXCEPT SELECT station_id FROM status GROUP BY station_id HAVING min(bikes_available)  <  7

question: Which start station had the most trips starting from August? Give me the name and id of the station.
original_query: SELECT start_station_name ,  start_station_id FROM trip WHERE start_date LIKE "8/%" GROUP BY start_station_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the zip codes that have an average mean humidity below 70 and had at least 100 trips come through there?
original_query: SELECT zip_code FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code HAVING avg(mean_humidity)  <  70 INTERSECT SELECT zip_code FROM trip GROUP BY zip_code HAVING count(*)  >=  100

question: List all the distinct stations from which a trip of duration below 100 started.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT start_station_name FROM trip WHERE duration  <  100

question: Give me the start station and end station for the trips with the three oldest id.
original_query: SELECT start_station_name ,  end_station_name FROM trip ORDER BY id LIMIT 3

question: For each end station id, what is its name, latitude, and minimum duration for trips ended there?
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.lat ,  min(T2.duration) FROM station AS T1 JOIN trip AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.end_station_id GROUP BY T2.end_station_id

question: What are the dates that had the top 5 cloud cover rates? Also tell me the cloud cover rate.
original_query: SELECT date ,  cloud_cover FROM weather ORDER BY cloud_cover DESC LIMIT 5

question: For each city, what is the highest latitude for its stations?
original_query: SELECT city ,  max(lat) FROM station GROUP BY city

question: What are the dates in which the mean sea level pressure was between 30.3 and 31?
original_query: SELECT date FROM weather WHERE mean_sea_level_pressure_inches BETWEEN 30.3 AND 31

question: What is the date, average temperature and mean humidity for the days with the 3 largest maximum gust speeds?
original_query: SELECT date ,  mean_temperature_f ,  mean_humidity FROM weather ORDER BY max_gust_speed_mph DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the day in which the difference between the max temperature and min temperature was the smallest. Also report the difference.
original_query: SELECT date ,  max_temperature_f - min_temperature_f FROM weather ORDER BY max_temperature_f - min_temperature_f LIMIT 1

question: For each station, find its latitude and the minimum duration of trips that ended at the station.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.lat ,  min(T2.duration) FROM station AS T1 JOIN trip AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.end_station_id GROUP BY T2.end_station_id

question: What are the dates with a maximum temperature higher than 85?
original_query: SELECT date FROM weather WHERE max_temperature_f  >  85

question: Give me the zip code where the average mean humidity is below 70 and at least 100 trips took place.
original_query: SELECT zip_code FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code HAVING avg(mean_humidity)  <  70 INTERSECT SELECT zip_code FROM trip GROUP BY zip_code HAVING count(*)  >=  100

question: What are the ids of stations that are located in San Francisco and have average bike availability above 10.
original_query: SELECT id FROM station WHERE city  =  "San Francisco" INTERSECT SELECT station_id FROM status GROUP BY station_id HAVING avg(bikes_available)  >  10

question: How many trips stated from  a station in Mountain View and ended at one in Palo Alto?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM station AS T1 JOIN trip AS T2 JOIN station AS T3 JOIN trip AS T4 ON T1.id  =  T2.start_station_id AND T2.id  =  T4.id AND T3.id  =  T4.end_station_id WHERE T1.city  =  "Mountain View" AND T3.city  =  "Palo Alto"

question: What is the 3 most common cloud cover rates in the region of zip code 94107?
original_query: SELECT cloud_cover FROM weather WHERE zip_code  =  94107 GROUP BY cloud_cover ORDER BY COUNT (*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the ids and names of stations from which at least 200 trips started.
original_query: SELECT start_station_id ,  start_station_name FROM trip GROUP BY start_station_name HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  200

question: What are the names and ids of all stations that have more than 14 bikes available on average or had bikes installed in December?
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.id FROM station AS T1 JOIN status AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.station_id GROUP BY T2.station_id HAVING avg(T2.bikes_available)  >  14 UNION SELECT name ,  id FROM station WHERE installation_date LIKE "12/%"

question: What are the names of all stations that have more than 10 bikes available and are not located in San Jose?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM station AS T1 JOIN status AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.station_id GROUP BY T2.station_id HAVING avg(bikes_available)  >  10 EXCEPT SELECT name FROM station WHERE city  =  "San Jose"

question: What are the ids and names of all start stations that were the beginning of at least 200 trips?
original_query: SELECT start_station_id ,  start_station_name FROM trip GROUP BY start_station_name HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  200

question: What is the installation date for each ending station on all the trips?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T2.installation_date FROM trip AS T1 JOIN station AS T2 ON T1.end_station_id  =  T2.id

question: What is the id of the trip that started from the station with the highest dock count?
original_query: SELECT T1.id FROM trip AS T1 JOIN station AS T2 ON T1.start_station_id  =  T2.id ORDER BY T2.dock_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the id of the shortest trip?
original_query: SELECT id FROM trip ORDER BY duration LIMIT 1

question: What is the average bike availablility for stations not in Palo Alto?
original_query: SELECT avg(bikes_available) FROM status WHERE station_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM station WHERE city  =  "Palo Alto")

question: What are the start station's name and id for the one that had the most start trips in August?
original_query: SELECT start_station_name ,  start_station_id FROM trip WHERE start_date LIKE "8/%" GROUP BY start_station_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the zip code in which the average mean visibility is lower than 10.
original_query: SELECT zip_code FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code HAVING avg(mean_visibility_miles)  <  10

question: What are the id and name of the stations that have ever had more than 12 bikes available?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM station AS T1 JOIN status AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.station_id WHERE T2.bikes_available  >  12

question: What are the name and result of the cyclists not from 'Russia' ?
original_query: SELECT name ,  RESULT FROM cyclist WHERE nation != 'Russia'

question: What are the ids and names of racing bikes that are purchased by at least 4 cyclists?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.product_name FROM bike AS T1 JOIN cyclists_own_bikes AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.bike_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING count(*)  >=  4

question: List the product names and weights of the bikes in ascending order of price.
original_query: SELECT product_name ,  weight FROM bike ORDER BY price ASC

question: Show the name, nation and result for the cyclists who did not purchase any racing bike.
original_query: SELECT name ,  nation ,  RESULT FROM cyclist EXCEPT SELECT T1.name ,  T1.nation ,  T1.result FROM cyclist AS T1 JOIN cyclists_own_bikes AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.cyclist_id

question: How many bikes does each cyclist own? Order by cyclist id.
original_query: SELECT cyclist_id ,  count(*) FROM cyclists_own_bikes GROUP BY cyclist_id ORDER BY cyclist_id

question: What are the distinct product names of bikes owned by cyclists from 'Russia' or cyclists from 'Great Britain'?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.product_name FROM cyclist AS T1 JOIN cyclists_own_bikes AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.cyclist_id JOIN bike AS T3 ON T2.bike_id  =  T3.id WHERE T1.nation  =  'Russia' OR T1.nation  =  'Great Britain'

question: What are the distinct ids and product names of the bikes that are purchased after year 2015?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id ,  T1.product_name FROM bike AS T1 JOIN cyclists_own_bikes AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.bike_id WHERE T2.purchase_year  >  2015

question: What are the maximum and minimum weight of all bikes?
original_query: SELECT max(weight) ,  min(weight) FROM bike

question: What are the ids of sailors who reserved red and blue boats?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.sid FROM Boats AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON  T1.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T1.color  =  'red' INTERSECT SELECT DISTINCT T2.sid FROM Boats AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON  T1.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T1.color  =  "blue"

question: Find the number of reservations by sailors with id greater than 1 for each boat.
original_query: SELECT bid ,  count(*) FROM Reserves WHERE sid  >  1 GROUP BY bid

question: return the unique ids of sailors who are older than any sailors.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT sid FROM Sailors WHERE age  >  (SELECT min(age) FROM Sailors);

question: Find the number of reservations for each boat.
original_query: SELECT bid ,  count(*) FROM Reserves GROUP BY bid

question: Find the name, rating and age of all sailors ordered by rating and age.
original_query: SELECT name ,  rating ,  age FROM Sailors ORDER BY rating ,  age

question: What are the average rating and max age of all sailors?
original_query: SELECT AVG(rating) ,  MAX(age) FROM Sailors

question: Find the names of sailors who reserved boat with the name Melon.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid JOIN Boats AS T3 ON T3.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T3.name  =  'Melon'

question: Return all details of sailors who are older than 30.
original_query: SELECT * FROM Sailors WHERE age  >  30

question: What is the name of the sailor who reserved boat 102?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid WHERE T2.bid  =  102

question: Find the id of Sailors (sid) that reserved red or blue boat.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.sid FROM Boats AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON  T1.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T1.color  =  'red' OR T1.color  =  "blue"

question: What is the count of the sailors whose name starts with letter D ?
original_query: select count(*) from sailors where name like 'd%'

question: What are the names of the sailors whose rating is larger than the rating of all sailors who booked a red boat?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Sailors WHERE rating  >  (SELECT max(T1.rating) FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid JOIN Boats AS T3 ON T3.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T3.color  =  'red')

question: Find the total number of boats.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Boats

question: What are the names of sailors who reserved a boat with the name Melon?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid JOIN Boats AS T3 ON T3.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T3.name  =  'Melon'

question: Find the id and name of the sailors who reserved more than one boat.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name ,  T1.sid FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid GROUP BY T2.sid HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

question: What are the names of the boats booked by people between age 20 and 30?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid JOIN Boats AS T3 ON T3.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T1.age BETWEEN 20 AND 30

question: Find the names of boats booked by sailors whose age is between 20 and 30.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid JOIN Boats AS T3 ON T3.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T1.age BETWEEN 20 AND 30

question: What is the name of the sailors who reserved boat with id 103?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid WHERE  T2.bid  =  103

question: Find the id of Sailors (sid) that reserved red and blue boat.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.sid FROM Boats AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON  T1.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T1.color  =  'red' INTERSECT SELECT DISTINCT T2.sid FROM Boats AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON  T1.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T1.color  =  "blue"

question: What is average age of all sailors who have a rating of 7?
original_query: SELECT AVG(age) FROM Sailors WHERE rating  =  7

question: What is the name and age of the sailor with maximum age?
original_query: SELECT name ,  age FROM Sailors WHERE age  =  ( SELECT max(age) FROM Sailors )

question: Find the name and id of Sailors (sid) that reserved red or blue boat.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.sid ,  T3.name FROM Boats AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON  T1.bid  =  T2.bid JOIN Sailors AS T3 ON T2.sid  =  T3.sid WHERE T1.color  =  'red' OR T1.color  =  "blue"

question: How many sailors whose name starts with letter D exist ?
original_query: select count(*) from sailors where name like 'd%'

question: How many boats are red?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Boats WHERE color  =  'red'

question: What are the names and ids of sailors who reserved red and blue boats?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.sid ,  T3.name FROM Boats AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON  T1.bid  =  T2.bid JOIN Sailors AS T3 ON T2.sid  =  T3.sid WHERE T1.color  =  'red' INTERSECT SELECT DISTINCT T2.sid ,  T3.name FROM Boats AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON  T1.bid  =  T2.bid JOIN Sailors AS T3 ON T2.sid  =  T3.sid WHERE T1.color  =  "blue"

question: Return the unique names of sailors who are older than any sailors whose rating is larger than 7.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM Sailors WHERE age  >  (SELECT min(age) FROM Sailors WHERE rating  >  7);

question: What are the names and ids of all sailors who do not have boat reservations?
original_query: SELECT sid ,  name FROM Sailors EXCEPT SELECT T1.sid ,  T1.name FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid

question: List the names and ages of all sailors sorted by rating in descending order.
original_query: SELECT name ,  age FROM Sailors ORDER BY rating DESC

question: Find id for the sailors who do not have a reservation of a boat?
original_query: SELECT sid FROM Sailors EXCEPT SELECT T1.sid FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid

question: How many sailors exist?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Sailors

question: What are the sailors' names, the ones whose rating is higher than any sailor named Luis?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Sailors WHERE rating  >  (SELECT min(rating) FROM Sailors WHERE name  =  'Luis')

question: What is the average age of sailors whose rating is 7?
original_query: SELECT AVG(age) FROM Sailors WHERE rating  =  7

question: How many red boats exist?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Boats WHERE color  =  'red'

question: what is the name and id of every sailor who has a rating greater than 2 and reserved a boat.
