original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name ,  T1.sid FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid WHERE  T1.rating  >  2

question: How many boats are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Boats

question: What are the ids of all boats that are reserved by someone?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT bid FROM Reserves

question: What is the maximum rating for sailors?
original_query: SELECT max(rating) FROM Sailors

question: What are the different names of sailors who reserved two or more boats ?
original_query: select distinct t1.name ,  t1.sid from sailors as t1 join reserves as t2 on t1.sid  =  t2.sid group by t2.sid having count(*)  >=  2

question: Find boats reserved by Sailor with id 1.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT bid FROM Reserves WHERE sid = 1

question: What are the birthdays of people in ascending order of height?
original_query: SELECT Birth_Date FROM People ORDER BY Height ASC

question: What is the average snatch score of body builders?
original_query: SELECT avg(Snatch) FROM body_builder

question: List the snatch score and clean jerk score of body builders in ascending order of snatch score.
original_query: SELECT Snatch ,  Clean_Jerk FROM body_builder ORDER BY Snatch ASC

question: What are the names of body builders whose total score is higher than 300?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM body_builder AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID WHERE T1.Total  >  300

question: What is the average total score of body builders with height bigger than 200?
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.Total) FROM body_builder AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID WHERE T2.Height  >  200

question: What are the total scores of the body builders whose birthday contains the string "January" ?
original_query: SELECT T1.total FROM body_builder AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.people_id  =  T2.people_id WHERE T2.Birth_Date LIKE "%January%";

question: What are the clean and jerk score of the body builder with the highest total score?
original_query: SELECT Clean_Jerk FROM body_builder ORDER BY Total DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the body builder with the greatest body weight?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM body_builder AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T2.Weight DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the birth date and birth place of the body builder with the highest total points?
original_query: SELECT T2.Birth_Date ,  T2.Birth_Place FROM body_builder AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T1.Total DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the minimum snatch score?
original_query: SELECT min(snatch) FROM body_builder

question: Show all information about each body builder.
original_query: SELECT * FROM body_builder

question: List the names and origins of people who are not body builders.
original_query: SELECT Name ,  birth_place FROM people EXCEPT SELECT T1.Name ,  T1.birth_place FROM people AS T1 JOIN body_builder AS T2 ON T1.people_id  =  T2.people_id

question: What are the titles of all books written by an author with a name that contains Plato?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Author_book AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.Author  =  T3.idAuthor WHERE T3.name LIKE "%Plato%"

question: What is the title and purchase price of the book that has the highest total order amount?
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,  T2.PurchasePrice FROM Books_Order AS T1 JOIN BOOk AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn GROUP BY T1.isbn ORDER BY sum(amount) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of all books and their corresponding authors?
original_query: SELECT T3.title ,  T1.name FROM Author AS T1 JOIN Author_Book AS T2 ON T2.Author  =  T1.idAuthor JOIN Book AS T3 ON T2.isbn  =  T3.isbn

question: Show all order ids and their client names.
original_query: SELECT T1.idOrder ,  T2.name FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Client AS T2 ON T1.idClient  =  T2.idClient

question: Give the title of book by George Orwell that has the lowest saleprice.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Author_book AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.Author  =  T3.idAuthor WHERE T3.name  =  "George Orwell" ORDER BY T1.saleprice LIMIT 1

question: List titles of all books published by an author whose name contains the string 'Plato'?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Author_book AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.Author  =  T3.idAuthor WHERE T3.name LIKE "%Plato%"

question: What are sale prices of books written by Plato?
original_query: SELECT saleprice FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Author_book AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.Author  =  T3.idAuthor WHERE T3.name  =  "Plato"

question: What are the names of all the clients, and how many times has each of them ordered?
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  count(*) FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Client AS T2 ON T1.idClient  =  T2.idClient GROUP BY T1.idClient

question: Show all client names and the number of orders each has made.
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  count(*) FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Client AS T2 ON T1.idClient  =  T2.idClient GROUP BY T1.idClient

question: Show the book title corresponding to the book with the most number of orders.
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Books_Order AS T1 JOIN Book AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn GROUP BY T1.isbn ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the order ids for orders that include both Pride and Prejudice and The Little Prince?
original_query: SELECT idOrder FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn WHERE T1.title  =  "Pride and Prejudice" INTERSECT SELECT idOrder FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn WHERE T1.title  =  "The Little Prince"

question: Return the largest difference in sale price and purchase price.
original_query: SELECT max(saleprice - purchaseprice) FROM Book

question: Show all book titles for books that have no orders.
original_query: SELECT title FROM book EXCEPT SELECT T1.title FROM book AS T1 JOIN books_order AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn

question: Show all book titles and corresponding author names.
original_query: SELECT T3.title ,  T1.name FROM Author AS T1 JOIN Author_Book AS T2 ON T2.Author  =  T1.idAuthor JOIN Book AS T3 ON T2.isbn  =  T3.isbn

question: Count the number of authors.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Author

question: What are the names of all the authors?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Author

question: List names and addresses of all clients in alphabetical order by their names.
original_query: SELECT name ,  address FROM Client ORDER BY name

question: List all book titles which have the lowest sale price .
original_query: select title from book order by saleprice asc limit 1

question: List all book titles which have highest purchase prices .
original_query: select title from book order by purchaseprice  desc limit 1

question: Give the name of the client who has made the most orders.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Client AS T2 ON T1.idClient  =  T2.idClient GROUP BY T1.idClient ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the title of the book written by Plato has price lower than the average sale price of all books?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Author_book AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.Author  =  T3.idAuthor WHERE T3.name  =  "Plato" AND T1.saleprice  <  (SELECT avg(saleprice) FROM Book)

question: Give the average purchase price and average sale price for books.
original_query: SELECT avg(purchaseprice) ,  avg(saleprice) FROM Book

question: Give the maximum and minimum sale price of books.
original_query: SELECT max(saleprice) ,  min(saleprice) FROM Book

question: What are the titles, ISBNs, and sale prices for all books?
original_query: SELECT title ,  isbn ,  SalePrice FROM Book

question: Show all book isbns and the total amount ordered for each.
original_query: SELECT isbn ,  sum(amount) FROM Books_Order GROUP BY isbn

question: Who is the author of the book "Pride and Prejudice"?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Author_book AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.Author  =  T3.idAuthor WHERE T1.title  =  "Pride and Prejudice"

question: What are the titles of books with the highest purchase price across all books ?
original_query: select title from book order by purchaseprice  desc limit 1

question: List all book titles which have sale prices higher than the average.
original_query: SELECT title FROM book WHERE saleprice  >  (SELECT avg(saleprice) FROM book)

question: What is the maximum and the minimum sale price?
original_query: SELECT max(saleprice) ,  min(saleprice) FROM Book

question: Show all client names who have orders for "Pride and Prejudice".
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.idOrder  =  T2.idOrder JOIN Client AS T3 ON T1.idClient  =  T3.idClient JOIN Book AS T4 ON T4.isbn  =  T2.isbn WHERE T4.title  =  "Pride and Prejudice"

question: What is the maximum difference between the sale price and purchase price?
original_query: SELECT max(saleprice - purchaseprice) FROM Book

question: Show all client names for clients who have not made orders.
original_query: SELECT name FROM Client EXCEPT SELECT T1.name FROM Client AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.idClient  =  T2.idClient

question: Show the titles of books that have been ordered.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.title FROM book AS T1 JOIN books_order AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn

question: Show ids for orders including both "Pride and Prejudice" and "The Little Prince".
original_query: SELECT idOrder FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn WHERE T1.title  =  "Pride and Prejudice" INTERSECT SELECT idOrder FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn WHERE T1.title  =  "The Little Prince"

question: Show the book title and purchase price of the book that has had the greatest amount in orders.
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,  T2.PurchasePrice FROM Books_Order AS T1 JOIN BOOk AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn GROUP BY T1.isbn ORDER BY sum(amount) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show all book isbns and the numbers of orders for each.
original_query: SELECT isbn ,  count(*) FROM Books_Order GROUP BY isbn

question: Show all Client names and their addresses.
original_query: SELECT name ,  address FROM Client

question: Show the client name who has the most total amount of books ordered.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Client AS T2 ON T1.idClient  =  T2.idClient JOIN Books_Order AS T3 ON T3.idOrder  =  T1.idOrder GROUP BY T1.idClient ORDER BY sum(T3.amount) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the number of clients.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Client

question: How many books are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM book

question: What are the titles of the books whose writer is not "Elaine Lee"?
original_query: SELECT Title FROM book WHERE Writer != "Elaine Lee"

question: Show different publishers together with the number of publications they have.
original_query: SELECT Publisher ,  COUNT(*) FROM publication GROUP BY Publisher

question: List the publication dates of publications with 3 lowest prices.
original_query: SELECT Publication_Date FROM publication ORDER BY Price ASC LIMIT 3

question: List the titles of books that are not published.
original_query: SELECT Title FROM book WHERE Book_ID NOT IN (SELECT Book_ID FROM publication)

question: Please show the most common publication date.
original_query: SELECT Publication_Date FROM publication GROUP BY Publication_Date ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the publisher of the publication with the highest price.
original_query: SELECT Publisher FROM publication ORDER BY Price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the publishers that have publications with price higher than 10000000 and publications with price lower than 5000000.
original_query: SELECT Publisher FROM publication WHERE Price  >  10000000 INTERSECT SELECT Publisher FROM publication WHERE Price  <  5000000

question: What are the distinct publishers of publications with price higher than 5000000?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Publisher FROM publication WHERE Price  >  5000000

question: What are the dates of publications in descending order of price?
original_query: SELECT Publication_Date FROM publication ORDER BY Price DESC

question: What are the names of the publishers that made more than 15 billion profits each year or 1 billion each month?
original_query: SELECT name FROM press WHERE Year_Profits_billion  >  15 OR Month_Profits_billion  >  1

question: Count the number of authors of age below 30.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM author WHERE age  <  30

question: For each gender, return gender and the average age of authors.
original_query: SELECT avg(age) ,  gender FROM author GROUP BY gender

question: Find the book series that have some book selling more than 1000 and some book less 500.
original_query: SELECT book_series FROM book WHERE sale_amount  >  1000 INTERSECT SELECT book_series FROM book WHERE sale_amount  <  500

question: Find the name of the publisher whose monthly profit is the highest or the lowest.
original_query: SELECT name FROM press WHERE Month_Profits_billion  =  (SELECT min(Month_Profits_billion) FROM press) OR Month_Profits_billion  =  (SELECT max(Month_Profits_billion) FROM press)

question: Sorted all the press by year profits in descending order, and return press names.
original_query: SELECT name FROM press ORDER BY Year_Profits_billion DESC

question: For each press, return its name and the number of books that have sale amount above 1000.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  t2.name FROM book AS t1 JOIN press AS t2 ON t1.press_id  =  t2.press_id WHERE sale_amount  >  1000 GROUP BY t2.name

question: Who wrote the largest number of books? Give me the author name and gender.
original_query: SELECT t1.name ,  t1.gender FROM author AS t1 JOIN book AS t2 ON t1.author_id  =  t2.author_id GROUP BY t2.author_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which authors publish books in both "MM" and "LT" series? Give me the author names.
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM author AS t1 JOIN book AS t2 ON t1.author_id  =  t2.author_id WHERE t2.book_series  =  'MM' INTERSECT SELECT t1.name FROM author AS t1 JOIN book AS t2 ON t1.author_id  =  t2.author_id WHERE t2.book_series  =  'LT'

question: What are the names of the press that makes the highest monthly profit or the lowest monthly profit?
original_query: SELECT name FROM press WHERE Month_Profits_billion  =  (SELECT min(Month_Profits_billion) FROM press) OR Month_Profits_billion  =  (SELECT max(Month_Profits_billion) FROM press)

question: Find the number of books for each series.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  book_series FROM book GROUP BY book_series

question: Find the press whose yearly profit is more than 15 billion or whose monthly profit is more than 1 billion. Return the press names.
original_query: SELECT name FROM press WHERE Year_Profits_billion  >  15 OR Month_Profits_billion  >  1

question: Find the average and maximum yearly profit for each press.
original_query: SELECT avg(Year_Profits_billion) ,  max(Year_Profits_billion) FROM press

question: Sort all the books in descending order of release date, and return the book titles.
original_query: SELECT title FROM book ORDER BY release_date DESC

question: Find the names of authors who have more than one book in the database.
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM author AS t1 JOIN book AS t2 ON t1.author_id  =  t2.author_id GROUP BY t2.author_id HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Find the press that published more than two books, and return its name and yearly profit in billion.
original_query: SELECT t2.name ,  t2.Year_Profits_billion FROM book AS t1 JOIN press AS t2 ON t1.press_id  =  t2.press_id GROUP BY t2.press_id HAVING count(*)  >  2

question: Find the number of books that are sold more than 1000 for each publisher. List the press name as well.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  t2.name FROM book AS t1 JOIN press AS t2 ON t1.press_id  =  t2.press_id WHERE sale_amount  >  1000 GROUP BY t2.name

question: Find the name and age of the authors who do not have any book in the record.
original_query: SELECT name ,  age FROM author WHERE author_id NOT IN (SELECT author_id FROM book)

question: What are the 5 best books in terms of sale amount? Give me their titles and release dates.
original_query: SELECT title ,  release_date FROM book ORDER BY sale_amount DESC LIMIT 5

question: list all the names of press in descending order of the profit of the year.
original_query: SELECT name FROM press ORDER BY Year_Profits_billion DESC

question: Which press has the largest monthly profit? Give me the press name.
original_query: SELECT name FROM press ORDER BY Month_Profits_billion DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the name and total book sale amount of each press.
original_query: SELECT sum(t1.sale_amount) ,  t2.name FROM book AS t1 JOIN press AS t2 ON t1.press_id  =  t2.press_id GROUP BY t1.press_id

question: List the titles of books in ascending alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT Title FROM book ORDER BY Title ASC

question: What is the most common type of books?
original_query: SELECT TYPE FROM book GROUP BY TYPE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the titles and ratings of books?
original_query: SELECT T1.Title ,  T2.Rating FROM book AS T1 JOIN review AS T2 ON T1.Book_ID  =  T2.Book_ID

question: Show the types of books that have both books with more than 75 chapters and books with less than 50 chapters.
original_query: SELECT TYPE FROM book WHERE Chapters  >  75 INTERSECT SELECT TYPE FROM book WHERE Chapters  <  50

question: What are the types of books that have at least three books belonging to?
original_query: SELECT TYPE FROM book GROUP BY TYPE HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  3

question: What is the rank of the book with the smallest number of pages?
original_query: SELECT T2.Rank FROM book AS T1 JOIN review AS T2 ON T1.Book_ID  =  T2.Book_ID ORDER BY T1.Pages ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the types and release dates of books?
original_query: SELECT TYPE ,  Release FROM book

question: How many distinct types of book are there?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT TYPE) FROM book

question: What is the average number of readers for books of type "Novel"?
original_query: SELECT avg(T2.Readers_in_Million) FROM book AS T1 JOIN review AS T2 ON T1.Book_ID  =  T2.Book_ID WHERE T1.Type  =  "Novel"

question: What are the maximum and minimum number of chapters for each book?
original_query: SELECT max(Chapters) ,  min(Chapters) FROM book

question: List the name of browsers in descending order by market share.
original_query: SELECT name FROM browser ORDER BY market_share DESC

question: How many accelerators are not compatible with the browsers listed ?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM web_client_accelerator WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT accelerator_id FROM accelerator_compatible_browser );

question: What is the maximum, minimum and average market share of the listed browsers?
original_query: SELECT max(market_share) ,  min(market_share) ,  avg(market_share) FROM browser

question: What is the name of the browser that became compatible with the accelerator 'CProxy' after year 1998 ?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM browser AS T1 JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.browser_id JOIN web_client_accelerator AS T3 ON T2.accelerator_id  =  T3.id WHERE T3.name  =  'CProxy' AND T2.compatible_since_year  >  1998

question: What is the id and name of the browser that is compatible with the most web accelerators?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM browser AS T1 JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.browser_id GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the ids, names and market shares of all browsers.
original_query: SELECT id ,  name ,  market_share FROM browser

question: Show the accelerator names and supporting operating systems that are not compatible with the browser named 'Opera'.
original_query: SELECT name ,  operating_system FROM web_client_accelerator EXCEPT SELECT T1.name ,  T1.operating_system FROM web_client_accelerator AS T1 JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T2.accelerator_id  =  T1.id JOIN browser AS T3 ON T2.browser_id  =  T3.id WHERE T3.name  =  'Opera'

question: When did the web accelerator 'CACHEbox' and browser 'Internet Explorer' become compatible?
original_query: SELECT T1.compatible_since_year FROM accelerator_compatible_browser AS T1 JOIN browser AS T2 ON T1.browser_id  =  T2.id JOIN web_client_accelerator AS T3 ON T1.accelerator_id  =  T3.id WHERE T3.name  =  'CACHEbox' AND T2.name  =  'Internet Explorer'

question: Which accelerator name contains substring "Opera"?
original_query: SELECT name FROM web_client_accelerator WHERE name LIKE "%Opera%"

question: Give the names of people who did not participate in the candidate election.
original_query: SELECT name FROM people WHERE people_id NOT IN (SELECT people_id FROM candidate)

question: What is the id of the candidate with the lowest oppose rate?
original_query: SELECT Candidate_ID FROM candidate ORDER BY oppose_rate LIMIT 1

question: Return the poll resource associated with the most candidates.
original_query: SELECT poll_source FROM candidate GROUP BY poll_source ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the average and minimum weight for each gender.
original_query: SELECT avg(weight) ,  min(weight) ,  sex FROM people GROUP BY sex

question: Count the number of people of each sex who have a weight higher than 85.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  sex FROM people WHERE weight  >  85 GROUP BY sex

question: List all people names in the order of their date of birth from old to young.
original_query: SELECT name FROM people ORDER BY date_of_birth

question: What are the names of candidates who have a lower support rate than oppose rate?
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM people AS t1 JOIN candidate AS t2 ON t1.people_id  =  t2.people_id WHERE t2.support_rate  <  t2.oppose_rate

question: what are the top 3 highest support rates?
original_query: SELECT support_rate FROM candidate ORDER BY support_rate DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the names of all people, ordered by their date of birth?
original_query: SELECT name FROM people ORDER BY date_of_birth

question: which gender got the highest average uncertain ratio.
original_query: SELECT t1.sex FROM people AS t1 JOIN candidate AS t2 ON t1.people_id  =  t2.people_id GROUP BY t1.sex ORDER BY avg(t2.unsure_rate) DESC LIMIT 1

question: find the name of people whose height is lower than the average.
original_query: SELECT name FROM people WHERE height  <  (SELECT avg(height) FROM people)

question: Which poll resource provided the most number of candidate information?
original_query: SELECT poll_source FROM candidate GROUP BY poll_source ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the support, consider, and oppose rates of each candidate, ordered ascending by their unsure rate?
original_query: SELECT Support_rate ,  Consider_rate ,  Oppose_rate FROM candidate ORDER BY unsure_rate

question: For each sex, what is the name and sex of the candidate with the oppose rate for their sex?
original_query: SELECT t1.name ,  t1.sex ,  min(oppose_rate) FROM people AS t1 JOIN candidate AS t2 ON t1.people_id  =  t2.people_id GROUP BY t1.sex

question: Find the name of the candidates whose oppose percentage is the lowest for each sex.
original_query: SELECT t1.name ,  t1.sex ,  min(oppose_rate) FROM people AS t1 JOIN candidate AS t2 ON t1.people_id  =  t2.people_id GROUP BY t1.sex

question: how many people are there whose weight is higher than 85 for each gender?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  sex FROM people WHERE weight  >  85 GROUP BY sex

question: Return the maximum support rate, minimum consider rate, and minimum oppose rate across all candidates?
original_query: SELECT max(support_rate) ,  min(consider_rate) ,  min(oppose_rate) FROM candidate

question: Return the top 3 greatest support rates.
original_query: SELECT support_rate FROM candidate ORDER BY support_rate DESC LIMIT 3

question: what are the names of people who did not participate in the candidate election.
original_query: SELECT name FROM people WHERE people_id NOT IN (SELECT people_id FROM candidate)

question: Please list support, consider, and oppose rates for each candidate in ascending order by unsure rate.
original_query: SELECT Support_rate ,  Consider_rate ,  Oppose_rate FROM candidate ORDER BY unsure_rate

question: What is the maximum horsepower and the make of the car models with 3 cylinders?
original_query: SELECT T2.horsepower ,  T1.Make FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.cylinders  =  3 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the number of the cars with horsepower more than 150?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE horsepower  >  150;

question: Find the model of the car whose weight is below the average weight.
original_query: SELECT T1.model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Weight  <  (SELECT avg(Weight) FROM CARS_DATA)

question: What are the id and names of the countries which have more than 3 car makers or produce the 'fiat' model?
original_query: SELECT T1.countryId ,  T1.CountryName FROM Countries AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.CountryId  =  T2.Country GROUP BY T1.countryId HAVING count(*)  >  3 UNION SELECT T1.countryId ,  T1.CountryName FROM Countries AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.CountryId  =  T2.Country JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T3 ON T2.Id  =  T3.Maker WHERE T3.Model  =  'fiat';

question: How many countries does each continent have? List the continent id, continent name and the number of countries.
original_query: SELECT T1.ContId ,  T1.Continent ,  count(*) FROM CONTINENTS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.ContId  =  T2.Continent GROUP BY T1.ContId;

question: What is the horsepower of the car with the largest accelerate?
original_query: SELECT T1.horsepower FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 ORDER BY T1.accelerate DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many car models were produced by the maker with full name American Motor Company?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker WHERE T1.FullName  =  'American Motor Company';

question: What is the maker of the carr produced in the earliest year and what year was it?
original_query: SELECT T2.Make ,  T1.Year FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T1.Year  =  (SELECT min(YEAR) FROM CARS_DATA);

question: What is the number of cars with a horsepower greater than 150?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE horsepower  >  150;

question: How many cars has over 6 cylinders?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  >  6;

question: How many countries exist?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM COUNTRIES;

question: What is the average weight of cars each year?
original_query: SELECT avg(Weight) ,  YEAR FROM CARS_DATA GROUP BY YEAR;

question: In which years cars were produced weighing no less than 3000 and no more than 4000 ?
original_query: select distinct year from cars_data where weight between 3000 and 4000;

question: Find the make and production time of the cars that were produced in the earliest year?
original_query: SELECT T2.Make ,  T1.Year FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T1.Year  =  (SELECT min(YEAR) FROM CARS_DATA);

question: What is the average horsepower for all cars produced before 1980 ?
original_query: select avg(horsepower) from cars_data where year  <  1980;

question: For the cars with 4 cylinders, which model has the largest horsepower?
original_query: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Cylinders  =  4 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the minimum weight of the car with 8 cylinders produced in 1974 ?
original_query: select min(weight) from cars_data where cylinders  =  8 and year  =  1974

question: What is the number of makers of care in France?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.Country  =  T2.CountryId WHERE T2.CountryName  =  'france';

question: In 1980, how many cars were made?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE YEAR  =  1980;

question: What is the maximum accelerate for different number of cylinders?
original_query: SELECT max(Accelerate) ,  Cylinders FROM CARS_DATA GROUP BY Cylinders;

question: How many car makers are there in each continents? List the continent name and the count.
original_query: SELECT T1.Continent ,  count(*) FROM CONTINENTS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.ContId  =  T2.continent JOIN car_makers AS T3 ON T2.CountryId  =  T3.Country GROUP BY T1.Continent;

question: What are the different models created by either the car maker General Motors or weighed more than 3500?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Model  =  T2.Model JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T2.Maker  =  T3.Id JOIN CARS_DATA AS T4 ON T1.MakeId  =  T4.Id WHERE T3.FullName  =  'General Motors' OR T4.weight  >  3500;

question: What is the name of the different car makers who produced a car in 1970?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Maker FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T3 ON T2.model  =  T3.model JOIN CARS_DATA AS T4 ON T3.MakeId  =  T4.id WHERE T4.year  =  '1970';

question: What is the number of continents?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CONTINENTS;

question: What are the different models for the cards produced after 1980?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.model FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.model  =  T2.model JOIN CARS_DATA AS T3 ON T2.MakeId  =  T3.id WHERE T3.year  >  1980;

question: What are the names and ids of all countries with at least one car maker?
original_query: SELECT T1.CountryName ,  T1.CountryId FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.CountryId  =  T2.Country GROUP BY T1.CountryId HAVING count(*)  >=  1;

question: how many cars were produced in 1980?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE YEAR  =  1980;

question: What are all the makers and models?
original_query: SELECT Maker ,  Model FROM MODEL_LIST;

question: What is the model for the car with a weight smaller than the average?
original_query: SELECT T1.model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Weight  <  (SELECT avg(Weight) FROM CARS_DATA)

question: How many car models are produced by each maker ? Only list the count and the maker full name .
original_query: select count(*) ,  t2.fullname from model_list as t1 join car_makers as t2 on t1.maker  =  t2.id group by t2.id;

question: How many models does each car maker produce? List maker full name, id and the number.
original_query: SELECT T1.FullName ,  T1.Id ,  count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id;

question: How many countries has more than 2 car makers ?
original_query: select count(*) from countries as t1 join car_makers as t2 on t1.countryid  =  t2.country group by t1.countryid having count(*)  >  2

question: What is the average edispl for all volvos?
original_query: SELECT avg(T2.edispl) FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T1.Model  =  'volvo';

question: For model volvo, how many cylinders does the car with the least accelerate have?
original_query: SELECT T1.cylinders FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T2.Model  =  'volvo' ORDER BY T1.accelerate ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the number of car models created by the car maker American Motor Company?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker WHERE T1.FullName  =  'American Motor Company';

question: Which models are lighter than 3500 but not built by the 'Ford Motor Company'?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.model FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Model  =  T2.Model JOIN CARS_DATA AS T3 ON T2.MakeId  =  T3.Id JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T4 ON T1.Maker  =  T4.Id WHERE T3.weight  <  3500 AND T4.FullName != 'Ford Motor Company';

question: What is the name of the country with the most car makers?
original_query: SELECT T2.CountryName FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.Country  =  T2.CountryId GROUP BY T1.Country ORDER BY Count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Which distinct car models are the produced after 1980?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.model FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.model  =  T2.model JOIN CARS_DATA AS T3 ON T2.MakeId  =  T3.id WHERE T3.year  >  1980;

question: What are the different years in which there were cars produced that weighed less than 4000 and also cars that weighted more than 3000 ?
original_query: select distinct year from cars_data where weight between 3000 and 4000;

question: Among the cars with more than lowest horsepower, which ones do not have more than 3 cylinders? List the car makeid and make name.
original_query: SELECT T2.MakeId ,  T2.Make FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T1.Horsepower  >  (SELECT min(Horsepower) FROM CARS_DATA) AND T1.Cylinders  <=  3;

question: What is the average horsepower of the cars before 1980?
original_query: SELECT avg(horsepower) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE YEAR  <  1980;

question: How many car models are produced in the usa?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker  =  T2.Id JOIN COUNTRIES AS T3 ON T2.Country  =  T3.CountryId WHERE T3.CountryName  =  'usa';

question: Which makers designed more than 3 car models? List full name and the id.
original_query: SELECT T1.FullName ,  T1.Id FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING count(*)  >  3;

question: What is the smallest weight of the car produced with 8 cylinders on 1974 ?
original_query: select min(weight) from cars_data where cylinders  =  8 and year  =  1974

question: Which model of the car has the minimum horsepower?
original_query: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id ORDER BY T2.horsepower ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the car model with the highest mpg ?
original_query: select t1.model from car_names as t1 join cars_data as t2 on t1.makeid  =  t2.id order by t2.mpg desc limit 1;

question: What is the maximum points of the drivers from a country whose capital is "Dublin"?
original_query: SELECT max(T2.Points) FROM country AS T1 JOIN driver AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country WHERE T1.Capital  =  "Dublin"

question: Count the number of drivers whose points are below 150.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM driver WHERE Points  <  150

question: What is the capital of the country where the driver with the most points is from?
original_query: SELECT T1.Capital FROM country AS T1 JOIN driver AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country ORDER BY T2.Points DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the manager and sponsor for each team and order them by the car owner.
original_query: SELECT Manager ,  Sponsor FROM team ORDER BY Car_Owner

question: How many drivers have points smaller than 150?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM driver WHERE Points  <  150

question: Sort the driver names by age in ascending order.
original_query: SELECT Driver FROM driver ORDER BY Age ASC

question: Find the average age of the drivers from the countries that use "English" as official native language.
original_query: SELECT avg(T2.age) FROM country AS T1 JOIN driver AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country WHERE T1.Official_native_language  =  "English"

question: Find all the countries where some drivers have points above 150.
original_query: SELECT T1.Country FROM country AS T1 JOIN driver AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country WHERE T2.Points  >  150

question: For each driver, return his or her name and country.
original_query: SELECT T2.Driver ,  T1.Country FROM country AS T1 JOIN driver AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country

question: Which make does the most drivers have?
original_query: SELECT Make FROM driver GROUP BY Make ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the average laps of all the drivers who are younger than 20?
original_query: SELECT avg(Laps) FROM driver WHERE age  <  20

question: Show total and average points of all drivers.
original_query: SELECT sum(Points) ,  avg(Points) FROM driver

question: Find the manager and sponsor of the team that has the most drivers.
original_query: SELECT t1.manager ,  t1.sponsor FROM team AS t1 JOIN team_driver AS t2 ON t1.team_id  =  t2.team_id GROUP BY t2.team_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the total and average points of drivers?
original_query: SELECT sum(Points) ,  avg(Points) FROM driver

question: List each make with the number of drivers with that make.
original_query: SELECT Make ,  COUNT(*) FROM driver GROUP BY Make

question: Find the make that has more than one team.
original_query: SELECT make FROM team GROUP BY team HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Which team does not have drivers?
original_query: SELECT Team FROM team WHERE Team_ID NOT IN (SELECT Team_ID FROM team_driver)

question: Find the countries where no driver come from.
original_query: SELECT country FROM country WHERE country_id NOT IN (SELECT country FROM driver)

question: What are the manager and sponsor of the team that has the most drivers?
original_query: SELECT t1.manager ,  t1.sponsor FROM team AS t1 JOIN team_driver AS t2 ON t1.team_id  =  t2.team_id GROUP BY t2.team_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the manager and car owner of the team that has at least 2 drivers?
original_query: SELECT t1.manager ,  t1.car_owner FROM team AS t1 JOIN team_driver AS t2 ON t1.team_id  =  t2.team_id GROUP BY t2.team_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Which countries do not have any drivers?
original_query: SELECT country FROM country WHERE country_id NOT IN (SELECT country FROM driver)

question: Show the maximum points of the drivers from countries with capital "Dublin"
original_query: SELECT max(T2.Points) FROM country AS T1 JOIN driver AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country WHERE T1.Capital  =  "Dublin"

question: List the names of teams that do not have any drivers.
original_query: SELECT Team FROM team WHERE Team_ID NOT IN (SELECT Team_ID FROM team_driver)

question: What are the makes of the teams with car owner "Buddy Arrington"?
original_query: SELECT Make FROM team WHERE Car_Owner  =  "Buddy Arrington"

question: How many drivers are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM driver

question: List the types of engines that are used by at least two drivers.
original_query: SELECT Engine FROM driver GROUP BY Engine HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: List the names of drivers whose constructor is not "Bugatti".
original_query: SELECT Driver_Name FROM driver WHERE CONSTRUCTOR != "Bugatti"

question: Return the maximum and minimum age across drivers.
original_query: SELECT max(Age) ,  min(Age) FROM driver

question: Please list the names of races with drivers aged 26 or older participating.
original_query: SELECT T2.Race_Name FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID WHERE T1.Age  >=  26

question: Count the number of races.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM race

question: What are the names of drivers and the names of the races they took part in?
original_query: SELECT T1.Driver_Name ,  T2.Race_Name FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID

question: What is the most common type of engine?
original_query: SELECT Engine FROM driver GROUP BY Engine ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are names of drivers who did not take part in a race?
original_query: SELECT Driver_Name FROM driver WHERE Driver_ID NOT IN (SELECT Driver_ID FROM race)

question: How many races are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM race

question: Give the different entrant types for drivers at least 20 years old.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Entrant FROM driver WHERE Age  >=  20

question: What are the engine types that are used by two or more drivers?
original_query: SELECT Engine FROM driver GROUP BY Engine HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: Return the winning drivers of races who did not have the pole position of Junior Strous.
original_query: SELECT Winning_driver FROM race WHERE Pole_Position != 'Junior Strous'

question: What are the winning drivers and teams of races, ordered alphabetically by team?
original_query: SELECT Winning_driver ,  Winning_team FROM race ORDER BY Winning_team ASC

question: What are the maximum and minimum age of driver?
original_query: SELECT max(Age) ,  min(Age) FROM driver

question: Who are the constructors of drivers sorted by drivers' age in ascending order?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT CONSTRUCTOR FROM driver ORDER BY Age ASC

question: Find the teams that won more than once.
original_query: SELECT Winning_team FROM race GROUP BY Winning_team HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: What are the names of drivers who had both the pole position James Hinchcliffe and the pole position Carl Skerlong?
original_query: SELECT T1.Driver_Name FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID WHERE Pole_Position  =  "Carl Skerlong" INTERSECT SELECT T1.Driver_Name FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID WHERE Pole_Position  =  "James Hinchcliffe"

question: What are the names of races in which drivers 26 or older took part?
original_query: SELECT T2.Race_Name FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID WHERE T1.Age  >=  26

question: What are the names of drivers, ordered descending alphabetically?
original_query: SELECT Driver_Name FROM driver ORDER BY Driver_Name DESC

question: List the winning drivers and winning teams of races in ascending alphabetical order of winning team.
original_query: SELECT Winning_driver ,  Winning_team FROM race ORDER BY Winning_team ASC

question: How many different engines are used by drivers with age older than 30 or younger than 20?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT Engine) FROM driver WHERE Age  >  30 OR Age  <  20

question: What is the age of the driver who raced in the most races?
original_query: SELECT T1.Age FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID GROUP BY T1.Driver_ID ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find all invoice dates corresponding to customers with first name Astrid and last name Gruber.
original_query: SELECT T2.InvoiceDate FROM CUSTOMER AS T1 JOIN INVOICE AS T2 ON T1.CustomerId  =  T2.CustomerId WHERE T1.FirstName  =  "Astrid" AND LastName  =  "Gruber"

question: What are the names and ids of the different albums, and how many tracks are on each?
original_query: SELECT T1.Title ,  T2.AlbumID ,  COUNT(*) FROM ALBUM AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.AlbumId  =  T2.AlbumId GROUP BY T2.AlbumID

question: What is the average unit price of rock tracks?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.UnitPrice) FROM GENRE AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.GenreId  =  T2.GenreId WHERE T1.Name  =  "Rock"

question: Find the average millisecond length of Latin and Pop tracks.
original_query: SELECT AVG(Milliseconds) FROM GENRE AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.GenreId  =  T2.GenreId WHERE T1.Name  =  "Latin" OR T1.Name  =  "Pop"

question: How many distinct cities does the employees live in?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT city) FROM EMPLOYEE

question: What are the addresses of customers living in Germany who have had an invoice?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Address FROM CUSTOMER AS T1 JOIN INVOICE AS T2 ON T1.CustomerId  =  T2.CustomerId WHERE T1.country  =  "Germany"

question: What are the birth dates of employees living in Edmonton?
original_query: SELECT BirthDate FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE City  =  "Edmonton"

question: What is the name of the media type that is least common across all tracks?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM MEDIATYPE AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.MediaTypeId  =  T2.MediaTypeId GROUP BY T2.MediaTypeId ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Find the full names of employees living in the city of Calgary.
original_query: SELECT FirstName ,  LastName FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE City  =  "Calgary"

question: Please show the employee last names that serves no more than 20 customers.
original_query: SELECT T1.LastName FROM CUSTOMER AS T1 JOIN EMPLOYEE AS T2 ON T1.SupportRepId  =  T2.EmployeeId GROUP BY T1.SupportRepId HAVING COUNT(*)  <=  20

question: Find the name of the artist who made the album "Balls to the Wall".
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ALBUM AS T1 JOIN ARTIST AS T2 ON T1.ArtistId  =  T2.ArtistId WHERE T1.Title  =  "Balls to the Wall"

question: What are the names of tracks that contain the the word you in them?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM TRACK WHERE Name LIKE '%you%'

question: What are the titles of albums by the artist "AC/DC"?
original_query: SELECT Title FROM ALBUM AS T1 JOIN ARTIST AS T2 ON T1.ArtistId  =  T2.ArtistId WHERE T2.Name  =  "AC/DC"

question: How many customers have email that contains "gmail.com"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CUSTOMER WHERE Email LIKE "%gmail.com%"

question: Find the different billing countries for all invoices.
original_query: SELECT distinct(BillingCountry) FROM INVOICE

question: What are the names of artists who have not released any albums?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM ARTIST EXCEPT SELECT T2.Name FROM ALBUM AS T1 JOIN ARTIST AS T2 ON T1.ArtistId  =  T2.ArtistId

question: What is the average unit price of all the tracks?
original_query: SELECT AVG(UnitPrice) FROM TRACK

question: What are the durations of the longest and the shortest tracks in milliseconds?
original_query: SELECT max(Milliseconds) ,  min(Milliseconds) FROM TRACK

question: What are the last names of customers without invoice totals exceeding 20?
original_query: SELECT LastName FROM CUSTOMER EXCEPT SELECT T1.LastName FROM CUSTOMER AS T1 JOIN Invoice AS T2 ON T1.CustomerId  =  T2.CustomerId WHERE T2.total  >  20

question: Count the number of tracks that are of the media type "AAC audio file".
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEDIATYPE AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.MediaTypeId  =  T2.MediaTypeId WHERE T1.Name  =  "AAC audio file"

question: Find the distinct unit prices for tracks.
original_query: SELECT distinct(UnitPrice) FROM TRACK

question: Find the full names of employees who help customers with the first name Leonie.
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName ,  T2.LastName FROM CUSTOMER AS T1 JOIN EMPLOYEE AS T2 ON T1.SupportRepId  =  T2.EmployeeId WHERE T1.FirstName  =  "Leonie"

question: Find the average unit price of jazz tracks.
original_query: SELECT AVG(UnitPrice) FROM GENRE AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.GenreId  =  T2.GenreId WHERE T1.Name  =  "Jazz"

question: Please list the name and id of all artists that have at least 3 albums in alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name ,  T1.ArtistId FROM ALBUM AS T1 JOIN ARTIST AS T2 ON T1.ArtistId  =  T2.ArtistID GROUP BY T1.ArtistId HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  3 ORDER BY T2.Name

question: How many artists do not have any album?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM ARTIST WHERE artistid NOT IN(SELECT artistid FROM ALBUM)

question: What are the invoice dates for customers with the first name Astrid and the last name Gruber?
original_query: SELECT T2.InvoiceDate FROM CUSTOMER AS T1 JOIN INVOICE AS T2 ON T1.CustomerId  =  T2.CustomerId WHERE T1.FirstName  =  "Astrid" AND LastName  =  "Gruber"

question: Please show the employee first names and ids of employees who serve at least 10 customers.
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName ,  T1.SupportRepId FROM CUSTOMER AS T1 JOIN EMPLOYEE AS T2 ON T1.SupportRepId  =  T2.EmployeeId GROUP BY T1.SupportRepId HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  10

question: Cound the number of artists who have not released an album.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM ARTIST WHERE artistid NOT IN(SELECT artistid FROM ALBUM)

question: What are the distinct billing countries of the invoices?
original_query: SELECT distinct(BillingCountry) FROM INVOICE

question: Find the cities corresponding to employees who help customers with the postal code 70174.
original_query: SELECT T2.City FROM CUSTOMER AS T1 JOIN EMPLOYEE AS T2 ON T1.SupportRepId  =  T2.EmployeeId WHERE T1.PostalCode  =  "70174"

question: What are the first names and support rep ids for employees serving 10 or more customers?
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName ,  T1.SupportRepId FROM CUSTOMER AS T1 JOIN EMPLOYEE AS T2 ON T1.SupportRepId  =  T2.EmployeeId GROUP BY T1.SupportRepId HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  10

question: What is the first name and last name employee helps the customer with first name Leonie?
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName ,  T2.LastName FROM CUSTOMER AS T1 JOIN EMPLOYEE AS T2 ON T1.SupportRepId  =  T2.EmployeeId WHERE T1.FirstName  =  "Leonie"

question: Find the full name of the customer with the email "luisg@embraer.com.br".
original_query: SELECT FirstName ,  LastName FROM CUSTOMER WHERE Email  =  "luisg@embraer.com.br"

question: Find the average unit price of tracks from the Rock genre.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.UnitPrice) FROM GENRE AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.GenreId  =  T2.GenreId WHERE T1.Name  =  "Rock"

question: What are the album titles for albums containing both 'Reggae' and 'Rock' genre tracks?
original_query: SELECT T1.Title FROM Album AS T1 JOIN Track AS T2 ON T1.AlbumId  =  T2.AlbumId JOIN Genre AS T3 ON T2.GenreID  =  T3.GenreID WHERE T3.Name  =  'Reggae' INTERSECT SELECT T1.Title FROM Album AS T1 JOIN Track AS T2 ON T1.AlbumId  =  T2.AlbumId JOIN Genre AS T3 ON T2.GenreID  =  T3.GenreID WHERE T3.Name  =  'Rock'

question: What are the names of artist who have the letter 'a' in their names?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM ARTIST WHERE Name LIKE "%a%"

question: How many albums are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM ALBUM

question: Find the first names of all customers that live in Brazil and have an invoice.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.FirstName FROM CUSTOMER AS T1 JOIN INVOICE AS T2 ON T1.CustomerId  =  T2.CustomerId WHERE T1.country  =  "Brazil"

question: Find the titles of albums that contain tracks of both the Reggae and Rock genres.
original_query: SELECT T1.Title FROM Album AS T1 JOIN Track AS T2 ON T1.AlbumId  =  T2.AlbumId JOIN Genre AS T3 ON T2.GenreID  =  T3.GenreID WHERE T3.Name  =  'Reggae' INTERSECT SELECT T1.Title FROM Album AS T1 JOIN Track AS T2 ON T1.AlbumId  =  T2.AlbumId JOIN Genre AS T3 ON T2.GenreID  =  T3.GenreID WHERE T3.Name  =  'Rock'

question: What are the phone numbers for each employee?
original_query: SELECT Phone FROM EMPLOYEE

question: Which artist does the album "Balls to the Wall" belong to?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ALBUM AS T1 JOIN ARTIST AS T2 ON T1.ArtistId  =  T2.ArtistId WHERE T1.Title  =  "Balls to the Wall"

question: What is the least common media type in all tracks?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM MEDIATYPE AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.MediaTypeId  =  T2.MediaTypeId GROUP BY T2.MediaTypeId ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Find the distinct locations that has a cinema.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT LOCATION FROM cinema

question: What are all the locations with a cinema?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT LOCATION FROM cinema

question: Show the average, minimum, and maximum capacity for all the cinemas opened in year 2011 or later.
original_query: SELECT avg(capacity) ,  min(capacity) ,  max(capacity) FROM cinema WHERE openning_year  >=  2011

question: Who are all the directors?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT directed_by FROM film

question: Count the number of films whose title contains the word 'Dummy'.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM film WHERE title LIKE "%Dummy%"

question: What are the title and director of the films without any schedule?
original_query: SELECT title ,  directed_by FROM film WHERE film_id NOT IN (SELECT film_id FROM schedule)

question: Show all directors.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT directed_by FROM film

question: Show cinema name, film title, date, and price for each record in schedule.
original_query: SELECT T3.name ,  T2.title ,  T1.date ,  T1.price FROM schedule AS T1 JOIN film AS T2 ON T1.film_id  =  T2.film_id JOIN cinema AS T3 ON T1.cinema_id  =  T3.cinema_id

question: Count the number of cinemas.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM cinema

question: List all directors along with the number of films directed by each director.
original_query: SELECT directed_by ,  count(*) FROM film GROUP BY directed_by

question: What is the location with the most cinemas opened in year 2010 or later?
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM cinema WHERE openning_year  >=  2010 GROUP BY LOCATION ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the locations that have more than one movie theater with capacity above 300.
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM cinema WHERE capacity  >  300 GROUP BY LOCATION HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Which locations have 2 or more cinemas with capacity over 300?
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM cinema WHERE capacity  >  300 GROUP BY LOCATION HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Show the cinema name and location for cinemas with capacity above average.
original_query: SELECT name ,  LOCATION FROM cinema WHERE capacity  >  (SELECT avg(capacity) FROM cinema)

question: Show the title and director for all films.
original_query: SELECT title ,  directed_by FROM film

question: Which city has hosted the most events?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN hosting_city AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.host_city GROUP BY T2.host_city ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give me the temperature of Shanghai in January.
original_query: SELECT T2.Jan FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.city_id WHERE T1.city = "Shanghai"

question: In February, which city marks the highest temperature?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id ORDER BY T2.Feb DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the venue of the competition "1994 FIFA World Cup qualification" hosted by "Nanjing ( Jiangsu )"?
original_query: SELECT T3.venue FROM city AS T1 JOIN hosting_city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.host_city JOIN MATCH AS T3 ON T2.match_id = T3.match_id WHERE T1.city = "Nanjing ( Jiangsu )" AND T3.competition = "1994 FIFA World Cup qualification"

question: Which cities' temperature in March is lower than that in July or higher than that in Oct?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id WHERE T2.Mar  <  T2.Jul OR T2.Mar  >  T2.Oct

question: Which cities served as a host city after 2010?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN hosting_city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.host_city WHERE T2.year  >  2010

question: Give me a list of cities whose temperature in Feb is higher than that in Jun or cities that were once host cities?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id WHERE T2.Feb  >  T2.Jun UNION SELECT T3.city FROM city AS T3 JOIN hosting_city AS T4 ON T3.city_id  =  T4.host_city

question: What is the host year of city "Taizhou ( Zhejiang )"?
original_query: SELECT T2.year FROM city AS T1 JOIN hosting_city AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.host_city WHERE T1.city  =  "Taizhou ( Zhejiang )"

question: Which cities have higher temperature in Feb than in Jun or have once served as host cities?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id WHERE T2.Feb  >  T2.Jun UNION SELECT T3.city FROM city AS T3 JOIN hosting_city AS T4 ON T3.city_id  =  T4.host_city

question: Find the city that hosted the most events.
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN hosting_city AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.host_city GROUP BY T2.host_city ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which cities have served as host cities more than once? Return me their GDP and population.
original_query: SELECT t1.gdp ,  t1.Regional_Population FROM city AS T1 JOIN hosting_city AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.host_city GROUP BY t2.Host_City HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Give me a list of cities whose temperature in Mar is lower than that in Dec and which have never been host cities.
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id WHERE T2.Mar  <  T2.Dec EXCEPT SELECT T3.city FROM city AS T3 JOIN hosting_city AS T4 ON T3.city_id  =  T4.host_city

question: Please give me a list of cities whose regional population is over 8000000 or under 5000000.
original_query: SELECT city FROM city WHERE regional_population  >  10000000 UNION SELECT city FROM city WHERE regional_population  <  5000000

question: Which cities have regional population above 8000000 or below 5000000?
original_query: SELECT city FROM city WHERE regional_population  >  10000000 UNION SELECT city FROM city WHERE regional_population  <  5000000

question: Find the cities which were once a host city after 2010?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN hosting_city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.host_city WHERE T2.year  >  2010

question: Find the venue of the competition "1994 FIFA World Cup qualification" which was hosted by "Nanjing ( Jiangsu )".
original_query: SELECT T3.venue FROM city AS T1 JOIN hosting_city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.host_city JOIN MATCH AS T3 ON T2.match_id = T3.match_id WHERE T1.city = "Nanjing ( Jiangsu )" AND T3.competition = "1994 FIFA World Cup qualification"

question: Find the number of matches in different competitions.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  Competition FROM MATCH GROUP BY Competition

question: Please give me a list of cities whose regional population is over 10000000.
original_query: SELECT city FROM city WHERE regional_population  >  10000000

question: Which three cities have the largest regional population?
original_query: SELECT city FROM city ORDER BY regional_population DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which cities have regional population above 10000000?
original_query: SELECT city FROM city WHERE regional_population  >  10000000

question: What are the names of the climbers, ordered by points descending?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM climber ORDER BY Points DESC

question: Count the number of climbers.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM climber

question: How many climbers are from each country?
original_query: SELECT Country ,  COUNT(*) FROM climber GROUP BY Country

question: What is the name of the highest mountain?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM mountain ORDER BY Height DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of climbers and the corresponding names of mountains that they climb?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T2.Name FROM climber AS T1 JOIN mountain AS T2 ON T1.Mountain_ID  =  T2.Mountain_ID

question: What are the names of climbers who are not from the country of Switzerland?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM climber WHERE Country != "Switzerland"

question: Show the countries that have mountains with height more than 5600 stories and mountains with height less than 5200.
original_query: SELECT Country FROM mountain WHERE Height  >  5600 INTERSECT SELECT Country FROM mountain WHERE Height  <  5200

question: What are the names of mountains that have a height of over 5000 or a prominence of over 1000?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM mountain WHERE Height  >  5000 OR Prominence  >  1000

question: How many climbers are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM climber

question: What are the different ranges of the 3 mountains with the highest prominence?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Range FROM mountain ORDER BY Prominence DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the maximum point for climbers whose country is United Kingdom?
original_query: SELECT max(Points) FROM climber WHERE Country  =  "United Kingdom"

question: What are the names of countains that no climber has climbed?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM mountain WHERE Mountain_ID NOT IN (SELECT Mountain_ID FROM climber)

question: Show the distinct names of mountains climbed by climbers from country "West Germany".
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Name FROM climber AS T1 JOIN mountain AS T2 ON T1.Mountain_ID  =  T2.Mountain_ID WHERE T1.Country  =  "West Germany"

question: What are the different names of mountains ascended by climbers from the country of West Germany?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Name FROM climber AS T1 JOIN mountain AS T2 ON T1.Mountain_ID  =  T2.Mountain_ID WHERE T1.Country  =  "West Germany"

question: What is the height of the mountain climbined by the climbing who had the most points?
original_query: SELECT T2.Height FROM climber AS T1 JOIN mountain AS T2 ON T1.Mountain_ID  =  T2.Mountain_ID ORDER BY T1.Points DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the height of the mountain climbed by the climber with the maximum points.
original_query: SELECT T2.Height FROM climber AS T1 JOIN mountain AS T2 ON T1.Mountain_ID  =  T2.Mountain_ID ORDER BY T1.Points DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the times used by climbers to climb mountains in Country Uganda.
original_query: SELECT T1.Time FROM climber AS T1 JOIN mountain AS T2 ON T1.Mountain_ID  =  T2.Mountain_ID WHERE T2.Country  =  "Uganda"

question: Return the countries of the mountains that have a height larger than 5000.
original_query: SELECT Country FROM mountain WHERE Height  >  5000

question: List the names of climbers in descending order of points.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM climber ORDER BY Points DESC

question: What are the countries that have both mountains that are higher than 5600 and lower than 5200?
original_query: SELECT Country FROM mountain WHERE Height  >  5600 INTERSECT SELECT Country FROM mountain WHERE Height  <  5200

question: Find each student's first name.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT fname FROM student

question: Which club has the most members majoring in "600"?
original_query: SELECT t1.clubname FROM club AS t1 JOIN member_of_club AS t2 ON t1.clubid  =  t2.clubid JOIN student AS t3 ON t2.stuid  =  t3.stuid WHERE t3.major  =  "600" GROUP BY t1.clubname ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the name of the club that has the most female students.
original_query: SELECT t1.clubname FROM club AS t1 JOIN member_of_club AS t2 ON t1.clubid  =  t2.clubid JOIN student AS t3 ON t2.stuid  =  t3.stuid WHERE t3.sex  =  "F" GROUP BY t1.clubname ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For how many clubs is "Tracy Kim" a member?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM club AS t1 JOIN member_of_club AS t2 ON t1.clubid  =  t2.clubid JOIN student AS t3 ON t2.stuid  =  t3.stuid WHERE t3.fname  =  "Tracy" AND t3.lname  =  "Kim"

question: Retrieve the average age of members of the club "Tennis Club".
original_query: SELECT avg(t3.age) FROM club AS t1 JOIN member_of_club AS t2 ON t1.clubid  =  t2.clubid JOIN student AS t3 ON t2.stuid  =  t3.stuid WHERE t1.clubname  =  "Tennis Club"

question: How many clubs does "Linda Smith" belong to?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM club AS t1 JOIN member_of_club AS t2 ON t1.clubid  =  t2.clubid JOIN student AS t3 ON t2.stuid  =  t3.stuid WHERE t3.fname  =  "Linda" AND t3.lname  =  "Smith"

question: Find the name of all the clubs at "AKW".
original_query: SELECT clubname FROM club WHERE clublocation  =  "AKW"

question: Where is the club "Hopkins Student Enterprises" located?

question: Who are the members of the club named "Bootup Baltimore"? Give me their last names.

question: Who is the "CTO" of club "Hopkins Student Enterprises"? Show the first name and last name.

question: Who is the president of the club "Bootup Baltimore"? Give me the first and last name.

question: Find all the female members of club "Bootup Baltimore". Show the first name and last name.
original_query: SELECT t3.fname ,  t3.lname FROM club AS t1 JOIN member_of_club AS t2 ON t1.clubid  =  t2.clubid JOIN student AS t3 ON t2.stuid  =  t3.stuid WHERE t1.clubname  =  "Bootup Baltimore" AND t3.sex  =  "F"

question: Count the number of members in club "Bootup Baltimore" whose age is above 18.

question: Which clubs have one or more members from the city with code "BAL"? Give me the names of the clubs.

question: What are the first and last name of the president of the club "Bootup Baltimore"?
