question: How many people have membership in the club "Pen and Paper Gaming"?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM club AS t1 JOIN member_of_club AS t2 ON t1.clubid  =  t2.clubid JOIN student AS t3 ON t2.stuid  =  t3.stuid WHERE t1.clubname  =  "Pen and Paper Gaming"

question: Find all the male members of club "Hopkins Student Enterprises". Show the first name and last name.
original_query: SELECT t3.fname ,  t3.lname FROM club AS t1 JOIN member_of_club AS t2 ON t1.clubid  =  t2.clubid JOIN student AS t3 ON t2.stuid  =  t3.stuid WHERE t1.clubname  =  "Hopkins Student Enterprises" AND t3.sex  =  "M"

question: Give me the first name and last name for all the female members of the club "Bootup Baltimore".
original_query: SELECT t3.fname ,  t3.lname FROM club AS t1 JOIN member_of_club AS t2 ON t1.clubid  =  t2.clubid JOIN student AS t3 ON t2.stuid  =  t3.stuid WHERE t1.clubname  =  "Bootup Baltimore" AND t3.sex  =  "F"

question: Find the number of members of club "Pen and Paper Gaming".
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM club AS t1 JOIN member_of_club AS t2 ON t1.clubid  =  t2.clubid JOIN student AS t3 ON t2.stuid  =  t3.stuid WHERE t1.clubname  =  "Pen and Paper Gaming"

question: Show the names of club leaders that joined their club before 2018.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name ,  T2.Club_Name FROM club_leader AS T1 JOIN club AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID JOIN member AS T3 ON T1.Member_ID  =  T3.Member_ID WHERE T1.Year_Join  <  2018

question: Show the names of club leaders of clubs with overall ranking higher than 100.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name ,  T2.Club_Name FROM club_leader AS T1 JOIN club AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID JOIN member AS T3 ON T1.Member_ID  =  T3.Member_ID WHERE T2.Overall_Ranking  <  100

question: Show the nations that have both members older than 22 and members younger than 19.
original_query: SELECT Nationality FROM member WHERE Age  >  22 INTERSECT SELECT Nationality FROM member WHERE Age  <  19

question: Show the names of club leaders and the names of clubs they joined.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name ,  T2.Club_Name FROM club_leader AS T1 JOIN club AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID JOIN member AS T3 ON T1.Member_ID  =  T3.Member_ID

question: Show the names of members whose age is either 19 or 20.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM member WHERE Age  =  19 OR Age  =  20

question: List the names of members that are not club leaders.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM member WHERE Member_ID NOT IN (SELECT Member_ID FROM club_leader)

question: List the names of members in ascending order of age.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM member ORDER BY Age ASC

question: List the names of members whose nationality is not `` England '' .
original_query: select name from member where nationality != "england"

question: What are the average score and average staff number of all shops?
original_query: SELECT avg(num_of_staff) ,  avg(score) FROM shop

question: Find the purchase time, age and address of each member, and show the results in the order of purchase time.
original_query: SELECT Time_of_purchase ,  age ,  address FROM member ORDER BY Time_of_purchase

question: Find the id and address of the shops whose score is below the average score.
original_query: SELECT shop_id ,  address FROM shop WHERE score  <  (SELECT avg(score) FROM shop)

question: Which months have more than 2 happy hours?
original_query: SELECT MONTH FROM happy_hour GROUP BY MONTH HAVING count(*)  >  2

question: Find the number of members living in each address.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  address FROM member GROUP BY address

question: Which membership card has more than 5 members?
original_query: SELECT Membership_card FROM member GROUP BY Membership_card HAVING count(*)  >  5

question: How many members are not living in Hartford?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM member WHERE address != 'Hartford'

question: Find the address and staff number of the shops that do not have any happy hour.
original_query: SELECT address ,  num_of_staff FROM shop WHERE shop_id NOT IN (SELECT shop_id FROM happy_hour)

question: Find the ids and names of members who are under age 30 or with black membership card.
original_query: SELECT name ,  member_id FROM member WHERE Membership_card  =  'Black' OR age  <  30

question: Find the first name and gpa of the students whose gpa is lower than the average gpa of all students.
original_query: SELECT stu_fname ,  stu_gpa FROM student WHERE stu_gpa  <  (SELECT avg(stu_gpa) FROM student)

question: What are the codes of all the courses that are located in room KLR209?
original_query: SELECT class_code FROM CLASS WHERE class_room  =  'KLR209'

question: Find the first names of all instructors who have taught some course and the course description.
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname ,  T3.crs_description FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.prof_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.crs_code  =  T3.crs_code

question: What is the last name of the student who got a grade A in the class with code 10018.
original_query: SELECT T1.stu_lname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num WHERE T2.enroll_grade  =  'A' AND T2.class_code  =  10018

question: What are the names of all students taking a course who received an A or C?
original_query: SELECT T1.stu_fname ,  T1.stu_lname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num WHERE T2.enroll_grade  =  'C' OR T2.enroll_grade  =  'A'

question: What is the first name of the student whose last name starts with the letter S and is taking ACCT-211?
original_query: SELECT T1.stu_fname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num JOIN CLASS AS T3 ON T2.class_code  =  T3.class_code WHERE T3.crs_code  =  'ACCT-211' AND T1.stu_lname LIKE 'S%'

question: How many classes are held in each department?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  dept_code FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.crs_code  =  T2.crs_code GROUP BY dept_code

question: What are the first and last names of the employee with the earliest date of birth?
original_query: SELECT emp_fname ,  emp_lname FROM employee ORDER BY emp_dob LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the department that offers a course that has a description including the word "Statistics"?
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name FROM course AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code WHERE T1.crs_description LIKE '%Statistics%'

question: Find the number of classes in each department.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  dept_code FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.crs_code  =  T2.crs_code GROUP BY dept_code

question: Find the first names and offices of all instructors who have taught some course and the course description and the department name.
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname ,  T4.prof_office ,  T3.crs_description ,  T5.dept_name FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.prof_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.crs_code  =  T3.crs_code JOIN professor AS T4 ON T2.emp_num  =  T4.emp_num JOIN department AS T5 ON T4.dept_code  =  T5.dept_code

question: How many sections does course ACCT-211 has?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT class_section) FROM CLASS WHERE crs_code  =  'ACCT-211'

question: Find the name, address, number of students in the departments that have the top 3 highest number of students.
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name ,  T2.dept_address ,  count(*) FROM student AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code GROUP BY T1.dept_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the first names and offices of all professors sorted by alphabetical order of their first name.
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname ,  T1.prof_office FROM professor AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num ORDER BY T2.emp_fname

question: Find the number of students for each department.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  dept_code FROM student GROUP BY dept_code

question: Find the description and credit for the course QM-261?
original_query: SELECT crs_credit ,  crs_description FROM course WHERE crs_code  =  'QM-261'

question: How many departments does the college has?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dept_name) FROM department

question: What is the number of professors for different school?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.school_code FROM department AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code GROUP BY T1.school_code

question: Find the max, average, and minimum gpa of all students in each department.
original_query: SELECT max(stu_gpa) ,  avg(stu_gpa) ,  min(stu_gpa) ,  dept_code FROM student GROUP BY dept_code

question: What are the first names of student who only took one course?
original_query: SELECT T1.stu_fname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num GROUP BY T2.stu_num HAVING count(*)  =  1

question: For each classroom with at least 2 classes, how many classes are offered?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  class_room FROM CLASS GROUP BY class_room HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: How many different classes are there?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT class_code) FROM CLASS

question: What are the first names of all teachers who have taught a course and the corresponding descriptions?
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname ,  T3.crs_description FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.prof_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.crs_code  =  T3.crs_code

question: What is the highest, lowest, and average student GPA for every department?
original_query: SELECT max(stu_gpa) ,  avg(stu_gpa) ,  min(stu_gpa) ,  dept_code FROM student GROUP BY dept_code

question: What is the first name and GPA of every student that has a GPA lower than average?
original_query: SELECT stu_fname ,  stu_gpa FROM student WHERE stu_gpa  <  (SELECT avg(stu_gpa) FROM student)

question: What is the name of the department with the most students enrolled?
original_query: SELECT T4.dept_name FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.crs_code  =  T3.crs_code JOIN department AS T4 ON T3.dept_code  =  T4.dept_code GROUP BY T3.dept_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the first names, office locations of all lecturers who have taught some course?
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname ,  T4.prof_office ,  T3.crs_description FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.prof_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.crs_code  =  T3.crs_code JOIN professor AS T4 ON T2.emp_num  =  T4.emp_num

question: How many credits does the department offer?
original_query: SELECT sum(crs_credit) ,  dept_code FROM course GROUP BY dept_code

question: How many courses are offered?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT crs_code) FROM CLASS

question: How many classes does the professor whose last name is Graztevski teach?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM employee AS T1 JOIN CLASS AS T2 ON T1.EMP_NUM  =  T2.PROF_NUM WHERE T1.EMP_LNAME  =  'Graztevski'

question: How many classes exist for each school?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T3.school_code FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.crs_code  =  T2.crs_code JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code GROUP BY T3.school_code

question: How many professors who has a either Ph.D. or MA degree?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM professor WHERE prof_high_degree  =  'Ph.D.' OR prof_high_degree  =  'MA'

question: What are the first names of the professors who do not teach a class.
original_query: SELECT emp_fname FROM employee WHERE emp_jobcode  =  'PROF' EXCEPT SELECT T1.emp_fname FROM employee AS T1 JOIN CLASS AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.prof_num

question: How many students enrolled in class ACCT-211?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code WHERE T1.crs_code  =  'ACCT-211'

question: What is the last name and office of the professor from the history department?
original_query: SELECT T1.emp_lname ,  T2.prof_office FROM employee AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code WHERE T3.dept_name  =  'History'

question: What are the first names and date of birth of professors teaching course ACCT-211?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.EMP_FNAME ,  T1.EMP_DOB FROM employee AS T1 JOIN CLASS AS T2 ON T1.EMP_NUM  =  T2.PROF_NUM WHERE CRS_CODE  =  "ACCT-211"

question: What is the first name of the professor who is teaching CIS-220 and QM-261?
original_query: SELECT T1.emp_fname FROM employee AS T1 JOIN CLASS AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.prof_num WHERE crs_code  =  'CIS-220' INTERSECT SELECT T1.emp_fname FROM employee AS T1 JOIN CLASS AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.prof_num WHERE crs_code  =  'QM-261'

question: How many different locations does the school with code BUS has?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dept_address) FROM department WHERE school_code  =  'BUS'

question: What are the names of all departments in alphabetical order?
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM department ORDER BY dept_name

question: What is the name of department where has the smallest number of professors?
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name FROM professor AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code GROUP BY T1.dept_code ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: What is the first name of the student whose last name starting with the letter S and is taking ACCT-211 class?
original_query: SELECT T1.stu_fname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num JOIN CLASS AS T3 ON T2.class_code  =  T3.class_code WHERE T3.crs_code  =  'ACCT-211' AND T1.stu_lname LIKE 'S%'

question: What are the first names of all professors who teach more than one class?
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.prof_num  =  T2.emp_num GROUP BY T1.prof_num HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Which department has the highest average student GPA, and what is the average gpa?
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name ,  avg(T1.stu_gpa) FROM student AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code GROUP BY T1.dept_code ORDER BY avg(T1.stu_gpa) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many credits does course CIS-220 have, and what its description?
original_query: SELECT crs_credit ,  crs_description FROM course WHERE crs_code  =  'CIS-220'

question: How many different departments are there?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dept_name) FROM department

question: What are the first names of all employees that are professors ordered by date of birth?
original_query: SELECT emp_fname FROM employee WHERE emp_jobcode  =  'PROF' ORDER BY emp_dob

question: How many courses are offered by the Computer Info. Systems department?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM department AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code WHERE dept_name  =  "Computer Info. Systems"

question: What is the count and code of the job with the most employee?
original_query: SELECT emp_jobcode ,  count(*) FROM employee GROUP BY emp_jobcode ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the total credits of all classes offered by each department.
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.crs_credit) ,  T1.dept_code FROM course AS T1 JOIN CLASS AS T2 ON T1.crs_code  =  T2.crs_code GROUP BY T1.dept_code

question: How many students are enrolled in some classes that are taught by an accounting professor?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.crs_code  =  T3.crs_code JOIN department AS T4 ON T3.dept_code  =  T4.dept_code WHERE T4.dept_name  =  'Accounting'

question: What is the department name of the students with lowest gpa belongs to?
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name FROM student AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code ORDER BY stu_gpa LIMIT 1

question: What is the first name of students who got grade C in any class?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT stu_fname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num WHERE enroll_grade  =  'C'

question: What are the course codes for every class that the student with the last name Smithson took?
original_query: SELECT T1.crs_code FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code JOIN student AS T3 ON T3.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num WHERE T3.stu_lname  =  'Smithson'

question: What are the first names of all students in course ACCT-211?
original_query: SELECT T3.stu_fname FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.stu_num  =  T3.stu_num WHERE T1.crs_code  =  'ACCT-211'

question: What is the last name of the student who received an A in the class with the code 10018?
original_query: SELECT T1.stu_lname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num WHERE T2.enroll_grade  =  'A' AND T2.class_code  =  10018

question: What are the different first names and highest degree attained for professors teaching in the Computer Information Systems department?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.emp_fname ,  T3.prof_high_degree FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.prof_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN professor AS T3 ON T2.emp_num  =  T3.emp_num JOIN department AS T4 ON T4.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code WHERE T4.dept_name  =  'Computer Info. Systems'

question: Find the name of department that offers the class whose description has the word "Statistics".
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name FROM course AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code WHERE T1.crs_description LIKE '%Statistics%'

question: What are the names of all students who took a class and the corresponding course descriptions?
original_query: SELECT T1.stu_fname ,  T1.stu_lname ,  T4.crs_description FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num JOIN CLASS AS T3 ON T2.class_code  =  T3.class_code JOIN course AS T4 ON T3.crs_code  =  T4.crs_code

question: How many different locations does each school have?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dept_address) ,  school_code FROM department GROUP BY school_code

question: What is the name of the department and office location for the professor with the last name of Heffington?
original_query: SELECT T3.dept_name  ,  T2.prof_office FROM employee AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code WHERE T1.emp_lname  =  'Heffington'

question: Find the number of classes offered for all class rooms that held at least 2 classes.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  class_room FROM CLASS GROUP BY class_room HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What are the first names of all students who took ACCT-211 and received a C?
original_query: SELECT T3.stu_fname FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.stu_num  =  T3.stu_num WHERE T1.crs_code  =  'ACCT-211' AND T2.enroll_grade  =  'C'

question: What are the number of different course codes?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT crs_code) FROM CLASS

question: Find the first names of students who took exactly one class.
original_query: SELECT T1.stu_fname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num GROUP BY T2.stu_num HAVING count(*)  =  1

question: Find the first names and offices of all instructors who have taught some course and also find the course description.
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname ,  T4.prof_office ,  T3.crs_description FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.prof_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.crs_code  =  T3.crs_code JOIN professor AS T4 ON T2.emp_num  =  T4.emp_num

question: Find names of all students who took some course and got A or C.
original_query: SELECT T1.stu_fname ,  T1.stu_lname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num WHERE T2.enroll_grade  =  'C' OR T2.enroll_grade  =  'A'

question: What is the number of different class sections offered in the course ACCT-211?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT class_section) FROM CLASS WHERE crs_code  =  'ACCT-211'

question: How many schools are there in the department?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT school_code) FROM department

question: What are the first names of all students who got a grade C in a class?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT stu_fname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num WHERE enroll_grade  =  'C'

question: Which school has the fewest professors?
original_query: SELECT T1.school_code FROM department AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code GROUP BY T1.school_code ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: What is the description for the CIS-220 and how many credits does it have?
original_query: SELECT crs_credit ,  crs_description FROM course WHERE crs_code  =  'CIS-220'

question: What is the first names of the professors from the history department who do not teach a class.
original_query: SELECT T1.emp_fname FROM employee AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code WHERE T3.dept_name  =  'History' EXCEPT SELECT T4.emp_fname FROM employee AS T4 JOIN CLASS AS T5 ON T4.emp_num  =  T5.prof_num

question: What are the different locations of the school with the code BUS?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dept_address) FROM department WHERE school_code  =  'BUS'

question: What is the name and the average gpa of department whose students have the highest average gpa?
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name ,  avg(T1.stu_gpa) FROM student AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code GROUP BY T1.dept_code ORDER BY avg(T1.stu_gpa) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total number of professors with a Ph.D. ?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM professor WHERE prof_high_degree  =  'Ph.D.'

question: Count different addresses of each school.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dept_address) ,  school_code FROM department GROUP BY school_code

question: What is the name of the department that has the largest number of students enrolled?
original_query: SELECT T4.dept_name FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.crs_code  =  T3.crs_code JOIN department AS T4 ON T3.dept_code  =  T4.dept_code GROUP BY T3.dept_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: what is the address of history department?
original_query: SELECT dept_address FROM department WHERE dept_name  =  'History'

question: list names of all departments ordered by their names.
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM department ORDER BY dept_name

question: What is the name of the department with the fewest professors?
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name FROM professor AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code GROUP BY T1.dept_code ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: Find the total number of employees.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM employee

question: What is the first and last name of the youngest student with a GPA above 3, and what is their GPA?
original_query: SELECT stu_fname ,  stu_lname ,  stu_gpa FROM student WHERE stu_gpa  >  3 ORDER BY stu_dob DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which department has the highest average instructor salary?
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM instructor GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY avg(salary) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the titles for courses with two prerequisites?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM course AS T1 JOIN prereq AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id GROUP BY T2.course_id HAVING count(*)  =  2

question: What are the names of students who have taken the prerequisite for the course International Finance?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM student AS T1 JOIN takes AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.id WHERE T2.course_id IN (SELECT T4.prereq_id FROM course AS T3 JOIN prereq AS T4 ON T3.course_id  =  T4.course_id WHERE T3.title  =  'International Finance')

question: Give the name of the highest paid instructor.
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor ORDER BY salary DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the id of instructors who didn't teach any courses?
original_query: SELECT id FROM instructor EXCEPT SELECT id FROM teaches

question: Find the names of instructors who didn't each any courses in any Spring semester.
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM teaches WHERE semester  =  'Spring')

question: What are the names of students who took a course in the Fall of 2003?
original_query: SELECT name FROM student WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM takes WHERE semester  =  'Fall' AND YEAR  =  2003)

question: Which department has the lowest budget?
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM department ORDER BY budget LIMIT 1

question: What are the ids of instructors who taught in the Fall of 2009 but not in the Spring of 2010?
original_query: SELECT id FROM teaches WHERE semester  =  'Fall' AND YEAR  =  2009 EXCEPT SELECT id FROM teaches WHERE semester  =  'Spring' AND YEAR  =  2010

question: What are the greatest and average capacity for rooms in each building?
original_query: SELECT max(capacity) ,  avg(capacity) ,  building FROM classroom GROUP BY building

question: How many different instructors have taught some course?
original_query: SELECT COUNT (DISTINCT id) FROM teaches

question: What are the ids for courses in the Fall of 2009 or the Spring of 2010?
original_query: SELECT course_id FROM SECTION WHERE semester  =  'Fall' AND YEAR  =  2009 UNION SELECT course_id FROM SECTION WHERE semester  =  'Spring' AND YEAR  =  2010

question: Give the name of the lowest earning instructor in the Statistics department.
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE dept_name  =  'Statistics' ORDER BY salary LIMIT 1

question: Count the number of rooms in Lamberton with capacity lower than 50.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM classroom WHERE building  =  'Lamberton' AND capacity  <  50

question: Give the title of the course offered in Chandler during the Fall of 2010.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM course AS T1 JOIN SECTION AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id WHERE building  =  'Chandler' AND semester  =  'Fall' AND YEAR  =  2010

question: Find the name and salary of the instructors who are advisors of any student from History department?
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T2.salary FROM advisor AS T1 JOIN instructor AS T2 ON T1.i_id  =  T2.id JOIN student AS T3 ON T1.s_id  =  T3.id WHERE T3.dept_name  =  'History'

question: What is the name of the instructor who advises the student with the greatest number of total credits?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM advisor AS T1 JOIN instructor AS T2 ON T1.i_id  =  T2.id JOIN student AS T3 ON T1.s_id  =  T3.id ORDER BY T3.tot_cred DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the student who has the highest total credits in the History department.
original_query: SELECT name FROM student WHERE dept_name  =  'History' ORDER BY tot_cred DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the year and semester with the most courses?
original_query: SELECT semester ,  YEAR FROM SECTION GROUP BY semester ,  YEAR ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the year which offers the largest number of courses.
original_query: SELECT YEAR FROM SECTION GROUP BY YEAR ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the id of instructors who taught a class in Fall 2009 but not in Spring 2010.
original_query: SELECT id FROM teaches WHERE semester  =  'Fall' AND YEAR  =  2009 EXCEPT SELECT id FROM teaches WHERE semester  =  'Spring' AND YEAR  =  2010

question: Find the minimum salary for the departments whose average salary is above the average payment of all instructors.
original_query: SELECT min(salary) ,  dept_name FROM instructor GROUP BY dept_name HAVING avg(salary)  >  (SELECT avg(salary) FROM instructor)

question: Find names of instructors with salary greater than that of some (at least one) instructor in the Biology department.
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE salary  >  (SELECT min(salary) FROM instructor WHERE dept_name  =  'Biology')

question: Give the name and building of the departments with greater than average budget.
original_query: SELECT dept_name ,  building FROM department WHERE budget  >  (SELECT avg(budget) FROM department)

question: Count the number of courses in the Physics department.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT course_id) FROM course WHERE dept_name  =  'Physics'

question: What are the names and salaries of instructors who advises students in the History department?
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T2.salary FROM advisor AS T1 JOIN instructor AS T2 ON T1.i_id  =  T2.id JOIN student AS T3 ON T1.s_id  =  T3.id WHERE T3.dept_name  =  'History'

question: How many departments offer courses?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dept_name) FROM course

question: Find the title of course that is provided by Statistics but not Psychology departments.
original_query: SELECT title FROM course WHERE dept_name  =  'Statistics' EXCEPT SELECT title FROM course WHERE dept_name  =  'Psychology'

question: Find the name of the students who have more than one advisor?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM student AS T1 JOIN advisor AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.s_id GROUP BY T2.s_id HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Give the title of the prerequisite to the course International Finance.
original_query: SELECT title FROM course WHERE course_id IN (SELECT T1.prereq_id FROM prereq AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id WHERE T2.title  =  'International Finance')

question: What are the names of the instructors in the Comp. Sci. department who earn more than 80000?
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE dept_name  =  'Comp. Sci.'  AND salary  >  80000

question: How many rooms does the Lamberton building have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM classroom WHERE building  =  'Lamberton'

question: How many students have advisors?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT s_id) FROM advisor

question: Find the name of the department that offers the highest total credits?
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM course GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY sum(credits) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Count the number of courses without prerequisites.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM course WHERE course_id NOT IN (SELECT course_id FROM prereq)

question: Find the total number of students and total number of instructors for each department.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T2.id) ,  count(DISTINCT T3.id) ,  T3.dept_name FROM department AS T1 JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.dept_name  =  T2.dept_name JOIN instructor AS T3 ON T1.dept_name  =  T3.dept_name GROUP BY T3.dept_name

question: Find the name of students who took some course offered by Statistics department.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM course AS T1 JOIN takes AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.id WHERE T1.dept_name  =  'Statistics'

question: What is the name and building of the departments whose budget is more than the average budget?
original_query: SELECT dept_name ,  building FROM department WHERE budget  >  (SELECT avg(budget) FROM department)

question: what is the name of the instructor who is in Statistics department and earns the lowest salary?
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE dept_name  =  'Statistics' ORDER BY salary LIMIT 1

question: Find the names of all instructors whose salary is greater than the salary of all instructors in the Biology department.
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE salary  >  (SELECT max(salary) FROM instructor WHERE dept_name  =  'Biology')

question: Find the name of students who have taken the prerequisite course of the course with title International Finance.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM student AS T1 JOIN takes AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.id WHERE T2.course_id IN (SELECT T4.prereq_id FROM course AS T3 JOIN prereq AS T4 ON T3.course_id  =  T4.course_id WHERE T3.title  =  'International Finance')

question: List in alphabetic order the names of all distinct instructors.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM  instructor ORDER BY name

question: How many courses are provided in each semester and year?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  semester ,  YEAR FROM SECTION GROUP BY semester ,  YEAR

question: Find the name of the students and their department names sorted by their total credits in ascending order.
original_query: SELECT name ,  dept_name FROM student ORDER BY tot_cred

question: What are the names of students who haven't taken any Biology courses?
original_query: SELECT name FROM student WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT T1.id FROM takes AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id WHERE T2.dept_name  =  'Biology')

question: Who is the instructor with the highest salary?
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor ORDER BY salary DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of all instructors with names that include "dar"?
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE name LIKE '%dar%'

question: What are the titles of courses without prerequisites?
original_query: SELECT title FROM course WHERE course_id NOT IN (SELECT course_id FROM prereq)

question: How many rooms in each building have a capacity of over 50?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  building FROM classroom WHERE capacity  >  50 GROUP BY building

question: Find courses that ran in Fall 2009 and in Spring 2010.
original_query: SELECT course_id FROM SECTION WHERE semester  =  'Fall' AND YEAR  =  2009 INTERSECT SELECT course_id FROM SECTION WHERE semester  =  'Spring' AND YEAR  =  2010

question: What is the sum of budgets of the Marketing and Finance departments?
original_query: SELECT sum(budget) FROM department WHERE dept_name  =  'Marketing' OR dept_name  =  'Finance'

question: What are the names and budgets of departments with budgets greater than the average?
original_query: SELECT dept_name ,  budget FROM department WHERE budget  >  (SELECT avg(budget) FROM department)

question: Find the names of the top 3 departments that provide the largest amount of courses?
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM course GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the names of all instructors who have taught some course and the course_id.
original_query: SELECT name ,  course_id FROM instructor AS T1 JOIN teaches AS T2 ON T1.ID  =  T2.ID

question: Give id of the instructor who advises students in the History department.
original_query: SELECT i_id FROM advisor AS T1 JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.s_id  =  T2.id WHERE T2.dept_name  =  'History'

question: Find the number of rooms with more than 50 capacity for each building.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  building FROM classroom WHERE capacity  >  50 GROUP BY building

question: Find the total number of students in each department.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  dept_name FROM student GROUP BY dept_name

question: Find the number and averaged salary of all instructors who are in the department with the highest budget.
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.salary) ,  count(*) FROM instructor AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_name  =  T2.dept_name ORDER BY T2.budget DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of instructors who didn't teach?
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM teaches)

question: What are the room numbers and corresponding buildings for classrooms which can seat between 50 to 100 students?
original_query: SELECT building ,  room_number FROM classroom WHERE capacity BETWEEN 50 AND 100

question: Find the names of students who have taken any course in the fall semester of year 2003.
original_query: SELECT name FROM student WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM takes WHERE semester  =  'Fall' AND YEAR  =  2003)

question: How many courses that do not have prerequisite?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM course WHERE course_id NOT IN (SELECT course_id FROM prereq)

question: Give the title and credits for the course that is taught in the classroom with the greatest capacity.
original_query: SELECT T3.title ,  T3.credits FROM classroom AS T1 JOIN SECTION AS T2 ON T1.building  =  T2.building AND T1.room_number  =  T2.room_number JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id  =  T3.course_id WHERE T1.capacity  =  (SELECT max(capacity) FROM classroom)

question: Find the salaries of all distinct instructors that are less than the largest salary.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT salary FROM instructor WHERE salary  <  (SELECT max(salary) FROM instructor)

question: Find the number of courses provided in each semester and year.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  semester ,  YEAR FROM SECTION GROUP BY semester ,  YEAR

question: What are the ids of courses without prerequisites?
original_query: SELECT course_id FROM course EXCEPT SELECT course_id FROM prereq

question: Given the titles of all courses, in order of titles and credits.
original_query: SELECT title FROM course ORDER BY title ,  credits

question: What are the names of courses without prerequisites?
original_query: SELECT title FROM course WHERE course_id NOT IN (SELECT course_id FROM prereq)

question: Find the names of all instructors whose name includes the substring “dar”.
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE name LIKE '%dar%'

question: List the information of all instructors ordered by their salary in ascending order.
original_query: SELECT * FROM instructor ORDER BY salary

question: What is the title of the course with Differential Geometry as a prerequisite?
original_query: SELECT title FROM course WHERE course_id IN (SELECT T1.course_id FROM prereq AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.prereq_id  =  T2.course_id WHERE T2.title  =  'Differential Geometry')

question: Find the name and building of the department with the highest budget.
original_query: SELECT dept_name ,  building FROM department ORDER BY budget DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the title, credit value, and department name for courses with more than one prerequisite?
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T1.credits , T1.dept_name FROM course AS T1 JOIN prereq AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id GROUP BY T2.course_id HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: list in alphabetic order all course names and their instructors' names in year 2008.
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T3.name FROM course AS T1 JOIN teaches AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id JOIN instructor AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.id WHERE YEAR  =  2008 ORDER BY T1.title

question: Find the name and salary of instructors who are advisors of the students from the Math department.
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T2.salary FROM advisor AS T1 JOIN instructor AS T2 ON T1.i_id  =  T2.id JOIN student AS T3 ON T1.s_id  =  T3.id WHERE T3.dept_name  =  'Math'

question: Find the names of all instructors in computer science department
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE dept_name  =  'Comp. Sci.'

question: Find the building, room number, semester and year of all courses offered by Psychology department sorted by course titles.
original_query: SELECT T2.building ,  T2.room_number ,  T2.semester ,  T2.year FROM course AS T1 JOIN SECTION AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id WHERE T1.dept_name  =  'Psychology' ORDER BY T1.title

question: What are the names of instructors who earn more than at least one instructor from the Biology department?
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE salary  >  (SELECT min(salary) FROM instructor WHERE dept_name  =  'Biology')

question: Find the total number of instructors who teach a course in the Spring 2010 semester.
original_query: SELECT COUNT (DISTINCT ID) FROM teaches WHERE semester  =  'Spring' AND YEAR  =  2010

question: Find the title of course that is provided by both Statistics and Psychology departments.
original_query: SELECT title FROM course WHERE dept_name  =  'Statistics' INTERSECT SELECT title FROM course WHERE dept_name  =  'Psychology'

question: What is the title of a course that is listed in both the Statistics and Psychology departments?
original_query: SELECT title FROM course WHERE dept_name  =  'Statistics' INTERSECT SELECT title FROM course WHERE dept_name  =  'Psychology'

question: What are the names and average salaries for departments with average salary higher than 42000?
original_query: SELECT dept_name ,  AVG (salary) FROM instructor GROUP BY dept_name HAVING AVG (salary)  >  42000

question: What is the lowest salary in departments with average salary greater than the overall average.
original_query: SELECT min(salary) ,  dept_name FROM instructor GROUP BY dept_name HAVING avg(salary)  >  (SELECT avg(salary) FROM instructor)

question: What are the names of students who have taken Statistics courses?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM course AS T1 JOIN takes AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.id WHERE T1.dept_name  =  'Statistics'

question: What are the maximum and minumum grade points?
original_query: SELECT max(gradepoint) ,  min(gradepoint) FROM GRADECONVERSION

question: Which courses are taught on days MTW?
original_query: SELECT CName FROM COURSE WHERE Days  =  "MTW"

question: Find the last name of female (sex is F) students in the descending order of age.
original_query: SELECT LName FROM STUDENT WHERE Sex  =  "F" ORDER BY Age DESC

question: What is the average gradepoint for students with the last name Smith?
original_query: SELECT avg(T2.gradepoint) FROM ENROLLED_IN AS T1 JOIN GRADECONVERSION AS T2 JOIN STUDENT AS T3 ON T1.Grade  =  T2.lettergrade AND T1.StuID  =  T3.StuID WHERE T3.LName  =  "Smith"

question: Give the maximum and minimum gradepoints for students living in NYC?
original_query: SELECT max(T2.gradepoint) ,  min(T2.gradepoint) FROM ENROLLED_IN AS T1 JOIN GRADECONVERSION AS T2 JOIN STUDENT AS T3 ON T1.Grade  =  T2.lettergrade AND T1.StuID  =  T3.StuID WHERE T3.city_code  =  "NYC"

question: What are the first and last names of the instructors who teach the top 3 number of courses?
original_query: SELECT T2.Fname ,  T2.Lname FROM COURSE AS T1 JOIN FACULTY AS T2 ON T1.Instructor  =  T2.FacID GROUP BY T1.Instructor ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the name of the department that has the fewest members.
original_query: SELECT T1.DName FROM DEPARTMENT AS T1 JOIN MEMBER_OF AS T2 ON T1.DNO  =  T2.DNO GROUP BY T2.DNO ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many departments are in the division AS?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE Division  =  "AS"

question: Find the full names of faculties who are members of department with department number 520.
original_query: SELECT T1.Fname ,  T1.Lname FROM FACULTY AS T1 JOIN MEMBER_OF AS T2 ON T1.FacID  =  T2.FacID WHERE T2.DNO  =  520

question: Give the building that the instructor who teaches the greatest number of courses lives in.
original_query: SELECT T2.Building FROM COURSE AS T1 JOIN FACULTY AS T2 ON T1.Instructor  =  T2.FacID GROUP BY T1.Instructor ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the full names and gradepoints for all enrollments?
original_query: SELECT T3.Fname ,  T3.LName ,  T2.gradepoint FROM ENROLLED_IN AS T1 JOIN GRADECONVERSION AS T2 JOIN STUDENT AS T3 ON T1.Grade  =  T2.lettergrade AND T1.StuID  =  T3.StuID

question: Find the average grade point of student whose last name is Smith.
original_query: SELECT avg(T2.gradepoint) FROM ENROLLED_IN AS T1 JOIN GRADECONVERSION AS T2 JOIN STUDENT AS T3 ON T1.Grade  =  T2.lettergrade AND T1.StuID  =  T3.StuID WHERE T3.LName  =  "Smith"

question: What are the rooms for members of the faculty who are professors and who live in building NEB?
original_query: SELECT Room FROM FACULTY WHERE Rank  =  "Professor" AND Building  =  "NEB"

question: What are the last names of female students, ordered by age descending?
original_query: SELECT LName FROM STUDENT WHERE Sex  =  "F" ORDER BY Age DESC

question: How many students have had at least one "B" grade?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT StuID) FROM ENROLLED_IN WHERE Grade  =  "B"

question: What are the name of courses that have at least five enrollments?
original_query: SELECT T1.CName FROM COURSE AS T1 JOIN ENROLLED_IN AS T2 ON T1.CID  =  T2.CID GROUP BY T2.CID HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  5

question: What are the distinct first names for students with a grade point of 3.8 or above in at least one course?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Fname FROM ENROLLED_IN AS T1 JOIN GRADECONVERSION AS T2 JOIN STUDENT AS T3 ON T1.Grade  =  T2.lettergrade AND T1.StuID  =  T3.StuID WHERE T2.gradepoint  >=  3.8

question: What are the course names for courses taught on MTW?
original_query: SELECT CName FROM COURSE WHERE Days  =  "MTW"

question: What are the first names and last names of the students that minor in the department with DNO 140.
original_query: SELECT T2.Fname ,  T2.Lname FROM MINOR_IN AS T1 JOIN STUDENT AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.StuID WHERE T1.DNO  =  140

question: How many courses have more than 2 credits?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM COURSE WHERE Credits  >  2

question: Find the first names of faculties of rank Professor in alphabetic order.
original_query: SELECT Fname FROM FACULTY WHERE Rank  =  "Professor" ORDER BY Fname

question: Find the last names of faculties who are members of computer science department.
original_query: SELECT T2.Lname FROM DEPARTMENT AS T1 JOIN FACULTY AS T2 ON T1.DNO  =  T3.DNO JOIN MEMBER_OF AS T3 ON T2.FacID  =  T3.FacID WHERE T1.DName  =  "Computer Science"

question: What are the first names of students, ordered by age from greatest to least?
original_query: SELECT Fname FROM STUDENT ORDER BY Age DESC

question: What are the full names of students minoring in department 140?
original_query: SELECT T2.Fname ,  T2.Lname FROM MINOR_IN AS T1 JOIN STUDENT AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.StuID WHERE T1.DNO  =  140

question: What are the names of departments either in division AS, or in division EN and in building NEB?

question: Find the name of the department that has the biggest number of students minored in?
original_query: SELECT T1.DName FROM DEPARTMENT AS T1 JOIN MINOR_IN AS T2 ON T1.DNO  =  T2.DNO GROUP BY T2.DNO ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the rooms of faculties with rank professor who live in building NEB.

question: What is the name of the department with the most students minoring in it?

question: What are the course names, ordered by credits?

question: Find the rank of the faculty that the fewest faculties belong to.

question: Find the name of the department that has no students minored in?

question: What is the name of the department htat has no students minoring in it?
original_query: SELECT DName FROM DEPARTMENT EXCEPT SELECT T1.DName FROM DEPARTMENT AS T1 JOIN MINOR_IN AS T2 ON T1.DNO  =  T2.DNO

question: Find the number of students that have at least one grade "B".
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT StuID) FROM ENROLLED_IN WHERE Grade  =  "B"

question: Find the max and min grade point for all letter grade.
original_query: SELECT max(gradepoint) ,  min(gradepoint) FROM GRADECONVERSION

question: What are the last names of faculty in building Barton, sorted by last name?
original_query: SELECT Lname FROM FACULTY WHERE Building  =  "Barton" ORDER BY Lname

original_query: SELECT DPhone FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE Room  =  268

question: Find the department name and room of the course INTRODUCTION TO COMPUTER SCIENCE.
original_query: SELECT T2.Dname ,  T2.Room FROM COURSE AS T1 JOIN DEPARTMENT AS T2 ON T1.DNO  =  T2.DNO WHERE T1.CName  =  "INTRODUCTION TO COMPUTER SCIENCE"

question: List all department names ordered by their starting date.
original_query: SELECT dname FROM department ORDER BY mgr_start_date

question: Return the first names and last names of employees who earn more than 30000 in salary.
original_query: SELECT fname ,  lname FROM employee WHERE salary  >  30000

question: Find the names of departments that are located in Houston.
original_query: SELECT t1.dname FROM department AS t1 JOIN dept_locations AS t2 ON t1.dnumber  =  t2.dnumber WHERE t2.dlocation  =  'Houston'

question: Show the names of employees that work for companies with sales bigger than 200.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM employment AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID JOIN company AS T3 ON T1.Company_ID  =  T3.Company_ID WHERE T3.Sales_in_Billion  >  200

original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM company WHERE Headquarters  =  'USA'

question: List the names of companies by ascending number of sales.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM company ORDER BY Sales_in_Billion ASC

question: List the names of people that are not employed by any company
original_query: SELECT Name FROM people WHERE People_ID NOT IN (SELECT People_ID FROM employment)

question: Show the names of companies in the banking or retailing industry?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM company WHERE Industry  =  "Banking" OR Industry  =  "Retailing"

question: Show the names of companies and the number of employees they have
original_query: SELECT T3.Name ,  COUNT(*) FROM employment AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID JOIN company AS T3 ON T1.Company_ID  =  T3.Company_ID GROUP BY T3.Name

original_query: SELECT name ,  Assets_billion FROM Companies ORDER BY name ASC

question: List the names of companies in descending order of market value.

original_query: SELECT Headquarters FROM Companies GROUP BY Headquarters HAVING COUNT(*)  >  2

question: Please show the names of the buildings whose status is "on-hold", in ascending order of stories.

question: Show the industries shared by companies whose headquarters are "USA" and companies whose headquarters are "China".
original_query: SELECT Industry FROM Companies WHERE Headquarters  =  "USA" INTERSECT SELECT Industry FROM Companies WHERE Headquarters  =  "China"

question: What are the name and assets of each company, sorted in ascending order of company name?

question: Which building has the largest number of company offices? Give me the building name.

question: Show the stadium name and the number of concerts in each stadium.

original_query: SELECT song_name FROM singer WHERE age  >  (SELECT avg(age) FROM singer)

question: What are the names of the singers who performed in a concert in 2014?

question: Show countries where a singer above age 40 and a singer below 30 are from.
original_query: SELECT country FROM singer WHERE age  >  40 INTERSECT SELECT country FROM singer WHERE age  <  30

question: What is the name and capacity of the stadium with the most concerts after 2013 ?
original_query: select t2.name ,  t2.capacity from concert as t1 join stadium as t2 on t1.stadium_id  =  t2.stadium_id where t1.year  >  2013 group by t2.stadium_id order by count(*) desc limit 1

question: Show the conference name and year and the number of participants for each conference.

question: What are the names and locations of the universities that did not have any staff participating in any conferences in 2004?
original_query: SELECT T1.Institution_Name ,  T1.location FROM institution AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.institution_id  =  T2.institution_id WHERE T2.staff_id NOT IN (SELECT T4.staff_id FROM Conference AS T3 JOIN Conference_participation AS T4 ON T3.conference_id  =  T4.conference_id WHERE T3.year  =  2004)

question: What are the staff names who participated in conferences between 2003 or 2004?

original_query: SELECT T1.Institution_Name ,  T1.location FROM institution AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.institution_id  =  T2.institution_id WHERE T2.staff_id NOT IN (SELECT T4.staff_id FROM Conference AS T3 JOIN Conference_participation AS T4 ON T3.conference_id  =  T4.conference_id WHERE T3.year  =  2004)

question: Show all staff names who have been both speaker and sponsor in some conference.

question: List the names of countries that do not have any official language.

question: Return the maximum and minimum health scores across all countries other than Norway.
original_query: SELECT max(health_score) ,  min(health_score) FROM countries WHERE name != "Norway"

question: What are the names of the official languages, sorted descending by the average overall scores across the countries that correspond to each?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM countries AS T1 JOIN official_languages AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.country_id JOIN languages AS T3 ON T2.language_id  =  T3.id GROUP BY T3.id ORDER BY avg(T1.overall_score) DESC

question: Show the official languages sorted in descending order by the average overall scores among countries speaking them.

question: Return the names of langauges that contain the substring "ish".

question: Show the name of the country that has the greatest number of official languages.

question: Show the names of languages that are the official language for both countries with overall score greater than 95 and countries with overall score less than than 90.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM countries AS T1 JOIN official_languages AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.country_id JOIN languages AS T3 ON T2.language_id  =  T3.id WHERE T1.overall_score  >  95 INTERSECT SELECT T3.name FROM countries AS T1 JOIN official_languages AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.country_id JOIN languages AS T3 ON T2.language_id  =  T3.id WHERE T1.overall_score  <  90

question: Show the average overall scores of countries whose official language is "English".

question: How many counties are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM county_public_safety

question: What are the names of cities that are in the county with the most police officers?
original_query: SELECT name FROM city WHERE county_ID  =  (SELECT county_ID FROM county_public_safety ORDER BY Police_officers DESC LIMIT 1)

question: What are the names of the teachers whose courses have not been arranged?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM teacher WHERE Teacher_id NOT IN (SELECT Teacher_id FROM course_arrange)

question: What are the names of the people who teach math courses?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID  =  T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T3.Teacher_ID WHERE T2.Course  =  "Math"

question: Show names of teachers and the courses they are arranged to teach.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name ,  T2.Course FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID  =  T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T3.Teacher_ID

question: What is the most commmon hometowns for teachers?
original_query: SELECT Hometown FROM teacher GROUP BY Hometown ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For each hometown, how many teachers are there?
original_query: SELECT Hometown ,  COUNT(*) FROM teacher GROUP BY Hometown

question: Show different hometown of teachers and the number of teachers from each hometown.
original_query: SELECT Hometown ,  COUNT(*) FROM teacher GROUP BY Hometown

question: Show the hometowns shared by at least two teachers.
original_query: SELECT Hometown FROM teacher GROUP BY Hometown HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: What are the names of the teachers and how many courses do they teach?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name ,  COUNT(*) FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN teacher AS T2 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T2.Teacher_ID GROUP BY T2.Name

question: What are the age and hometown of teachers?
original_query: SELECT Age ,  Hometown FROM teacher

question: List the names of teachers who have not been arranged to teach courses.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM teacher WHERE Teacher_id NOT IN (SELECT Teacher_id FROM course_arrange)

question: Show the name of the teacher for the math course.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID  =  T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T3.Teacher_ID WHERE T2.Course  =  "Math"

question: What are the names of the teachers and the courses they teach in ascending alphabetical order by the name of the teacher?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name ,  T2.Course FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID  =  T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T3.Teacher_ID ORDER BY T3.Name

question: What are the names of the teachers ordered by ascending age?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM teacher ORDER BY Age ASC

question: Show names of teachers that teach at least two courses.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN teacher AS T2 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T2.Teacher_ID GROUP BY T2.Name HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: What are the towns from which at least two teachers come from?
original_query: SELECT Hometown FROM teacher GROUP BY Hometown HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: Which shipping agent shipped the most documents? List the shipping agent name and the number of documents.
original_query: SELECT Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_name , count(Documents.document_id) FROM Ref_Shipping_Agents JOIN Documents ON Documents.shipping_agent_code = Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_code GROUP BY Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_code ORDER BY count(Documents.document_id) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the role of the employee named Koby?
original_query: SELECT T1.role_description FROM ROLES AS T1 JOIN Employees AS T2 ON T1.role_code = T2.role_code WHERE T2.employee_name = "Koby";

question: What are all role codes?
original_query: SELECT role_code FROM ROLES;

question: What are the shipping agent names?
original_query: SELECT shipping_agent_name FROM Ref_Shipping_Agents;

question: List document id of documents status is done and document type is Paper and the document is shipped by shipping agent named USPS.
original_query: SELECT document_id FROM Documents WHERE document_status_code  =  "done" AND document_type_code = "Paper" INTERSECT SELECT document_id FROM Documents JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents ON Documents.shipping_agent_code = Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_code WHERE Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_name = "USPS";

question: What document status codes do we have?
original_query: SELECT document_status_code FROM Ref_Document_Status;

question: Which documents have more than 1 draft copies? List document id and number of draft copies.
original_query: SELECT document_id , count(*) FROM Draft_Copies GROUP BY document_id HAVING count(*)  >  1;

question: What is the document status description of the document with id 1?
original_query: SELECT Ref_Document_Status.document_status_description FROM Ref_Document_Status JOIN Documents ON Documents.document_status_code = Ref_Document_Status.document_status_code WHERE Documents.document_id = 1;

question: Which document has the most draft copies? List its document id and number of draft copies.
original_query: SELECT document_id , count(copy_number) FROM Draft_Copies GROUP BY document_id ORDER BY count(copy_number) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: List the document ids of documents with the status done and type Paper, which not shipped by the shipping agent named USPS.
original_query: SELECT document_id FROM Documents WHERE document_status_code  =  "done" AND document_type_code = "Paper" EXCEPT SELECT document_id FROM Documents JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents ON Documents.shipping_agent_code = Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_code WHERE Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_name = "USPS";

question: What is the mail date of the document with id 7?
original_query: SELECT mailing_date FROM Documents_Mailed WHERE document_id = 7;

question: What address was the document with id 4 mailed to?
original_query: SELECT Addresses.address_details FROM Addresses JOIN Documents_Mailed ON Documents_Mailed.mailed_to_address_id = Addresses.address_id WHERE document_id = 4;

question: List the employees who have not showed up in any circulation history of documents. List the employee's name.

question: For each document, list the number of employees who have showed up in the circulation history of that document. List the document ids and number of employees.
original_query: SELECT document_id ,  count(DISTINCT employee_id) FROM Circulation_History GROUP BY document_id;

question: Which document has between 2 and 4 number of documents ? List the document id and the number of related documents .

question: For each document object id, how many collections does it belong to?

question: List document that have more than one child. List the document id.
original_query: SELECT T2.Document_Object_ID FROM Document_Objects AS T1 JOIN Document_Objects AS T2 ON T1.Parent_Document_Object_ID = T2.Document_Object_ID GROUP BY T2.Document_Object_ID HAVING count(*)  >  1;

question: List id of documents that in document subset Best for 2000 and collection named Best.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Document_Object_ID FROM Document_Subset_Members AS T1 JOIN Document_Subsets AS T2 ON T1.Document_Subset_ID =  T2.Document_Subset_ID JOIN Documents_in_Collections AS T3 ON T1.Document_Object_ID  =  T3.Document_Object_ID JOIN Collections AS T4 ON T3.Collection_ID  =  T4.Collection_ID WHERE T2.Document_Subset_Name = "Best for 2000" AND T4.Collection_Name = "Best";

question: What is the owner of document with the Description 'Braeden Collection'?

question: List id of documents that in document subset Best for 2000 or in collection named Best.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Document_Object_ID FROM Document_Subset_Members AS T1 JOIN Document_Subsets AS T2 ON T1.Document_Subset_ID =  T2.Document_Subset_ID JOIN Documents_in_Collections AS T3 ON T1.Document_Object_ID  =  T3.Document_Object_ID JOIN Collections AS T4 ON T3.Collection_ID  =  T4.Collection_ID WHERE T2.Document_Subset_Name = "Best for 2000" OR T4.Collection_Name = "Best";

original_query: SELECT Collection_Subset_Name FROM Collection_Subsets;

question: Which collection is not the parent of other collection? List the collection's name.
original_query: SELECT Collection_Name FROM Collections EXCEPT SELECT T2.Collection_Name FROM Collections AS T1 JOIN Collections AS T2 ON T1.Parent_Collection_ID = T2.Collection_ID;

question: How many collections does each document belong to? List the count and the document id.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T2.Document_Object_ID FROM Collections AS T1 JOIN Documents_in_Collections AS T2 ON T1.Collection_ID = T2.Collection_ID GROUP BY T2.Document_Object_ID

question: What are the different descriptions of all the parent documents?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Description FROM Document_Objects AS T1 JOIN Document_Objects AS T2 ON T1.Parent_Document_Object_ID = T2.Document_Object_ID

question: How many child documents does each parent document has? List the document id and the number.
original_query: SELECT T2.Document_Object_ID ,  count(*) FROM Document_Objects AS T1 JOIN Document_Objects AS T2 ON T1.Parent_Document_Object_ID = T2.Document_Object_ID GROUP BY T2.Document_Object_ID;

question: Which document has least number of related documents? List the document id and the number of related documents.
original_query: SELECT Document_Object_ID , count(*) FROM Document_Subset_Members GROUP BY Document_Object_ID ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Which collection subset does collection name Best in? List collection subset name.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Collection_Subset_Name FROM Collection_Subsets AS T1 JOIN Collection_Subset_Members AS T2 ON T1.Collection_Subset_ID =  T2.Collection_Subset_ID JOIN Collections AS T3 ON T2.Collection_ID =  T3.Collection_ID WHERE T3.Collection_Name = "Best";

question: For ever collection named 'Best', what is the name and id of the one with the most documents, and how many documents does it have?
original_query: SELECT T1.Collection_Name ,  T1.Collection_ID ,  count(*) FROM Collections AS T1 JOIN Documents_in_Collections AS T2 ON T1.Collection_ID = T2.Collection_ID WHERE T1.Collection_Name = "Best" GROUP BY T1.Collection_ID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the count of documents owned by Marlin?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Document_Objects WHERE OWNER = "Marlin";

question: What is the parent document of document owned by Marlin? List the document id.
original_query: SELECT Parent_Document_Object_ID FROM Document_Objects WHERE OWNER  =  'Marlin'

question: How many collections that are related to collection named Best?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.Related_Collection_ID) FROM Collection_Subset_Members AS T1 JOIN Collections AS T2 ON T1.Collection_ID  =  T2.Collection_ID WHERE T2.Collection_Name = "Best";

question: What are the collection subset ids, names, and number of collections for each subset?
original_query: SELECT T2.Collection_Subset_ID ,  T1.Collection_Subset_Name ,  count(*) FROM Collection_Subsets AS T1 JOIN Collection_Subset_Members AS T2 ON T1.Collection_Subset_ID =  T2.Collection_Subset_ID GROUP BY T2.Collection_Subset_ID;

question: What are the document object ids of the related to the document owned by Ransom ?
original_query: select t1.document_object_id from document_subset_members as t1 join document_objects as t2 on t1.document_object_id  =  t2.document_object_id where t2.owner  =  'ransom'

question: For document subset named 'Best for 2000', List all document id that in this subset.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Document_Object_ID FROM Document_Subset_Members AS T1 JOIN Document_Subsets AS T2 ON T1.Document_Subset_ID =  T2.Document_Subset_ID WHERE T2.Document_Subset_Name = "Best for 2000";

question: What are the collection subsets that the collection named 'Best' in?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Collection_Subset_Name FROM Collection_Subsets AS T1 JOIN Collection_Subset_Members AS T2 ON T1.Collection_Subset_ID =  T2.Collection_Subset_ID JOIN Collections AS T3 ON T2.Collection_ID =  T3.Collection_ID WHERE T3.Collection_Name = "Best";

question: What is the detail of document subset with name 'Best for 2000'?
original_query: SELECT Document_Subset_Details FROM Document_Subsets WHERE Document_Subset_Name = "Best for 2000";

question: What is the description of collection named Best?
original_query: SELECT Collection_Description FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = "Best";

question: What is the subset id, name, and number of different documents for each subset?
original_query: SELECT T1.Document_Subset_ID ,  T2.Document_Subset_Name , count(DISTINCT T1.Document_Object_ID) FROM Document_Subset_Members AS T1 JOIN Document_Subsets AS T2 ON T1.Document_Subset_ID =  T2.Document_Subset_ID GROUP BY T1.Document_Subset_ID;

question: List all documents's subset. List the subset's name.
original_query: SELECT Document_Subset_Name FROM Document_Subsets;

question: What is the unique description of every parent document?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Description FROM Document_Objects AS T1 JOIN Document_Objects AS T2 ON T1.Parent_Document_Object_ID = T2.Document_Object_ID

question: What are the different document ids that are in the subset named 'Best for 2000' or in the collection named 'Best'?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Document_Object_ID FROM Document_Subset_Members AS T1 JOIN Document_Subsets AS T2 ON T1.Document_Subset_ID =  T2.Document_Subset_ID JOIN Documents_in_Collections AS T3 ON T1.Document_Object_ID  =  T3.Document_Object_ID JOIN Collections AS T4 ON T3.Collection_ID  =  T4.Collection_ID WHERE T2.Document_Subset_Name = "Best for 2000" OR T4.Collection_Name = "Best";

question: List id of documents that in collection named Best but not in document subset Best for 2000.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Document_Object_ID FROM Collections AS T1 JOIN Documents_in_Collections AS T2 ON T1.Collection_ID = T2.Collection_ID WHERE T1.Collection_Name = "Best" EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT T3.Document_Object_ID FROM Document_Subset_Members AS T3 JOIN Document_Subsets AS T4 ON T3.Document_Subset_ID =  T4.Document_Subset_ID WHERE T4.Document_Subset_Name = "Best for 2000"

question: List the document id of all documents in collection named Best.
original_query: SELECT T2.Document_Object_ID FROM Collections AS T1 JOIN Documents_in_Collections AS T2 ON T1.Collection_ID = T2.Collection_ID WHERE T1.Collection_Name = "Best";

question: What are the owners of the document objects described as the 'Braeden Collection'?
original_query: SELECT OWNER FROM Document_Objects WHERE Description  =  'Braeden Collection'

question: What are the ids of the documents that have more than one child?
original_query: SELECT T2.Document_Object_ID FROM Document_Objects AS T1 JOIN Document_Objects AS T2 ON T1.Parent_Document_Object_ID = T2.Document_Object_ID GROUP BY T2.Document_Object_ID HAVING count(*)  >  1;

question: Which collection have most number of documents? List collection name, id and number of documents.
original_query: SELECT T1.Collection_Name ,  T1.Collection_ID ,  count(*) FROM Collections AS T1 JOIN Documents_in_Collections AS T2 ON T1.Collection_ID = T2.Collection_ID WHERE T1.Collection_Name = "Best" GROUP BY T1.Collection_ID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Which document subset has most of number of distinct documents ? List subset id , name and number of documents .
original_query: select t1.document_subset_id ,  t2.document_subset_name , count(distinct t1.document_object_id) from document_subset_members as t1 join document_subsets as t2 on t1.document_subset_id =  t2.document_subset_id group by t1.document_subset_id order by count(*) desc limit 1;

question: How many child collection does the collection named Best has?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Collections AS T1 JOIN Collections AS T2 ON T1.Parent_Collection_ID = T2.Collection_ID WHERE T2.Collection_Name = "Best";

question: List the biographical data of the students who never had a detention or student loan .
original_query: select bio_data from students where student_id not in (select t1.student_id from students as t1 join detention as t2 on t1.student_id  =  t2.student_id union select t1.student_id from students as t1 join student_loans as t2 on t1.student_id  =  t2.student_id)

question: When was the earliest date of loan?
original_query: SELECT date_of_loan FROM Student_Loans ORDER BY date_of_loan ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which students have gone through any event? List the students' biographical data and event date.

question: What are the loan amounts and loan dates of the students who have at least 2 achievements?
original_query: SELECT amount_of_loan ,  date_of_loan FROM Student_Loans WHERE student_id IN ( SELECT student_id FROM Achievements GROUP BY student_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2 )

question: What are the biographical data and student id of the students who either took two or more classes and or have less than two detentions?
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data ,  T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2 UNION SELECT T1.bio_data ,  T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Detention AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*)  <  2

question: Which students take 2 courses? List student id and details.

question: Which student is taking the most courses? Give me the id of the student and the number of courses he or she is taking.
