original_query: SELECT T1.achievement_details ,  T2.achievement_type_description FROM Achievements AS T1 JOIN Ref_Achievement_Type AS T2 ON T1.achievement_type_code  =  T2.achievement_type_code

question: Which students only got the most common result for his or her all behaviour monitoring details? List the students' biographical information.
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Behaviour_Monitoring AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id WHERE T2.behaviour_monitoring_details IN ( SELECT behaviour_monitoring_details FROM Behaviour_Monitoring GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1 ) EXCEPT SELECT T1.bio_data FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Behaviour_Monitoring AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id WHERE T2.behaviour_monitoring_details NOT IN ( SELECT behaviour_monitoring_details FROM Behaviour_Monitoring GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Give me the detention start date for all the detention records.
original_query: SELECT datetime_detention_start FROM Detention

question: Find the biographical data and details for students whose student loan is above the average amount.
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data ,  T1.student_details FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Loans AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id WHERE T2.amount_of_loan  >  ( SELECT avg(amount_of_loan) FROM Student_Loans )

question: What is the average amount of a student loan?
original_query: SELECT avg(amount_of_loan) FROM Student_Loans

question: What are the detail and id of the teacher who teaches the largest number of courses?
original_query: SELECT T1.teacher_details ,  T1.teacher_id FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id GROUP BY T1.teacher_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which students not only got the most common result but also got a result obtained by 3 students in behaviour monitoring? List the student's biographical data and details.
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data ,  T1.student_details FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Behaviour_Monitoring AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id WHERE T2.behaviour_monitoring_details IN ( SELECT behaviour_monitoring_details FROM Behaviour_Monitoring GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1 ) INTERSECT SELECT T1.bio_data ,  T1.student_details FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Behaviour_Monitoring AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id WHERE T2.behaviour_monitoring_details IN ( SELECT behaviour_monitoring_details FROM Behaviour_Monitoring GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details HAVING count(*)  =  3 )

question: Show the biographical information of the students whose details include the substring 'Suite'.
original_query: SELECT bio_data FROM Students WHERE student_details LIKE '%Suite%'

question: Show the detention start time and end time of the detentions.
original_query: SELECT datetime_detention_start ,  datetime_detention_end FROM Detention

question: For those students who have gone through an event, who do not have a student loan? List the students' biographical data
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Events AS T2 WHERE T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id EXCEPT SELECT T1.bio_data FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Loans AS T2 WHERE T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id

question: Which students have a student loan more than the average amount? List the students' biographical data and the details.
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data ,  T1.student_details FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Loans AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id WHERE T2.amount_of_loan  >  ( SELECT avg(amount_of_loan) FROM Student_Loans )

question: What is the transcript issuance date for the student with the largest amount of loan?
original_query: SELECT T1.date_of_transcript FROM Transcripts AS T1 JOIN Student_Loans AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id ORDER BY T2.amount_of_loan DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the most common result in the behavioral monitoring details. What are the count and the details of this result?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT student_id) ,  behaviour_monitoring_details FROM Behaviour_Monitoring GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Compute the average amount of student loans.
original_query: SELECT avg(amount_of_loan) FROM Student_Loans

question: What are the personal details and the address type descriptions of each student?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.student_details ,  T3.address_type_description FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Students_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id JOIN Ref_Address_Types AS T3 ON T2.address_type_code  =  T3.address_type_code

question: How are all the achievements described? List the achievement detail and the type description.
original_query: SELECT T1.achievement_details ,  T2.achievement_type_description FROM Achievements AS T1 JOIN Ref_Achievement_Type AS T2 ON T1.achievement_type_code  =  T2.achievement_type_code

question: What is the least common detention type? Show the type code and the description.
original_query: SELECT T1.detention_type_code ,  T2.detention_type_description FROM Detention AS T1 JOIN Ref_Detention_Type AS T2 ON T1.detention_type_code  =  T2.detention_type_code GROUP BY T1.detention_type_code ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which students never had a detention or student loan ? Find their biographical data .
original_query: select bio_data from students where student_id not in (select t1.student_id from students as t1 join detention as t2 on t1.student_id  =  t2.student_id union select t1.student_id from students as t1 join student_loans as t2 on t1.student_id  =  t2.student_id)

question: List the details of the teachers who teach some class whose detail has the substring 'data' but do not teach a class whose detail contains the prefix 'net'
original_query: SELECT T1.teacher_details FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id WHERE T2.class_details LIKE '%data%' EXCEPT SELECT T1.teacher_details FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id WHERE T2.class_details LIKE 'net%'

question: Among the students who have an event record, who do not have a student loan? Return the students' biographical data.
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Events AS T2 WHERE T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id EXCEPT SELECT T1.bio_data FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Loans AS T2 WHERE T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id

question: List the detail and id of the teacher who teaches the most courses.
original_query: SELECT T1.teacher_details ,  T1.teacher_id FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id GROUP BY T1.teacher_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the biographical information of the student with the smallest student loan.
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Loans AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id ORDER BY T2.amount_of_loan ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the most common student address type? Give me the code and description of the address type.
original_query: SELECT T1.address_type_code ,  T2.address_type_description FROM Students_Addresses AS T1 JOIN Ref_Address_Types AS T2 WHERE T1.address_type_code  =  T2.address_type_code GROUP BY T1.address_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the type code, details, and date of each achievement?
original_query: SELECT achievement_type_code ,  achievement_details ,  date_achievement FROM Achievements

question: List the details for all the pairs of teachers and students who are in the same class.
original_query: SELECT T1.teacher_details ,  T3.student_details FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id JOIN Students AS T3 ON T2.student_id  =  T3.student_id

question: List the personal details and the address type descriptions of all the students.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.student_details ,  T3.address_type_description FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Students_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id JOIN Ref_Address_Types AS T3 ON T2.address_type_code  =  T3.address_type_code

question: Find the details of all the markets that are accessible by walk or bus.
original_query: SELECT T1.Market_Details FROM Street_Markets AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Market_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID WHERE T2.How_to_Get_There  =  "walk" OR  T2.How_to_Get_There  =  "bus"

question: List all the possible ways to get to attractions, together with the number of attractions accessible by these methods.
original_query: SELECT How_to_Get_There ,  COUNT(*) FROM Tourist_Attractions GROUP BY How_to_Get_There

question: Show the average price range of hotels that have 5 star ratings and allow pets.
original_query: SELECT avg(price_range) FROM HOTELS WHERE star_rating_code  =  "5" AND pets_allowed_yn  =  1

question: Which tourist attractions can we get to by bus? Tell me the names of the attractions.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS WHERE How_to_Get_There  =  "bus"

question: Show different ways to get to attractions and the number of attractions that can be accessed in the corresponding way.
original_query: SELECT How_to_Get_There ,  COUNT(*) FROM Tourist_Attractions GROUP BY How_to_Get_There

question: Find the address of the location named "UK Gallery".
original_query: SELECT Address FROM LOCATIONS WHERE Location_Name  =  "UK Gallery"

question: Which tourist attractions are visited at least twice? Give me their names and ids.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID GROUP BY T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Count the number of distinct names associated with the photos.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT Name) FROM PHOTOS

question: Show the transportation method most people choose to get to tourist attractions.
original_query: SELECT How_to_Get_There FROM Tourist_Attractions GROUP BY How_to_Get_There ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the details and star ratings of the three hotels with the lowest price ranges?
original_query: SELECT other_hotel_details ,  star_rating_code FROM HOTELS ORDER BY price_range ASC LIMIT 3

question: Find the names and opening hours of the tourist attractions that we get to by bus or walk.
original_query: SELECT Name ,  Opening_Hours FROM TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS WHERE How_to_Get_There  =  "bus" OR How_to_Get_There  =  "walk"

question: What are the names and ids of the tourist attractions that are visited at most once?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID GROUP BY T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID HAVING count(*)  <=  1

question: Show the details of the top 3 most expensive hotels.
original_query: SELECT other_hotel_details FROM HOTELS ORDER BY price_range DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the average price range of five star hotels that allow pets?
original_query: SELECT avg(price_range) FROM HOTELS WHERE star_rating_code  =  "5" AND pets_allowed_yn  =  1

question: Show the names and ids of tourist attractions that are visited at least two times.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID GROUP BY T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Find the visit date and details of the tourist whose detail is 'Vincent'
original_query: SELECT T2.Visit_Date ,  T2.Visit_Details FROM VISITORS AS T1 JOIN VISITS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_ID  =  T2.Tourist_ID WHERE T1.Tourist_Details  =  "Vincent"

question: Give me the detail and opening hour for each museum.
original_query: SELECT T1.Museum_Details ,  T2.Opening_Hours FROM MUSEUMS AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Museum_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID

question: What are the average prices of hotels grouped by their pet policy.
original_query: SELECT pets_allowed_yn ,  avg(price_range) FROM HOTELS GROUP BY pets_allowed_yn

question: Give me the star rating descriptions of the hotels that cost more than 10000.
original_query: SELECT T2.star_rating_description FROM HOTELS AS T1 JOIN Ref_Hotel_Star_Ratings AS T2 ON T1.star_rating_code  =  T2.star_rating_code WHERE T1.price_range  >  10000

question: Tell me the name of the staff in charge of the attraction called "US museum".
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM STAFF AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID WHERE T2.Name  =  "US museum"

question: Find the tourist attractions that have parking or shopping as their feature details. What are the names of the attractions?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN Tourist_Attraction_Features AS T2 ON T1.tourist_attraction_id  =  T2.tourist_attraction_id JOIN Features AS T3 ON T2.Feature_ID  =  T3.Feature_ID WHERE T3.feature_Details  =  'park' UNION SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN Tourist_Attraction_Features AS T2 ON T1.tourist_attraction_id  =  T2.tourist_attraction_id JOIN Features AS T3 ON T2.Feature_ID  =  T3.Feature_ID WHERE T3.feature_Details  =  'shopping'

question: Show details of all visitors.
original_query: SELECT Tourist_Details FROM VISITORS

question: Which attraction type does the most tourist attractions belong to? Tell me its  attraction type description and code.
original_query: SELECT T1.Attraction_Type_Description ,  T2.Attraction_Type_Code FROM Ref_Attraction_Types AS T1 JOIN Tourist_Attractions AS T2 ON T1.Attraction_Type_Code  =  T2.Attraction_Type_Code GROUP BY T2.Attraction_Type_Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the names and details of all the staff members.
original_query: SELECT Name ,  Other_Details FROM Staff

question: What are the names of the tourist attractions that can be accessed by bus?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS WHERE How_to_Get_There  =  "bus"

question: Find the names of the tourist attractions that is either accessible by walk or at address 660 Shea Crescent.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM Locations AS T1 JOIN Tourist_Attractions AS T2 ON T1.Location_ID  =  T2.Location_ID WHERE T1.Address  =  "660 Shea Crescent" OR T2.How_to_Get_There  =  "walk"

question: What are the details and opening hours of the museums?
original_query: SELECT T1.Museum_Details ,  T2.Opening_Hours FROM MUSEUMS AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Museum_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID

question: What are the names of tourist attractions that can be reached by walk or is at address 660 Shea Crescent?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM Locations AS T1 JOIN Tourist_Attractions AS T2 ON T1.Location_ID  =  T2.Location_ID WHERE T1.Address  =  "660 Shea Crescent" OR T2.How_to_Get_There  =  "walk"

question: What are the price ranges of five star hotels?
original_query: SELECT price_range FROM HOTELS WHERE star_rating_code  =  "5"

question: Which transportation method is used the most often to get to tourist attractions?
original_query: SELECT How_to_Get_There FROM Tourist_Attractions GROUP BY How_to_Get_There ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the details of the shops that can be reached by walk.
original_query: SELECT T1.Shop_Details FROM SHOPS AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID WHERE T2.How_to_Get_There  =  "walk"

question: Tell me the price ranges for all the hotels.
original_query: SELECT price_range FROM HOTELS

question: Find the total number of available hotels.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM HOTELS

question: What are the price ranges of hotels?
original_query: SELECT price_range FROM HOTELS

question: What are the visit date and details of the visitor whose detail is 'Vincent'?
original_query: SELECT T2.Visit_Date ,  T2.Visit_Details FROM VISITORS AS T1 JOIN VISITS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_ID  =  T2.Tourist_ID WHERE T1.Tourist_Details  =  "Vincent"

question: What are the distinct location names?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Location_Name FROM LOCATIONS

question: Which tourist attractions does the visitor with detail 'Vincent' visit?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID JOIN VISITORS AS T3 ON T2.Tourist_ID  =  T3.Tourist_ID WHERE T3.Tourist_Details  =  "Vincent"

question: What are the details of the three most expensive hotels?
original_query: SELECT other_hotel_details FROM HOTELS ORDER BY price_range DESC LIMIT 3

question: Show the id and star rating of each hotel, ordered by its price from low to high.
original_query: SELECT hotel_id ,  star_rating_code FROM HOTELS ORDER BY price_range ASC

question: Find all the locations whose names contain the word "film".
original_query: SELECT Location_Name FROM LOCATIONS WHERE Location_Name LIKE "%film%"

question: What are the distinct visit dates?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Visit_Date FROM VISITS

question: What is the name and detail of each staff member?
original_query: SELECT Name ,  Other_Details FROM Staff

question: What campuses are located in Northridge, Los Angeles or in San Francisco, San Francisco?
original_query: SELECT campus FROM campuses WHERE LOCATION  =  "Northridge" AND county  =  "Los Angeles" UNION SELECT campus FROM campuses WHERE LOCATION  =  "San Francisco" AND county  =  "San Francisco"

question: How many universities have a campus fee greater than the average?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM csu_fees WHERE campusfee  >  (SELECT avg(campusfee) FROM csu_fees)

question: How many degrees were conferred at San Jose State University in 2000?
original_query: SELECT degrees FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN degrees AS T2 ON t1.id  =  t2.campus WHERE t1.campus  =  "San Jose State University" AND t2.year  =  2000

question: Which year has the most degrees conferred?
original_query: SELECT YEAR FROM degrees GROUP BY YEAR ORDER BY sum(degrees) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the campuses in Los Angeles county.
original_query: SELECT campus FROM campuses WHERE county  =  "Los Angeles"

question: How many faculty members are at the university that gave the least number of degrees in 2001?
original_query: SELECT T2.faculty FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN faculty AS T2 ON T1.id  =  t2.campus JOIN degrees AS T3 ON T1.id  =  t3.campus AND t2.year  =  t3.year WHERE t2.year  =  2001 ORDER BY t3.degrees LIMIT 1

question: What campuses opened before 1800?
original_query: SELECT campus FROM campuses WHERE YEAR  <  1800

question: How many campuses are there in Los Angeles county?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM campuses WHERE county  =  "Los Angeles"

question: Find the campus fee of "San Jose State University" in year 2000.
original_query: SELECT t1.campusfee FROM csu_fees AS t1 JOIN campuses AS t2 ON t1.campus  =  t2.id WHERE t2.campus  =  "San Jose State University" AND t1.year  =  2000

question: how many degrees were conferred between 1998 and 2002?
original_query: SELECT T1.campus ,  sum(T2.degrees) FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN degrees AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.campus WHERE T2.year  >=  1998 AND T2.year  <=  2002 GROUP BY T1.campus

question: How many CSU campuses are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM campuses

question: What is the average fee for a CSU campus in the year of 1996?
original_query: SELECT avg(campusfee) FROM csu_fees WHERE YEAR  =  1996

question: How many faculty lines are there in the university that conferred the least number of degrees in year 2001?
original_query: SELECT T2.faculty FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN faculty AS T2 ON T1.id  =  t2.campus JOIN degrees AS T3 ON T1.id  =  t3.campus AND t2.year  =  t3.year WHERE t2.year  =  2001 ORDER BY t3.degrees LIMIT 1

question: Which campus has the most degrees conferred in all times?
original_query: SELECT campus FROM degrees GROUP BY campus ORDER BY sum(degrees) DESC LIMIT 1

question: In the year 2000, what is the campus fee for San Francisco State University?
original_query: SELECT t1.campusfee FROM csu_fees AS t1 JOIN campuses AS t2 ON t1.campus  =  t2.id WHERE t2.campus  =  "San Francisco State University" AND t1.year  =  2000

question: What is the campus fee in the year 2000 for San Jose State University?
original_query: SELECT t1.campusfee FROM csu_fees AS t1 JOIN campuses AS t2 ON t1.campus  =  t2.id WHERE t2.campus  =  "San Jose State University" AND t1.year  =  2000

question: What is the campus fee for San Francisco State University in 1996?
original_query: SELECT campusfee FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN csu_fees AS T2 ON T1.id  =  t2.campus WHERE t1.campus  =  "San Francisco State University" AND T2.year  =  1996

question: Which campus has the most faculties in year 2003?
original_query: SELECT T1.campus FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN faculty AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.campus WHERE T2.year  =  2003 ORDER BY T2.faculty DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the average fee on a CSU campus in 1996
original_query: SELECT avg(campusfee) FROM csu_fees WHERE YEAR  =  1996

question: How many undergraduates are there at San Jose State
original_query: SELECT sum(t1.undergraduate) FROM discipline_enrollments AS t1 JOIN campuses AS t2 ON t1.campus  =  t2.id WHERE t1.year  =  2004 AND t2.campus  =  "San Jose State University"

question: How many degrees were conferred in "San Jose State University" in 2000?
original_query: SELECT degrees FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN degrees AS T2 ON t1.id  =  t2.campus WHERE t1.campus  =  "San Jose State University" AND t2.year  =  2000

question: How many faculty, in total, are there in the year 2002?
original_query: SELECT sum(faculty) FROM faculty WHERE YEAR  =  2002

question: Find all the campuses opened in 1958.
original_query: SELECT campus FROM campuses WHERE YEAR  =  1958

question: What are the campuses that had between 600 and 1000 faculty members in 2004?
original_query: SELECT T1.campus FROM campuses AS t1 JOIN faculty AS t2 ON t1.id  =  t2.campus WHERE t2.faculty  >=  600 AND t2.faculty  <=  1000 AND T1.year  =  2004

question: How many undergraduates are there in "San Jose State University" in year 2004?
original_query: SELECT sum(t1.undergraduate) FROM discipline_enrollments AS t1 JOIN campuses AS t2 ON t1.campus  =  t2.id WHERE t1.year  =  2004 AND t2.campus  =  "San Jose State University"

question: What are the degrees conferred in "San Francisco State University" in 2001.
original_query: SELECT degrees FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN degrees AS T2 ON t1.id  =  t2.campus WHERE t1.campus  =  "San Francisco State University" AND t2.year  =  2001

question: How many faculty lines are there in the university that conferred the most number of degrees in year 2002?
original_query: SELECT T2.faculty FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN faculty AS T2 ON T1.id  =  t2.campus JOIN degrees AS T3 ON T1.id  =  t3.campus AND t2.year  =  t3.year WHERE t2.year  =  2002 ORDER BY t3.degrees DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many universities have a campus fee higher than average?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM csu_fees WHERE campusfee  >  (SELECT avg(campusfee) FROM csu_fees)

question: What campus started in year 1956, has more than 200 full time students, and more than 400 students enrolled?
original_query: SELECT T1.campus FROM campuses AS t1 JOIN enrollments AS t2 ON t1.id  =  t2.campus WHERE t2.year  =  1956 AND totalenrollment_ay  >  400 AND FTE_AY  >  200

question: How many faculty lines are there in "San Francisco State University" in year 2004?
original_query: SELECT faculty FROM faculty AS T1 JOIN campuses AS T2 ON T1.campus  =  T2.id WHERE T1.year  =  2004 AND T2.campus  =  "San Francisco State University"

question: What campuses are located in the county of Los Angeles?
original_query: SELECT campus FROM campuses WHERE county  =  "Los Angeles"

question: How many faculty lines are there at San Francisco State University in 2004?
original_query: SELECT faculty FROM faculty AS T1 JOIN campuses AS T2 ON T1.campus  =  T2.id WHERE T1.year  =  2004 AND T2.campus  =  "San Francisco State University"

question: What is the campus fee of "San Francisco State University" in year 1996?
original_query: SELECT campusfee FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN csu_fees AS T2 ON T1.id  =  t2.campus WHERE t1.campus  =  "San Francisco State University" AND T2.year  =  1996

question: Which campus was opened between 1935 and 1939?
original_query: SELECT campus FROM campuses WHERE YEAR  >=  1935 AND YEAR  <=  1939

question: Show all company names with a movie directed in year 1999.
original_query: SELECT T2.company_name FROM movie AS T1 JOIN culture_company AS T2 ON T1.movie_id  =  T2.movie_id WHERE T1.year  =  1999

question: Show all publishers and the number of books for each publisher.
original_query: SELECT publisher ,  count(*) FROM book_club GROUP BY publisher

question: Show all movie titles, years, and directors, ordered by budget.
original_query: SELECT title ,  YEAR ,  director FROM movie ORDER BY budget_million

question: List categories that have at least two books after year 1989.
original_query: SELECT category FROM book_club WHERE YEAR  >  1989 GROUP BY category HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Which publishers did not publish a book in 1989?

question: show the titles, and authors or editors for all books made after the year 1989.
original_query: SELECT book_title ,  author_or_editor FROM book_club WHERE YEAR  >  1989

question: What are the years, titles, and publishers for all books, ordered by year descending?
original_query: SELECT YEAR ,  book_title ,  publisher FROM book_club ORDER BY YEAR DESC

question: Count the number of different directors.
original_query: SELECT COUNT (DISTINCT director) FROM movie

question: How many books fall into each category?
original_query: SELECT category ,  count(*) FROM book_club GROUP BY category

question: What categories have two or more corresponding books that were made after 1989?
original_query: SELECT category FROM book_club WHERE YEAR  >  1989 GROUP BY category HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: How many book clubs are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM book_club

question: Which directors had a movie in either 1999 or 2000?
original_query: SELECT director FROM movie WHERE YEAR  =  1999 OR YEAR  =  2000

question: Count the number of book clubs.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM book_club

question: What are the titles and authors or editors that correspond to books made after 1989?
original_query: SELECT book_title ,  author_or_editor FROM book_club WHERE YEAR  >  1989

question: Return the title and director of the movie released in the year 2000 or earlier that had the highest worldwide gross.
original_query: SELECT title ,  director FROM movie WHERE YEAR  <=  2000 ORDER BY gross_worldwide DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are all the company names that have a book published by Alyson?
original_query: SELECT T1.company_name FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN book_club AS T2 ON T1.book_club_id  =  T2.book_club_id WHERE T2.publisher  =  'Alyson'

question: Return the publisher that has published the most books.
original_query: SELECT publisher FROM book_club GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the years, book titles, and publishers for all books, in descending order by year.
original_query: SELECT YEAR ,  book_title ,  publisher FROM book_club ORDER BY YEAR DESC

question: What are all company names that have a corresponding movie directed in the year 1999?

question: Find the emails of customers who has filed a complaints of the product with the most complaints.
original_query: SELECT t1.email_address FROM customers AS t1 JOIN complaints AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id GROUP BY t1.customer_id ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: What are lines 1 and 2 of the addressed of the customer with the email "vbogisich@example.org"?

question: What are all the different product names, and how many complains has each received?

question: Find the prices of products which has never received a single complaint.
original_query: SELECT product_price FROM products WHERE product_id NOT IN (SELECT product_id FROM complaints)

question: What is the last name of the staff who has handled the first ever complaint?

question: What are the last names of staff with email addressed containing the substring "wrau"?

question: Count the number of different complaint type codes.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT complaint_type_code) FROM complaints

question: Count the number of customers that have the customer type that is most common.

question: What is the average price of the products for each category?

question: Find the last name of the staff whose email address contains "wrau".
original_query: SELECT last_name FROM staff WHERE email_address LIKE "%wrau%"

question: Return the city with the customer type code "Good Credit Rating" that had the fewest customers.

question: What are the phone numbers of all customers and all staff members?
original_query: SELECT phone_number FROM customers UNION SELECT phone_number FROM staff

question: Find the address line 1 and 2 of the customer with email "vbogisich@example.org".
original_query: SELECT address_line_1 ,  address_line_2 FROM customers WHERE email_address  =  "vbogisich@example.org"

question: Which state has the most customers?

question: What is the name and category code of the product with the highest price?
original_query: SELECT product_name ,  product_category_code FROM products ORDER BY product_price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which products has been complained by the customer who has filed least amount of complaints?

question: Return the names of products that have had complaints filed by the customer who has filed the fewest complaints.

question: Return the average price of products that have each category code.

question: List the state names and the number of customers living in each state.

question: Find the names of customers who are not living in the state of California.
original_query: SELECT customer_name FROM customers EXCEPT SELECT t1.customer_name FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customer_addresses AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id JOIN addresses AS t3 ON t2.address_id  =  t3.address_id WHERE t3.state_province_county  =  'California'

question: Find the names and phone numbers of customers living in California state.

question: Find the ids of orders whose status is 'Success'.

question: Find the name and price of the product that has been ordered the greatest number of times.

question: Find the name of the most expensive product.
original_query: SELECT product_name FROM products ORDER BY product_price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the details of all trucks in the order of their license number.

question: Find the total quantity of products associated with the orders in the "Cancelled" status.

original_query: SELECT city FROM addresses WHERE zip_postcode  =  255

question: Find the customer name and date of the orders that have the status "Delivered".

question: Find the names of customers who ordered both products Latte and Americano.
original_query: SELECT t1.customer_name FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customer_orders AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id JOIN order_items AS t3 ON t2.order_id  =  t3.order_id JOIN products AS t4 ON t3.product_id  =  t4.product_id WHERE t4.product_details  =  'Latte' INTERSECT SELECT t1.customer_name FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customer_orders AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id JOIN order_items AS t3 ON t2.order_id  =  t3.order_id JOIN products AS t4 ON t3.product_id  =  t4.product_id WHERE t4.product_details  =  'Americano'

question: What are the customer name and date of the orders whose status is "Delivered".
original_query: SELECT t1.customer_name ,  t2.order_date FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customer_orders AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id WHERE order_status  =  "Delivered"

question: What is the channel code and contact number of the customer contact channel that was active for the longest time?
original_query: SELECT channel_code ,  contact_number FROM customer_contact_channels WHERE active_to_date - active_from_date  =  (SELECT active_to_date - active_from_date FROM customer_contact_channels ORDER BY (active_to_date - active_from_date) DESC LIMIT 1)

question: What is the total number of products that are in orders with status "Cancelled"?

question: Which customer's name contains "Alex"? Find the full name.

question: What are the order ids and corresponding order dates for orders with a quantity greater than 6 or consisting of more than 3 products?

question: Show the distinct venues of debates

question: Show the names of people who have been on the negative side of debates at least twice.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM debate_people AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.Negative  =  T2.People_ID GROUP BY T2.Name HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: Show the names of members in ascending order of their rank in rounds.

question: Show the distinct leader names of colleges associated with members from country "Canada".

question: Show the different countries and the number of members from each.
original_query: SELECT Country ,  COUNT(*) FROM member GROUP BY Country

question: What are the names of the states where at least 3 heads were born?
original_query: SELECT born_state FROM head GROUP BY born_state HAVING count(*)  >=  3

question: What are the distinct creation years of the departments managed by a secretary born in state 'Alabama'?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.creation FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.department_id  =  T2.department_id JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_id  =  T3.head_id WHERE T3.born_state  =  'Alabama'

question: What are the distinct ages of the heads who are acting?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.age FROM management AS T2 JOIN head AS T1 ON T1.head_id  =  T2.head_id WHERE T2.temporary_acting  =  'Yes'

question: How many heads of the departments are older than 56 ?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM head WHERE age  >  56

question: What is the average number of employees of the departments whose rank is between 10 and 15?
original_query: SELECT avg(num_employees) FROM department WHERE ranking BETWEEN 10 AND 15

question: List the states where both the secretary of 'Treasury' department and the secretary of 'Homeland Security' were born.
original_query: SELECT T3.born_state FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.department_id  =  T2.department_id JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_id  =  T3.head_id WHERE T1.name  =  'Treasury' INTERSECT SELECT T3.born_state FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.department_id  =  T2.department_id JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_id  =  T3.head_id WHERE T1.name  =  'Homeland Security'

question: Which department has more than 1 head at a time? List the id, name and the number of heads.
original_query: SELECT T1.department_id ,  T1.name ,  count(*) FROM management AS T2 JOIN department AS T1 ON T1.department_id  =  T2.department_id GROUP BY T1.department_id HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: What are the names of the heads who are born outside the California state?
original_query: SELECT name FROM head WHERE born_state != 'California'

question: What are the ids and names of department stores with both marketing and managing departments?
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_store_id ,  T2.store_name FROM departments AS T1 JOIN department_stores AS T2 ON T1.dept_store_id  =  T2.dept_store_id WHERE T1.department_name  =  "marketing" INTERSECT SELECT T2.dept_store_id ,  T2.store_name FROM departments AS T1 JOIN department_stores AS T2 ON T1.dept_store_id  =  T2.dept_store_id WHERE T1.department_name  =  "managing"

question: For each product type, return the maximum and minimum price.
original_query: SELECT product_type_code ,  max(product_price) ,  min(product_price) FROM products GROUP BY product_type_code

question: Return the id of the department with the fewest staff assignments.

question: Return ids of all the products that are supplied by supplier id 2 and are more expensive than the average price of all products.
original_query: SELECT T1.product_id FROM product_suppliers AS T1 JOIN products AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id WHERE T1.supplier_id  =  2 AND T2.product_price  >  (SELECT avg(product_price) FROM products)

question: What is the address for the customer with id 10?
original_query: SELECT T1.address_details FROM addresses AS T1 JOIN customer_addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id WHERE T2.customer_id  =  10

question: Count the number of distinct product types.

question: What are the names of staff who have been assigned multiple jobs?

question: What is the id of the product that was ordered the most often?

question: List the order id, customer id for orders in Cancelled status, ordered by their order dates.

question: What are the ids of suppliers which have an average amount purchased of above 50000 or below 30000?

question: Find the name and gender of the staff who has been assigned the job of Sales Person but never Clerical Staff.

question: What are the names and addressed of customers who have both New and Pending orders?

question: What are the distinct names and phone numbers for suppliers who have red jeans?

question: What are the maximum and minimum product prices for each product type?

question: What are the average amount purchased and value purchased for the supplier who supplies the most products.
original_query: SELECT avg(total_amount_purchased) ,  avg(total_value_purchased) FROM Product_Suppliers WHERE supplier_id  =  (SELECT supplier_id FROM Product_Suppliers GROUP BY supplier_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1)

question: Find the names of products that were bought by at least two distinct customers.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.product_name FROM customer_orders AS T1 JOIN order_items AS T2 ON T1.order_id  =  T2.order_id JOIN products AS T3 ON T2.product_id  =  T3.product_id GROUP BY T3.product_id HAVING COUNT (DISTINCT T1.customer_id)  >=  2

question: What is the name and job title of the staff who was assigned the latest?
original_query: SELECT T1.staff_name ,  T2.job_title_code FROM staff AS T1 JOIN staff_department_assignments AS T2 ON T1.staff_id  =  T2.staff_id ORDER BY T2.date_assigned_to DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the average price of all product clothes.
original_query: SELECT avg(product_price) FROM products WHERE product_type_code  =  'Clothes'

question: What are the phone numbers of all customers and suppliers.
original_query: SELECT customer_phone FROM customers UNION SELECT supplier_phone FROM suppliers

question: What are the highest and lowest prices of products, grouped by and alphabetically ordered by product type?
original_query: SELECT max(product_price) ,  min(product_price) ,  product_type_code FROM products GROUP BY product_type_code ORDER BY product_type_code

question: What are the ids of the top three products that were purchased in the largest amount?
original_query: SELECT product_id FROM product_suppliers ORDER BY total_amount_purchased DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the average price for each type of product?
original_query: SELECT product_type_code ,  avg(product_price) FROM products GROUP BY product_type_code

question: What are the names and phone numbers for all suppliers, sorted in alphabetical order of their addressed?
original_query: SELECT T1.supplier_name ,  T1.supplier_phone FROM Suppliers AS T1 JOIN supplier_addresses AS T2 ON T1.supplier_id  =  T2.supplier_id JOIN addresses AS T3 ON T2.address_id  =  T3.address_id ORDER BY T3.address_details

question: Find the number of different product types.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT product_type_code) FROM products

question: What are the product id and product type of the cheapest product?
original_query: SELECT product_id ,  product_type_code FROM products ORDER BY product_price LIMIT 1

question: What is the id and name of the department store that has both marketing and managing department?
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_store_id ,  T2.store_name FROM departments AS T1 JOIN department_stores AS T2 ON T1.dept_store_id  =  T2.dept_store_id WHERE T1.department_name  =  "marketing" INTERSECT SELECT T2.dept_store_id ,  T2.store_name FROM departments AS T1 JOIN department_stores AS T2 ON T1.dept_store_id  =  T2.dept_store_id WHERE T1.department_name  =  "managing"

question: What are the names and ids of customers whose address contains TN?
original_query: SELECT customer_name ,  customer_id FROM customers WHERE customer_address LIKE "%TN%"

question: What is the id and name of the staff who has been assigned for the least amount of time?
original_query: SELECT T1.staff_id ,  T1.staff_name FROM staff AS T1 JOIN Staff_Department_Assignments AS T2 ON T1.staff_id  =  T2.staff_id ORDER BY date_assigned_to - date_assigned_from LIMIT 1

question: List the name and phone number of all suppliers in the alphabetical order of their addresses.
original_query: SELECT T1.supplier_name ,  T1.supplier_phone FROM Suppliers AS T1 JOIN supplier_addresses AS T2 ON T1.supplier_id  =  T2.supplier_id JOIN addresses AS T3 ON T2.address_id  =  T3.address_id ORDER BY T3.address_details

question: Return the name, phone number and email address for the customer with the most orders.
original_query: SELECT T1.customer_name ,  T1.customer_phone ,  T1.customer_email FROM customers AS T1 JOIN customer_orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id GROUP BY T2.customer_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the names of all the distinct customers who bought a keyboard.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.customer_name FROM customers AS T1 JOIN customer_orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id JOIN order_items AS T3 ON T2.order_id  =  T3.order_id JOIN products AS T4 ON T3.product_id  =  T4.product_id WHERE T4.product_name  =  "keyboard"

question: Give me the product type, name and price for all the products supplied by supplier id 3.
original_query: SELECT T2.product_type_code ,  T2.product_name ,  T2.product_price FROM product_suppliers AS T1 JOIN products AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id WHERE T1.supplier_id  =  3

question: Give the maximum and minimum product prices for each product type, grouped and ordered by product type.
original_query: SELECT max(product_price) ,  min(product_price) ,  product_type_code FROM products GROUP BY product_type_code ORDER BY product_type_code

question: What is the name of the hardware product with the greatest price?
original_query: SELECT product_name FROM products WHERE product_type_code  =  'Hardware' ORDER BY product_price DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names and ids of products costing between 600 and 700?
original_query: SELECT product_name ,  product_id FROM products WHERE product_price BETWEEN 600 AND 700

question: Find the ids of all distinct customers who made order after some orders that were Cancelled.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM Customer_Orders WHERE order_date  >  (SELECT min(order_date) FROM Customer_Orders WHERE order_status_code  =  "Cancelled")

question: What are the order ids and customer ids for orders that have been Cancelled, sorted by their order dates?
original_query: SELECT order_id ,  customer_id FROM customer_orders WHERE order_status_code  =   "Cancelled" ORDER BY order_date

question: How many customers use each payment method?
original_query: SELECT payment_method_code ,  count(*) FROM customers GROUP BY payment_method_code

question: Return the average total amount purchased and total value purchased for the supplier who supplies the greatest number of products.
original_query: SELECT avg(total_amount_purchased) ,  avg(total_value_purchased) FROM Product_Suppliers WHERE supplier_id  =  (SELECT supplier_id FROM Product_Suppliers GROUP BY supplier_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1)

question: Count the number of devices.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM device

question: Show names of shops and the carriers of devices they have in stock.
original_query: SELECT T3.Shop_Name ,  T2.Carrier FROM stock AS T1 JOIN device AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID  =  T2.Device_ID JOIN shop AS T3 ON T1.Shop_ID  =  T3.Shop_ID

question: List the names of shops that have no devices in stock.
original_query: SELECT Shop_Name FROM shop WHERE Shop_ID NOT IN (SELECT Shop_ID FROM stock)

question: What are the names of shops that have more than a single kind of device in stock?
original_query: SELECT T2.Shop_Name FROM stock AS T1 JOIN shop AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID  =  T2.Shop_ID GROUP BY T1.Shop_ID HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

question: What are the different software platforms for devices, and how many devices have each?
original_query: SELECT Software_Platform ,  COUNT(*) FROM device GROUP BY Software_Platform

question: List the carriers of devices in ascending alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT Carrier FROM device ORDER BY Carrier ASC

question: Which locations contains both shops that opened after the year 2012 and shops that opened before 2008?
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM shop WHERE Open_Year  >  2012 INTERSECT SELECT LOCATION FROM shop WHERE Open_Year  <  2008

question: What are the names of shops that do not have any devices in stock?
original_query: SELECT Shop_Name FROM shop WHERE Shop_ID NOT IN (SELECT Shop_ID FROM stock)

question: Give the average quantity of stocks.
original_query: SELECT avg(Quantity) FROM stock

question: Count the number of different software platforms.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT Software_Platform) FROM device

question: List the name of the shop with the latest open year.
original_query: SELECT Shop_Name FROM shop ORDER BY Open_Year DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the carriers of devices that have no devices in stock.
original_query: SELECT Carrier FROM device WHERE Device_ID NOT IN (SELECT Device_ID FROM stock)

question: What are the names of device shops, and what are the carriers that they carry devices in stock for?
original_query: SELECT T3.Shop_Name ,  T2.Carrier FROM stock AS T1 JOIN device AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID  =  T2.Device_ID JOIN shop AS T3 ON T1.Shop_ID  =  T3.Shop_ID

question: Show the locations shared by shops with open year later than 2012 and shops with open year before 2008.
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM shop WHERE Open_Year  >  2012 INTERSECT SELECT LOCATION FROM shop WHERE Open_Year  <  2008

question: Return the device carriers that do not have Android as their software platform.
original_query: SELECT Carrier FROM device WHERE Software_Platform != 'Android'

question: What are the different software platforms for devices, ordered by frequency descending?
original_query: SELECT Software_Platform FROM device GROUP BY Software_Platform ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

question: What is the shop name corresponding to the shop that opened in the most recent year?
original_query: SELECT Shop_Name FROM shop ORDER BY Open_Year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the carriers of devices that are not in stock anywhere?
original_query: SELECT Carrier FROM device WHERE Device_ID NOT IN (SELECT Device_ID FROM stock)

question: List the software platform shared by the greatest number of devices.
original_query: SELECT Software_Platform FROM device GROUP BY Software_Platform ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the names and locations of shops, ordered by name in alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT Shop_Name ,  LOCATION FROM shop ORDER BY Shop_Name ASC

question: Select the area and government website of the district with the smallest population.
original_query: SELECT area_km ,  Government_website FROM district ORDER BY Population LIMIT 1

question: Who is the oldest spokesman?
original_query: SELECT name FROM spokesman ORDER BY age DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the average points and average ages of all spokesmen whose rank position is 1.
original_query: SELECT avg(points) ,  avg(age) FROM spokesman WHERE rank_position  =  1

question: What are the names and points of spokesmen who are younger than 40?
original_query: SELECT name ,  points FROM spokesman WHERE age  <  40

question: List the ids, names, and government websites of all districts sorted by population.
original_query: SELECT name ,  Government_website ,  district_id FROM district ORDER BY Population

question: Find the total and average population of the districts which have some spokesman.
original_query: SELECT sum(population) ,  avg(population) FROM district WHERE district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM spokesman_district)

question: Find the name of spokesmen who do not speak for any district.
original_query: SELECT name FROM spokesman WHERE Spokesman_ID NOT IN (SELECT Spokesman_ID FROM spokesman_district)

question: Find the names of the districts which have had both spokesman with rank position 1 and 2.
original_query: SELECT t3.name FROM spokesman AS t1 JOIN spokesman_district AS t2 ON t1.Spokesman_ID  =  t2.Spokesman_ID JOIN district AS t3 ON t3.district_id  =  t2.district_id WHERE t1.rank_position  =  1 INTERSECT SELECT t3.name FROM spokesman AS t1 JOIN spokesman_district AS t2 ON t1.Spokesman_ID  =  t2.Spokesman_ID JOIN district AS t3 ON t3.district_id  =  t2.district_id WHERE t1.rank_position  =  2

question: Find the names of districts whose government links use a 'gov' domain.
original_query: SELECT name FROM district WHERE Government_website LIKE "%gov%"

question: Find the name of the district which has the largest area.
original_query: SELECT name FROM district ORDER BY Area_km DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of documents that do not have any images?
original_query: SELECT document_name FROM documents EXCEPT SELECT t1.document_name FROM documents AS t1 JOIN document_sections AS t2 ON t1.document_code  =  t2.document_code JOIN document_sections_images AS t3 ON t2.section_id  =  t3.section_id

question: Return the type code of the document named "David CV".
original_query: SELECT document_type_code FROM documents WHERE document_name  =  "David CV"

question: What are all the section titles of the document named "David CV"?
original_query: SELECT t2.section_title FROM documents AS t1 JOIN document_sections AS t2 ON t1.document_code  =  t2.document_code WHERE t1.document_name  =  "David CV"

question: Give the section titles of the document with the name "David CV".
original_query: SELECT t2.section_title FROM documents AS t1 JOIN document_sections AS t2 ON t1.document_code  =  t2.document_code WHERE t1.document_name  =  "David CV"

question: List all the image name and URLs in the order of their names.
original_query: SELECT image_name ,  image_url FROM images ORDER BY image_name

question: What are the names of documents that have both one of the three most common types and one of three most common structures?
original_query: SELECT document_name FROM documents GROUP BY document_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3 INTERSECT SELECT document_name FROM documents GROUP BY document_structure_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the average access count across all documents?
original_query: SELECT avg(access_count) FROM documents

question: What are the names of all the documents, as well as the access counts of each, ordered alphabetically?
original_query: SELECT document_name ,  access_count FROM documents ORDER BY document_name

question: What is the name of the document which has been accessed the most times, as well as the number of times it has been accessed?
original_query: SELECT document_name ,  access_count FROM documents ORDER BY access_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of documents that do not have any sections?
original_query: SELECT document_name FROM documents WHERE document_code NOT IN (SELECT document_code FROM document_sections)

question: Return the structure description of the document that has been accessed the fewest number of times.
original_query: SELECT t2.document_structure_description FROM documents AS t1 JOIN document_structures AS t2 ON t1.document_structure_code  =  t2.document_structure_code GROUP BY t1.document_structure_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the average access counts of documents with functional area "Acknowledgement".
original_query: SELECT avg(t1.access_count) FROM documents AS t1 JOIN document_functional_areas AS t2 ON t1.document_code  =  t2.document_code JOIN functional_areas AS t3 ON t2.functional_area_code  =  t3.functional_area_code WHERE t3.functional_area_description  =  "Acknowledgement"

question: How many users are logged in?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM users WHERE user_login  =  1

question: What is the description of the most popular role among users that have logged in?
original_query: SELECT role_description FROM ROLES WHERE role_code  =  (SELECT role_code FROM users WHERE user_login  =  1 GROUP BY role_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1)

question: What is the structure of the document with the least number of accesses?
original_query: SELECT t2.document_structure_description FROM documents AS t1 JOIN document_structures AS t2 ON t1.document_structure_code  =  t2.document_structure_code GROUP BY t1.document_structure_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the name and access counts of all documents, in alphabetic order of the document name.
original_query: SELECT document_name ,  access_count FROM documents ORDER BY document_name

question: Count the number of users that are logged in.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM users WHERE user_login  =  1

question: What is the total access count of documents that are of the most common document type?
original_query: SELECT sum(access_count) FROM documents GROUP BY document_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all the document names which contains "CV".
original_query: SELECT document_name FROM documents WHERE document_name LIKE "%CV%"

question: What is the type of the document named "David CV"?
original_query: SELECT document_type_code FROM documents WHERE document_name  =  "David CV"

question: Find the number of users in each role.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  role_code FROM users GROUP BY role_code

question: What are the codes of types of documents of which there are for or more?
original_query: SELECT document_type_code FROM documents GROUP BY document_type_code HAVING count(*)  >  4

question: List the cost of each treatment and the corresponding treatment type description.
original_query: SELECT T1.cost_of_treatment ,  T2.treatment_type_description FROM Treatments AS T1 JOIN treatment_types AS T2 ON T1.treatment_type_code  =  T2.treatment_type_code

question: List each charge type and its amount.
original_query: SELECT charge_type ,  charge_amount FROM Charges

question: What is the average age of all the dogs?
original_query: SELECT avg(age) FROM Dogs

question: Which dogs have not cost their owner more than 1000 for treatment ? List the dog names .
original_query: select name from dogs where dog_id not in ( select dog_id from treatments group by dog_id having sum(cost_of_treatment)  >  1000 )

question: What is the name of the breed with the most dogs?
original_query: SELECT T1.breed_name FROM Breeds AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.breed_code  =  T2.breed_code GROUP BY T1.breed_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the role, street, city and state of the professionals living in a city that contains the substring 'West'.
original_query: SELECT role_code ,  street ,  city ,  state FROM professionals WHERE city LIKE '%West%'

question: Give me the id, role and email of the professionals who did not perform any treatment on dogs.
original_query: SELECT professional_id ,  role_code ,  email_address FROM Professionals EXCEPT SELECT T1.professional_id ,  T1.role_code ,  T1.email_address FROM Professionals AS T1 JOIN Treatments AS T2 ON T1.professional_id  =  T2.professional_id

question: What is the average age of the dogs who have gone through any treatments?
original_query: SELECT avg(age) FROM Dogs WHERE dog_id IN ( SELECT dog_id FROM Treatments )

question: What are the arriving date and the departing date of all the dogs?
original_query: SELECT date_arrived ,  date_departed FROM Dogs

question: Find the id, last name and cell phone of the professionals who live in the state of Indiana or have performed more than two treatments.
original_query: SELECT professional_id ,  last_name ,  cell_number FROM Professionals WHERE state  =  'Indiana' UNION SELECT T1.professional_id ,  T1.last_name ,  T1.cell_number FROM Professionals AS T1 JOIN Treatments AS T2 ON T1.professional_id  =  T2.professional_id GROUP BY T1.professional_id HAVING count(*)  >  2

question: How many professionals did not operate any treatment on dogs?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Professionals WHERE professional_id NOT IN ( SELECT professional_id FROM Treatments )

question: How many professionals have performed any treatment to dogs?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT professional_id) FROM Treatments

question: Which states have both owners and professionals living there?
original_query: SELECT state FROM Owners INTERSECT SELECT state FROM Professionals

question: Find the number of owners who do not own any dogs at this moment.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Owners WHERE owner_id NOT IN ( SELECT owner_id FROM Dogs )

question: List the email, cell phone and home phone of all the professionals.
original_query: SELECT email_address ,  cell_number ,  home_phone FROM professionals

question: Tell me the age of the oldest dog.
original_query: SELECT max(age) FROM Dogs

question: Find the number of professionals who have ever treated dogs.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT professional_id) FROM Treatments

question: Which first names are used for professionals or owners but are not used as dog names?
original_query: SELECT first_name FROM Professionals UNION SELECT first_name FROM Owners EXCEPT SELECT name FROM Dogs

question: Find the distinct breed type and size type combinations for dogs.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT breed_code ,  size_code FROM dogs

question: Find the average age of the dogs who went through treatments.
original_query: SELECT avg(age) FROM Dogs WHERE dog_id IN ( SELECT dog_id FROM Treatments )

question: What are the id, role, and first name of the professionals who have performed two or more treatments?
original_query: SELECT T1.professional_id ,  T1.role_code ,  T1.first_name FROM Professionals AS T1 JOIN Treatments AS T2 ON T1.professional_id  =  T2.professional_id GROUP BY T1.professional_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Find the first names that are used for professionals or owners but are not used as dog names.
original_query: SELECT first_name FROM Professionals UNION SELECT first_name FROM Owners EXCEPT SELECT name FROM Dogs

question: List the date of each treatment, together with the first name of the professional who operated it.
original_query: SELECT T1.date_of_treatment ,  T2.first_name FROM Treatments AS T1 JOIN Professionals AS T2 ON T1.professional_id  =  T2.professional_id

question: Return the first name, last name and email of the owners living in a state whose name contains the substring 'North'.
original_query: SELECT first_name ,  last_name ,  email_address FROM Owners WHERE state LIKE '%North%'

question: Which owner has paid for the most treatments on his or her dogs? List the owner id and last name.
original_query: SELECT T1.owner_id ,  T1.last_name FROM Owners AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.owner_id  =  T2.owner_id JOIN Treatments AS T3 ON T2.dog_id  =  T3.dog_id GROUP BY T1.owner_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the last name of the owner owning the youngest dog.
original_query: SELECT T1.last_name FROM Owners AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.owner_id  =  T2.owner_id WHERE T2.age  =  ( SELECT max(age) FROM Dogs )

question: How much does each charge type costs? List both charge type and amount.
original_query: SELECT charge_type ,  charge_amount FROM Charges

question: List the dog name, age and weight of the dogs who have been abandoned? 1 stands for yes, and 0 stands for no.
original_query: SELECT name ,  age ,  weight FROM Dogs WHERE abandoned_yn  =  1

question: What is the charge amount of the most expensive charge type?
original_query: SELECT max(charge_amount) FROM Charges

question: How many dogs have not gone through any treatment?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Dogs WHERE dog_id NOT IN ( SELECT dog_id FROM Treatments )

question: Which owner has paid the largest amount of money in total for their dogs? Show the owner id and zip code.
original_query: SELECT T1.owner_id ,  T1.zip_code FROM Owners AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.owner_id  =  T2.owner_id JOIN Treatments AS T3 ON T2.dog_id  =  T3.dog_id GROUP BY T1.owner_id ORDER BY sum(T3.cost_of_treatment) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the email, cell phone and home phone of each professional?
original_query: SELECT email_address ,  cell_number ,  home_phone FROM professionals

question: Which professionals live in a city containing the substring 'West'? List his or her role, street, city and state.
original_query: SELECT role_code ,  street ,  city ,  state FROM professionals WHERE city LIKE '%West%'

question: List the names of the dogs of the rarest breed and the treatment dates of them.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T2.date_of_treatment FROM Dogs AS T1 JOIN Treatments AS T2 ON T1.dog_id  =  T2.dog_id WHERE T1.breed_code  =  ( SELECT breed_code FROM Dogs GROUP BY breed_code ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1 )

question: Which professionals live in the state of Indiana or have done treatment on more than 2 treatments? List his or her id, last name and cell phone.
original_query: SELECT professional_id ,  last_name ,  cell_number FROM Professionals WHERE state  =  'Indiana' UNION SELECT T1.professional_id ,  T1.last_name ,  T1.cell_number FROM Professionals AS T1 JOIN Treatments AS T2 ON T1.professional_id  =  T2.professional_id GROUP BY T1.professional_id HAVING count(*)  >  2

question: What are the names of the dogs for which the owner has not spend more than 1000 for treatment ?
original_query: select name from dogs where dog_id not in ( select dog_id from treatments group by dog_id having sum(cost_of_treatment)  >  1000 )

question: How many dogs went through any treatments?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dog_id) FROM Treatments

question: Find the states where both owners and professionals live.
original_query: SELECT state FROM Owners INTERSECT SELECT state FROM Professionals

question: Return the owner id, first name and last name of the owner who has the most dogs.
original_query: SELECT T1.owner_id ,  T2.first_name ,  T2.last_name FROM Dogs AS T1 JOIN Owners AS T2 ON T1.owner_id  =  T2.owner_id GROUP BY T1.owner_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List each owner's first name, last name, and the size of his for her dog.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name ,  T1.last_name ,  T2.size_code FROM Owners AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.owner_id  =  T2.owner_id

question: Which owner owns the most dogs? List the owner id, first name and last name.
original_query: SELECT T1.owner_id ,  T2.first_name ,  T2.last_name FROM Dogs AS T1 JOIN Owners AS T2 ON T1.owner_id  =  T2.owner_id GROUP BY T1.owner_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the name of dorms that do not have amenity TV Lounge.
original_query: SELECT dorm_name FROM dorm EXCEPT SELECT T1.dorm_name FROM dorm AS T1 JOIN has_amenity AS T2 ON T1.dormid  =  T2.dormid JOIN dorm_amenity AS T3 ON T2.amenid  =  T3.amenid WHERE T3.amenity_name  =  'TV Lounge'

question: Find the first and last name of students whose age is younger than the average age.
original_query: SELECT fname ,  lname FROM student WHERE age  <  (SELECT avg(age) FROM student)

question: Find the number of distinct amenities.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM dorm_amenity

question: Find the first name of students living in city PHL whose age is between 20 and 25.
original_query: SELECT fname FROM student WHERE city_code  =  'PHL' AND age BETWEEN 20 AND 25

question: Find the name of amenities Smith Hall dorm have. ordered the results by amenity names.
original_query: SELECT T3.amenity_name FROM dorm AS T1 JOIN has_amenity AS T2 ON T1.dormid  =  T2.dormid JOIN dorm_amenity AS T3 ON T2.amenid  =  T3.amenid WHERE T1.dorm_name  =  'Smith Hall' ORDER BY T3.amenity_name

question: Find the name of amenity that is most common in all dorms.
original_query: SELECT T1.amenity_name FROM dorm_amenity AS T1 JOIN has_amenity AS T2 ON T1.amenid  =  T2.amenid GROUP BY T2.amenid ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the dorm that does not have a TV Lounge?
original_query: SELECT dorm_name FROM dorm EXCEPT SELECT T1.dorm_name FROM dorm AS T1 JOIN has_amenity AS T2 ON T1.dormid  =  T2.dormid JOIN dorm_amenity AS T3 ON T2.amenid  =  T3.amenid WHERE T3.amenity_name  =  'TV Lounge'

question: How many dorms are in the database?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM dorm

question: Find the number of students for the cities where have more than one student.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  city_code FROM student GROUP BY city_code HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Find the first name and age of students who are living in the dorms that do not have amenity TV Lounge.
original_query: SELECT T1.fname ,  T1.age FROM student AS T1 JOIN lives_in AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid WHERE T2.dormid NOT IN (SELECT T3.dormid FROM has_amenity AS T3 JOIN dorm_amenity AS T4 ON T3.amenid  =  T4.amenid WHERE T4.amenity_name  =  'TV Lounge')

question: Find the number and average age of students living in each city.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  avg(age) ,  city_code FROM student GROUP BY city_code

question: What is the name and capacity of the dorm with the fewest amount of amenities?
original_query: SELECT T1.dorm_name ,  T1.student_capacity FROM dorm AS T1 JOIN has_amenity AS T2 ON T1.dormid  =  T2.dormid JOIN dorm_amenity AS T3 ON T2.amenid  =  T3.amenid GROUP BY T2.dormid ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the dorm with both a TV Lounge and Study Room listed as amenities?
original_query: SELECT T1.dorm_name FROM dorm AS T1 JOIN has_amenity AS T2 ON T1.dormid  =  T2.dormid JOIN dorm_amenity AS T3 ON T2.amenid  =  T3.amenid WHERE T3.amenity_name  =  'TV Lounge' INTERSECT SELECT T1.dorm_name FROM dorm AS T1 JOIN has_amenity AS T2 ON T1.dormid  =  T2.dormid JOIN dorm_amenity AS T3 ON T2.amenid  =  T3.amenid WHERE T3.amenity_name  =  'Study Room'

question: Find the number of amenities for each of the dorms that can accommodate more than 100 students.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.dormid FROM dorm AS T1 JOIN has_amenity AS T2 ON T1.dormid  =  T2.dormid WHERE T1.student_capacity  >  100 GROUP BY T1.dormid

question: Find the number of students whose age is older than the average age for each gender.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  sex FROM student WHERE age  >  (SELECT avg(age) FROM student) GROUP BY sex

question: How many students are from each city, and which cities have more than one cities?

question: What are the names of all the dorms that don't have any amenities?

question: Find the numbers of different majors and cities.

question: What are the names of all the dorms that can accomdate more than 300 students?

question: Find the number of female students (with F sex) living in Smith Hall

question: Find the first name of students who is older than 20.

question: How many students are older than 20 in each dorm?

question: What is the average age of students who are living in the dorm with the largest capacity?

question: Find the name of dorms which have TV Lounge but no Study Room as amenity.
original_query: SELECT T1.dorm_name FROM dorm AS T1 JOIN has_amenity AS T2 ON T1.dormid  =  T2.dormid JOIN dorm_amenity AS T3 ON T2.amenid  =  T3.amenid WHERE T3.amenity_name  =  'TV Lounge' EXCEPT SELECT T1.dorm_name FROM dorm AS T1 JOIN has_amenity AS T2 ON T1.dormid  =  T2.dormid JOIN dorm_amenity AS T3 ON T2.amenid  =  T3.amenid WHERE T3.amenity_name  =  'Study Room'

question: List email address and birthday of customer whose first name as Carole.
original_query: SELECT email_address ,  date_of_birth FROM Customers WHERE first_name = "Carole"

question: For each order, what is its id, date, and total amount paid?
original_query: SELECT T1.order_id ,  T1.date_order_placed ,  sum(T3.product_price) FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Order_items AS T2 ON T1.order_id  =  T2.order_id JOIN Products AS T3 ON T2.product_id  =  T3.product_id GROUP BY T1.order_id

question: Which orders have at least 2 products on it? List the order id and date.
original_query: SELECT T1.order_id ,  T1.date_order_placed FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Order_items AS T2 ON T1.order_id  =  T2.order_id GROUP BY T1.order_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: For all products sold more than 3 times, what are their ids and descriptions?
original_query: SELECT T1.product_id ,  T1.product_description FROM Products AS T1 JOIN Order_items AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id GROUP BY T1.product_id HAVING count(*)  >  3

question: What are the different names, prices, and descriptions for all products bought by female customers?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.product_name ,  T1.product_price ,  T1.product_description FROM Products AS T1 JOIN Order_items AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id JOIN Orders AS T3 ON T2.order_id  =  T3.order_id JOIN Customers AS T4 ON T3.customer_id  =  T4.customer_id WHERE T4.gender_code  =  'Female'

question: What are the email addresses, cities, and counties listed for all cusomters who are from the gender that orders less often?
original_query: SELECT email_address ,  town_city ,  county FROM Customers WHERE gender_code  =  ( SELECT gender_code FROM Customers GROUP BY gender_code ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1 )

question: How many orders has each gender of customers placed?
original_query: SELECT T1.gender_code ,  count(*) FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.gender_code

question: List the order date of the orders who are placed by customers with at least 2 payment methods.
original_query: SELECT date_order_placed FROM Orders WHERE customer_id IN ( SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Customer_Payment_Methods AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2 )

question: What are the status codes and dates placed for all of the orders?
original_query: SELECT order_status_code ,  date_order_placed FROM Orders

question: What are the first names, middle initials, last names, and payment methods of all customers?

question: What is the status code of the items have been ordered and shipped, and also what are their shipment tracking numbers?
original_query: SELECT T1.order_item_status_code ,  T3.shipment_tracking_number FROM Order_items AS T1 JOIN Shipment_Items AS T2 ON T1.order_item_id  =  T2.order_item_id JOIN Shipments AS T3 ON T2.shipment_id  =  T3.shipment_id

question: What is the price of all products being ordered on average?
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.product_price) FROM Products AS T1 JOIN Order_items AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id

question: What are the ids , names , prices , and colors of all products that have been listed in less than two orders ?
original_query: select t1.product_id ,  t1.product_name ,  t1.product_price ,  t1.product_color from products as t1 join order_items as t2 on t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id join orders as t3 on t2.order_id  =  t3.order_id group by t1.product_id having count(*) < 2

question: How many customers have placed any order?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM Orders

question: What are the colors , descriptions , and sizes for all products that are not at the maximum price ?
original_query: select product_color ,  product_description ,  product_size from products where product_price  !=  ( select max(product_price) from products )

question: How many orders has each gender placed?
original_query: SELECT T1.gender_code ,  count(*) FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.gender_code

question: What is the average price of the products being ordered?
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.product_price) FROM Products AS T1 JOIN Order_items AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id

question: What are the email address, town and county of the customers who are of the least common gender?

question: How many products have been shipped?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Shipment_Items

question: What is the least common order status?
original_query: SELECT order_status_code FROM Orders GROUP BY order_status_code ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: What are the names and colors of all products that have been shipped?

question: What is the most uncommon order status?

question: How many different customers have ordered things?

question: What are all the order status and all the dates of orders?

question: What is the most popular payment method?

question: What are the ids, names, and prices of all products that are ordered most frequently?

question: List the customers' first name, middle initial, last name and payment methods.

question: How many customers do not have any payment method?

question: How many kinds of products have not been sold?

question: What are the names of the products tht have been shipped, and on what days were they shipped?

question: List the id, first name and last name of the customers who both have placed more than 2 orders and have bought at least 3 items.
original_query: SELECT T1.customer_id ,  T1.customer_first_name ,  T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >  2 INTERSECT SELECT T1.customer_id ,  T1.customer_first_name ,  T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id JOIN Order_items AS T3 ON T2.order_id  =  T3.order_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >= 3

question: How many different payment methods can customers choose from?

question: List the dates of the orders which were placed at the earliest time or have more than 1 items.
