question: How many items are shipped?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Shipment_Items

question: What is the date of all orders that have been placed by customers with at least 2 payment methods?
original_query: SELECT date_order_placed FROM Orders WHERE customer_id IN ( SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Customer_Payment_Methods AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2 )

question: What are the color, description and size of the products priced below the maximum price.
original_query: SELECT product_color ,  product_description ,  product_size FROM Products WHERE product_price  <  ( SELECT max(product_price) FROM products )

question: What is the payment method that most customers use?
original_query: SELECT Payment_method_code FROM Customer_Payment_Methods GROUP BY Payment_method_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the ids, first and last names of the customers who have ordered more than twice and have bought at least 3 items?
original_query: SELECT T1.customer_id ,  T1.customer_first_name ,  T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >  2 INTERSECT SELECT T1.customer_id ,  T1.customer_first_name ,  T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id JOIN Order_items AS T3 ON T2.order_id  =  T3.order_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >= 3

question: What is the name of the organization that was formed most recently?
original_query: SELECT organization_name FROM organizations ORDER BY date_formed DESC LIMIT 1

question: Count the number of cities in the state of Colorado.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM addresses WHERE state_province_county  =  "Colorado"

question: Find the name of the most popular party form.
original_query: SELECT t1.form_name FROM forms AS t1 JOIN party_forms AS t2 ON t1.form_id  =  t2.form_id GROUP BY t2.form_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the party emails associated with parties that used the party form that is the most common?
original_query: SELECT t1.party_email FROM parties AS t1 JOIN party_forms AS t2 ON t1.party_id  =  t2.party_id WHERE t2.form_id  =  (SELECT form_id FROM party_forms GROUP BY form_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1)

question: Which is the email of the party that has used the services the most number of times?
original_query: SELECT t1.party_email FROM parties AS t1 JOIN party_services AS t2 ON t1.party_id  =  t2.customer_id GROUP BY t1.party_email ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the last name of the latest contact individual of the organization "Labour Party".
original_query: SELECT t3.individual_last_name FROM organizations AS t1 JOIN organization_contact_individuals AS t2 ON t1.organization_id  =  t2.organization_id JOIN individuals AS t3 ON t2.individual_id  =  t3.individual_id WHERE t1.organization_name  =  "Labour Party" ORDER BY t2.date_contact_to DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find name of the services that has never been used.
original_query: SELECT service_name FROM services EXCEPT SELECT t1.service_name FROM services AS t1 JOIN party_services AS t2 ON t1.service_id  =  t2.service_id

question: List all the types of forms.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT form_type_code FROM forms

question: How many cities are there in state "Colorado"?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM addresses WHERE state_province_county  =  "Colorado"

question: What are the names of the services that have never been used?
original_query: SELECT service_name FROM services EXCEPT SELECT t1.service_name FROM services AS t1 JOIN party_services AS t2 ON t1.service_id  =  t2.service_id

question: List all the name of organizations in order of the date formed.
original_query: SELECT organization_name FROM organizations ORDER BY date_formed ASC

question: What is the name of the party form that is most common?
original_query: SELECT t1.form_name FROM forms AS t1 JOIN party_forms AS t2 ON t1.form_id  =  t2.form_id GROUP BY t2.form_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of all cities and states?
original_query: SELECT town_city FROM addresses UNION SELECT state_province_county FROM addresses

question: Find the payment method code used by more than 3 parties.
original_query: SELECT payment_method_code FROM parties GROUP BY payment_method_code HAVING count(*)  >  3

question: What are the last names of individuals who have been contact individuals for an organization?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t1.individual_last_name FROM individuals AS t1 JOIN organization_contact_individuals AS t2 ON t1.individual_id  =  t2.individual_id

question: What are the first, middle, and last names of all individuals, ordered by last name?
original_query: SELECT individual_first_name ,  individual_middle_name ,  individual_last_name FROM individuals ORDER BY individual_last_name

question: Return the party email that has used party services the greatest number of times.
original_query: SELECT t1.party_email FROM parties AS t1 JOIN party_services AS t2 ON t1.party_id  =  t2.customer_id GROUP BY t1.party_email ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the name of the organization which has the most contact individuals.
original_query: SELECT t1.organization_name FROM organizations AS t1 JOIN organization_contact_individuals AS t2 ON t1.organization_id  =  t2.organization_id GROUP BY t1.organization_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the last name of the first ever contact person of the organization with the highest UK Vat number.
original_query: SELECT t3.individual_last_name FROM organizations AS t1 JOIN organization_contact_individuals AS t2 ON t1.organization_id  =  t2.organization_id JOIN individuals AS t3 ON t2.individual_id  =  t3.individual_id WHERE t1.uk_vat_number  =  (SELECT max(uk_vat_number) FROM organizations) ORDER BY t2.date_contact_to ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the payment method code and party phone of the party with the email 'enrico09@example.com'?
original_query: SELECT payment_method_code ,  party_phone FROM parties WHERE party_email  =  "enrico09@example.com"

question: What are the descriptions of the courses with name "database"?
original_query: SELECT course_description FROM COURSES WHERE course_name  =  "database"

question: Find the number of distinct courses that have enrolled students.
original_query: SELECT count(course_id) FROM Student_Course_Enrolment

question: Find the enrollment date for all the tests that have "Pass" result.
original_query: SELECT T1.date_of_enrolment FROM Student_Course_Enrolment AS T1 JOIN Student_Tests_Taken AS T2 ON T1.registration_id  =  T2.registration_id WHERE T2.test_result  =  "Pass"

question: Find the addresses and author IDs of the course authors that teach at least two courses.
original_query: SELECT T1.address_line_1 ,  T2.author_id FROM Course_Authors_and_Tutors AS T1 JOIN Courses AS T2 ON T1.author_id  =  T2.author_id GROUP BY T2.author_id HAVING Count(*)  >=  2

question: Find the personal name, family name, and author ID of the course author that teaches the most courses.
original_query: SELECT T1.personal_name ,  T1.family_name ,  T2.author_id FROM Course_Authors_and_Tutors AS T1 JOIN Courses AS T2 ON T1.author_id  =  T2.author_id GROUP BY T2.author_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the student ID and login name of the student who are enrolled in the most courses?
original_query: SELECT T1.student_id ,  T2.login_name FROM Student_Course_Enrolment AS T1 JOIN Students AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the subject ID, name of subject and the corresponding number of courses for each subject, and sort by the course count in ascending order.
original_query: SELECT T1.subject_id ,  T2.subject_name ,  COUNT(*) FROM Courses AS T1 JOIN Subjects AS T2 ON T1.subject_id  =  T2.subject_id GROUP BY T1.subject_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC

question: What are the addresses of the course authors who teach either "operating system" or "data structure" course.
original_query: SELECT T1.address_line_1 FROM Course_Authors_and_Tutors AS T1 JOIN Courses AS T2 ON T1.author_id  =  T2.author_id WHERE T2.course_name  =  "operating system" OR T2.course_name  =  "data structure"

question: Find the subject ID, subject name, and the corresponding number of available courses for each subject.

question: Which course author teaches the "advanced database" course? Give me his or her login name.
original_query: SELECT T1.login_name FROM Course_Authors_and_Tutors AS T1 JOIN Courses AS T2 ON T1.author_id  =  T2.author_id WHERE T2.course_name  =  "advanced database"

question: What are the student IDs and middle names of the students enrolled in at most two courses?
original_query: SELECT T1.student_id ,  T2.middle_name FROM Student_Course_Enrolment AS T1 JOIN Students AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING COUNT(*)  <=  2

question: What are the personal names used both by some course authors and some students?

question: Find the addresses of the course authors who teach the course with name "operating system" or "data structure".
original_query: SELECT T1.address_line_1 FROM Course_Authors_and_Tutors AS T1 JOIN Courses AS T2 ON T1.author_id  =  T2.author_id WHERE T2.course_name  =  "operating system" OR T2.course_name  =  "data structure"

question: Count the number of distinct governors.

question: Which committees have delegates from both democratic party and liberal party?

question: Show the name of the party that has the most delegates.

original_query: SELECT County_name FROM county ORDER BY Population ASC LIMIT 3

original_query: SELECT T1.County_name ,  COUNT(*) FROM county AS T1 JOIN election AS T2 ON T1.County_id  =  T2.District GROUP BY T1.County_id

original_query: SELECT Party ,  COUNT(*) FROM representative GROUP BY Party

question: Show the parties that have both representatives in New York state and representatives in Pennsylvania state.

original_query: SELECT T2.Date_of_Birth FROM entrepreneur AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID WHERE T1.Investor  =  "Simon Woodroffe" OR T1.Investor  =  "Peter Jones"

question: What are the names of people who are not entrepreneurs?

question: What are the dates of birth of entrepreneurs with investor "Simon Woodroffe" or "Peter Jones"?
original_query: SELECT T2.Date_of_Birth FROM entrepreneur AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID WHERE T1.Investor  =  "Simon Woodroffe" OR T1.Investor  =  "Peter Jones"

question: What are the names of people in ascending order of weight?

question: List the companies and the investors of entrepreneurs.

question: Return the names of entrepreneurs do no not have the investor Rachel Elnaugh.

question: Count the number of entrepreneurs.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM entrepreneur

question: Show the company of the tallest entrepreneur.
original_query: SELECT T1.Company FROM entrepreneur AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T2.Height DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the average money requested across all entrepreneurs.

question: What are the companies and investors that correspond to each entrepreneur?

question: Give the total money requested by entrepreneurs who are taller than 1.85.
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.Money_Requested) FROM entrepreneur AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID WHERE T2.Height  >  1.85

question: What is the average money requested by all entrepreneurs?
original_query: SELECT avg(Money_Requested) FROM entrepreneur

question: What is the total money requested by entrepreneurs with height more than 1.85?
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.Money_Requested) FROM entrepreneur AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID WHERE T2.Height  >  1.85

question: Find the name of the user who gives the most reviews.

question: Find the names of the items that did not receive any review.

question: How many different users wrote some reviews?

question: Find the number of items without any review.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM item WHERE i_id NOT IN (SELECT i_id FROM review)

question: Find the number of reviews.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM review

question: Find the name and id of the good with the highest average rank.
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T1.i_id FROM item AS T1 JOIN review AS T2 ON T1.i_id  =  T2.i_id GROUP BY T2.i_id ORDER BY avg(T2.rank) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the name and id of the item with the highest average rating.
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T1.i_id FROM item AS T1 JOIN review AS T2 ON T1.i_id  =  T2.i_id GROUP BY T2.i_id ORDER BY avg(T2.rating) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the number of items that did not receive any review.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM item WHERE i_id NOT IN (SELECT i_id FROM review)

question: Find the titles of items whose rating is higher than the average review rating of all items.

question: Find the name of the item with the lowest average rating.

question: List all information in the item table.
original_query: SELECT * FROM item

question: Find each target user's name and average trust score.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  avg(trust) FROM useracct AS T1 JOIN trust AS T2 ON T1.u_id  =  T2.target_u_id GROUP BY T2.target_u_id

question: For each user, find their name and the number of reviews written by them.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  count(*) FROM useracct AS T1 JOIN review AS T2 ON T1.u_id  =  T2.u_id GROUP BY T2.u_id

original_query: SELECT T1.Status FROM city AS T1 JOIN farm_competition AS T2 ON T1.City_ID  =  T2.Host_city_ID GROUP BY T2.Host_city_ID ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please show the themes of competitions with host cities having populations larger than 1000.
original_query: SELECT T2.Theme FROM city AS T1 JOIN farm_competition AS T2 ON T1.City_ID  =  T2.Host_city_ID WHERE T1.Population  >  1000

original_query: SELECT Census_Ranking FROM city WHERE Status !=  "Village"

original_query: SELECT Theme FROM farm_competition ORDER BY YEAR ASC

question: What are the titles of films and corresponding types of market estimations?

original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Employee AS T1 JOIN Certificate AS T2 ON T1.eid  =  T2.eid JOIN Aircraft AS T3 ON T3.aid  =  T2.aid WHERE T3.name  =  "Boeing 737-800" INTERSECT SELECT T1.name FROM Employee AS T1 JOIN Certificate AS T2 ON T1.eid  =  T2.eid JOIN Aircraft AS T3 ON T3.aid  =  T2.aid WHERE T3.name  =  "Airbus A340-300"

question: What are the names of all employees who have a certificate to fly Boeing 737-800?

question: Return the number of flights departing from Aberdeen.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRPORTS AS T2 ON T1.SourceAirport  =  T2.AirportCode WHERE T2.City  =  "Aberdeen"

question: Which city has the most frequent destination airport?
original_query: SELECT T1.City FROM AIRPORTS AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.AirportCode  =  T2.DestAirport GROUP BY T1.City ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many flights have destination ATO?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS WHERE DestAirport  =  "ATO"

question: Which airlines have departing flights from both APG and CVO airports?
original_query: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline WHERE T2.SourceAirport  =  "APG" INTERSECT SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline WHERE T2.SourceAirport  =  "CVO"

question: Which country does Airline "JetBlue Airways" belong to?
original_query: SELECT Country FROM AIRLINES WHERE Airline  =  "JetBlue Airways"

question: How many United Airlines flights go to City 'Aberdeen'?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRPORTS AS T2 ON T1.DestAirport  =  T2.AirportCode JOIN AIRLINES AS T3 ON T3.uid  =  T1.Airline WHERE T2.City  =  "Aberdeen" AND T3.Airline  =  "United Airlines"

question: Which airlines have a flight with source airport AHD?
original_query: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline WHERE T2.SourceAirport  =  "AHD"

question: Which abbreviation corresponds to Jetblue Airways?

question: How many flights depart from 'APG'?

question: What are flight numbers of flights departing from City "Aberdeen "?

question: Which city has most number of arriving flights?
original_query: SELECT T1.City FROM AIRPORTS AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.AirportCode  =  T2.DestAirport GROUP BY T1.City ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the code of the airport with the least flights.

question: Return the number of United Airlines flights leaving from AHD Airport.

question: What is the airport code of the airport with the most flights?
original_query: SELECT T1.AirportCode FROM AIRPORTS AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.AirportCode  =  T2.DestAirport OR T1.AirportCode  =  T2.SourceAirport GROUP BY T1.AirportCode ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find all airlines that have at least 10 flights.

original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM AIRLINES WHERE Country  =  "USA"

question: Find all airlines that have flights from airport 'CVO' but not from 'APG'.
original_query: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline WHERE T2.SourceAirport  =  "CVO" EXCEPT SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline WHERE T2.SourceAirport  =  "APG"

original_query: SELECT Airline ,  Abbreviation FROM AIRLINES WHERE Country  =  "USA"

question: Give the city and country for the Alton airport.
original_query: SELECT City ,  Country FROM AIRPORTS WHERE AirportName  =  "Alton"

question: Count the number of flights into ATO.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS WHERE DestAirport  =  "ATO"

question: Give the number of Jetblue Airways flights.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRLINES AS T2 ON T1.Airline  =  T2.uid WHERE T2.Airline = "JetBlue Airways"

question: How many flights depart from City Aberdeen?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRPORTS AS T2 ON T1.SourceAirport  =  T2.AirportCode WHERE T2.City  =  "Aberdeen"

question: Return the number of  airports.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM AIRPORTS

question: What are airlines that have some flight departing from airport 'AHD'?
original_query: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline WHERE T2.SourceAirport  =  "AHD"

question: How many flights does airline 'JetBlue Airways' have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRLINES AS T2 ON T1.Airline  =  T2.uid WHERE T2.Airline = "JetBlue Airways"

question: What is the code of airport that has the highest number of flights?
original_query: SELECT T1.AirportCode FROM AIRPORTS AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.AirportCode  =  T2.DestAirport OR T1.AirportCode  =  T2.SourceAirport GROUP BY T1.AirportCode ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the flight numbers of flights leaving from APG.
original_query: SELECT FlightNo FROM FLIGHTS WHERE SourceAirport  =  "APG"

question: Which airline has most number of flights?
original_query: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the name of airline which runs the most number of routes.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.alid  =  T2.alid GROUP BY T1.name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the name and city of the airport which is the source for the most number of flight routes.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.city ,  T2.src_apid FROM airports AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.apid  =  T2.src_apid GROUP BY T2.src_apid ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the number of routes with destination airport in Italy operated by the airline with name 'American Airlines'.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM routes AS T1 JOIN airports AS T2 ON T1.dst_apid  =  T2.apid JOIN airlines AS T3 ON T1.alid  =  T3.alid WHERE T2.country  =  'Italy' AND T3.name  =  'American Airlines'

question: What is the number of routes operated by the airline American Airlines whose destinations are in Italy?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM routes AS T1 JOIN airports AS T2 ON T1.dst_apid  =  T2.apid JOIN airlines AS T3 ON T1.alid  =  T3.alid WHERE T2.country  =  'Italy' AND T3.name  =  'American Airlines'

question: How many routes go from the United States to Canada?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM routes WHERE dst_apid IN (SELECT apid FROM airports WHERE country  =  'Canada') AND src_apid IN (SELECT apid FROM airports WHERE country  =  'United States')

question: Find the number of routes for each source airport and the airport name.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.name FROM airports AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.apid  =  T2.src_apid GROUP BY T1.name

question: How many airports are there per city in the United States? Order the cities by decreasing number of airports.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  city FROM airports WHERE country  =  'United States' GROUP BY city ORDER BY count(*) DESC

question: Find the name, city, and country of the airport that has the highest latitude.
original_query: SELECT name ,  city ,  country FROM airports ORDER BY elevation DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the number of cities in the United States with more than 3 airports?
original_query: SELECT city FROM airports WHERE country  =  'United States' GROUP BY city HAVING count(*)  >  3

question: List the cities which have more than 2 airports sorted by the number of airports.
original_query: SELECT city FROM airports GROUP BY city HAVING count(*)  >  2 ORDER BY count(*)

question: Which countries has the most number of airlines?
original_query: SELECT country FROM airlines GROUP BY country ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the airline with the most routes?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.alid  =  T2.alid GROUP BY T1.name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name, city, and country of the airport with the highest elevation?
original_query: SELECT name ,  city ,  country FROM airports ORDER BY elevation DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the cities which have more than one airport and number of airports.
original_query: SELECT city ,  count(*) FROM airports GROUP BY city HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: What are the names of the airports in the city of Goroka?
original_query: SELECT name FROM airports WHERE city  =  'Goroka'

question: Find the number of different airports which are the destinations of the American Airlines.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dst_apid) FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.alid  =  T2.alid WHERE T1.name  =  'American Airlines'

question: What are the countries with the most airlines whose active status is Y?
original_query: SELECT country FROM airlines WHERE active  =  'Y' GROUP BY country ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the id of the routes whose source and destination airports are in the United States?
original_query: SELECT rid FROM routes WHERE dst_apid IN (SELECT apid FROM airports WHERE country  =  'United States') AND src_apid IN (SELECT apid FROM airports WHERE country  =  'United States')

question: What is the name of the airport that is the destination of the most number of routes that start in China?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM airports AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.apid  =  T2.dst_apid WHERE T1.country  =  'China' GROUP BY T1.name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total number of routes for each country and airline in that country?
original_query: SELECT T1.country ,  T1.name ,  count(*) FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.alid  =  T2.alid GROUP BY T1.country ,  T1.name

question: Find the busiest destination airport that runs most number of routes in China.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM airports AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.apid  =  T2.dst_apid WHERE T1.country  =  'China' GROUP BY T1.name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the number of routes with destination airports in Italy.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM routes AS T1 JOIN airports AS T2 ON T1.dst_apid  =  T2.apid WHERE T2.country  =  'Italy'

question: How many airports are there per city in the US ordered from most to least?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  city FROM airports WHERE country  =  'United States' GROUP BY city ORDER BY count(*) DESC

question: What is the country of the airport with the highest elevation?
original_query: SELECT country FROM airports ORDER BY elevation DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name, city, and country of the airport with the lowest altitude?
original_query: SELECT name ,  city ,  country FROM airports ORDER BY elevation LIMIT 1

question: For the airline ids with the top 10 most routes operated, what are their names?
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T2.alid FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.alid  =  T2.alid GROUP BY T2.alid ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Find the number of routes from the United States to Canada.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM routes WHERE dst_apid IN (SELECT apid FROM airports WHERE country  =  'Canada') AND src_apid IN (SELECT apid FROM airports WHERE country  =  'United States')

question: For each country, what is the average elevation of that country's airports?
original_query: SELECT avg(elevation) ,  country FROM airports GROUP BY country

question: What is the number of different different airports that are destinations for American Airlines?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dst_apid) FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.alid  =  T2.alid WHERE T1.name  =  'American Airlines'

question: Find the id of routes whose source and destination airports are in the United States.
original_query: SELECT rid FROM routes WHERE dst_apid IN (SELECT apid FROM airports WHERE country  =  'United States') AND src_apid IN (SELECT apid FROM airports WHERE country  =  'United States')

question: In how many cities are there airports in the country of Greenland?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT city) FROM airports WHERE country  =  'Greenland'

question: For each country and airline name, how many routes are there?
original_query: SELECT T1.country ,  T1.name ,  count(*) FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.alid  =  T2.alid GROUP BY T1.country ,  T1.name

question: How many airports' names have the word Interanation in them?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM airports WHERE name LIKE '%International%'

question: How many routes end in a Canadian airport?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM airports AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.apid  =  T2.dst_apid WHERE country  =  'Canada'

question: Find the name and city of the airport which is the destination of the most number of routes.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.city ,  T2.dst_apid FROM airports AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.apid  =  T2.dst_apid GROUP BY T2.dst_apid ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many airlines operate out of each country in descending order?
original_query: SELECT country ,  count(*) FROM airlines GROUP BY country ORDER BY count(*) DESC

question: How many airlines are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM airlines

question: Find the number of routes operated by American Airlines.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.alid  =  T2.alid WHERE T1.name  =  'American Airlines'

question: Find the name, city, country, and altitude (or elevation) of the airports in the city of New York.
original_query: SELECT name ,  city ,  country ,  elevation FROM airports WHERE city  =  'New York'

question: For each  airport name, how many routes start at that airport, ordered from most to least?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.name FROM airports AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.apid  =  T2.src_apid GROUP BY T1.name ORDER BY count(*) DESC

question: How many airports are there per country? Order the countries by decreasing number of airports.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  country FROM airports GROUP BY country ORDER BY count(*) DESC

question: How many airports haven't the pilot 'Thompson' driven an aircraft?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM airport WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT airport_id FROM flight WHERE pilot  =  'Thompson' );

question: What are the ids and names of the companies that operated more than one flight?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM operate_company AS T1 JOIN flight AS t2 ON T1.id  =  T2.company_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: What are the names of the airports which are not in the country 'Iceland'?
original_query: SELECT name FROM airport WHERE country != 'Iceland'

question: List the id, country, city and name of the airports ordered alphabetically by the name.
original_query: SELECT id ,  country ,  city ,  name FROM airport ORDER BY name

question: What is the velocity of the pilot named 'Thompson'?
original_query: SELECT avg(velocity) FROM flight WHERE pilot  =  'Thompson'

question: List the name of the pilots who have flied for both a company that mainly provide 'Cargo' services and a company that runs 'Catering services' activities.
original_query: SELECT T2.pilot FROM operate_company AS T1 JOIN flight AS t2 ON T1.id  =  T2.company_id WHERE T1.principal_activities  =  'Cargo' INTERSECT SELECT T2.pilot FROM operate_company AS T1 JOIN flight AS t2 ON T1.id  =  T2.company_id WHERE T1.principal_activities  =  'Catering services'

question: List the vehicle flight number, date and pilot of all the flights, ordered by altitude.
original_query: SELECT vehicle_flight_number ,  date ,  pilot FROM flight ORDER BY altitude ASC

question: how many airports are there in each country?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  country FROM airport GROUP BY country

question: How many companies operates airlines in each airport?
original_query: SELECT T3.id ,  count(*) FROM operate_company AS T1 JOIN flight AS t2 ON T1.id  =  T2.company_id JOIN airport AS T3 ON T2.airport_id  =  T3.id GROUP BY T3.id

question: What is the maximum fastest lap speed in the Monaco Grand Prix in 2008?
original_query: SELECT max(T2.fastestlapspeed) FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid WHERE T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = "Monaco Grand Prix"

question: What are the names of all the circuits that are in the UK or Malaysia?
original_query: SELECT name FROM circuits WHERE country = "UK" OR country = "Malaysia"

question: Find the id, forename and number of races of all drivers who have at least participated in two races?
original_query: SELECT T1.driverid ,  T1.forename ,  count(*) FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid GROUP BY T1.driverid HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What is the id, forname and surname of the driver who had the first position in terms of laptime at least twice?
original_query: SELECT T1.driverid ,  T1.forename ,  T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN laptimes AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid WHERE POSITION  =  '1' GROUP BY T1.driverid HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What is the id and first name of all the drivers who participated in the Australian Grand Prix and the Chinese Grand Prix?
original_query: SELECT T2.driverid ,  T3.forename FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid  =  T3.driverid WHERE T1.name = "Australian Grand Prix" INTERSECT SELECT T2.driverid ,  T3.forename FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid  =  T3.driverid WHERE T1.name = "Chinese Grand Prix"

question: What is the id and stop number for each driver that has a shorter pit stop than the driver in the race with id 841?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT driverid ,  STOP FROM pitstops WHERE duration  <  (SELECT max(duration) FROM pitstops WHERE raceid  =  841)

question: What is the id and family name of the driver who has the longest laptime?
original_query: SELECT T1.driverid ,  T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN laptimes AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid ORDER BY T2.milliseconds DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average fastest lap speed for races held after 2004, for each race, ordered by year?
original_query: SELECT avg(T2.fastestlapspeed) ,  T1.name ,  T1.year FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid WHERE T1.year > 2014 GROUP BY T1.name ORDER BY T1.year

question: For each id of a driver who participated in at most 30 races, how many races did they participate in?
original_query: SELECT T1.driverid ,  count(*) FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid GROUP BY T1.driverid HAVING count(*)  <=  30

question: What are the numbers of races for each constructor id?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  constructorid FROM constructorStandings GROUP BY constructorid

question: What are the different ids and stop durations of all the drivers whose stop lasted longer than the driver in the race with the id 841?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT driverid ,  STOP FROM pitstops WHERE duration  >  (SELECT min(duration) FROM pitstops WHERE raceid  =  841)

question: What is the id, first name, and last name of the driver who was in the first position for laptime at least twice?
original_query: SELECT T1.driverid ,  T1.forename ,  T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN laptimes AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid WHERE POSITION  =  '1' GROUP BY T1.driverid HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What are the forenames and surnames of all unique drivers who had a lap time of less than 93000 milliseconds?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.forename ,  T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN laptimes AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid WHERE T2.milliseconds < 93000

question: Find the id and surname of the driver who participated the most number of races?
original_query: SELECT T1.driverid ,  T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid GROUP BY T1.driverid ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the names of all distinct races in reversed  lexicographic order?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM races ORDER BY name DESC

question: What are the names of all races that occurred after 12:00:00 or before 09:00:00?
original_query: SELECT name FROM races WHERE TIME > "12:00:00" OR TIME < "09:00:00"

question: Find the distinct driver id and the stop number of all drivers that have a shorter pit stop duration than some drivers in the race with id 841.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT driverid ,  STOP FROM pitstops WHERE duration  <  (SELECT max(duration) FROM pitstops WHERE raceid  =  841)

question: Give me a list of names and years of races that had any driver whose forename is Lewis?
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T2.year FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid WHERE T3.forename = "Lewis"

question: For each race name, What is the maximum fastest lap speed for races after 2004 ordered by year?
original_query: SELECT max(T2.fastestlapspeed) ,  T1.name ,  T1.year FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid WHERE T1.year > 2014 GROUP BY T1.name ORDER BY T1.year

question: What is the forename and surname of the driver with the shortest laptime?
original_query: SELECT T1.forename ,  T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN laptimes AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid ORDER BY T2.milliseconds LIMIT 1

question: What are the names and years of all races that had a driver with the last name Lewis?
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T2.year FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid WHERE T3.forename = "Lewis"

question: What is the name of the race held most recently?
original_query: SELECT name FROM races ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average fastest lap speed for the Monaco Grand Prix in 2008?
original_query: SELECT avg(T2.fastestlapspeed) FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid WHERE T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = "Monaco Grand Prix"

question: What is the name and date of the most recent race?
original_query: SELECT name ,  date FROM races ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the drivers' first names,last names, and ids for all those that had more than 8 stops or participated in more than 5 races?
original_query: SELECT T1.forename ,  T1.surname ,  T1.driverid FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN pitstops AS T2 ON T1.driverid  =  T2.driverid GROUP BY T1.driverid HAVING count(*)  >  8 UNION SELECT T1.forename ,  T1.surname ,  T1.driverid FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid  =  T2.driverid GROUP BY T1.driverid HAVING count(*)  >  5

question: What are the names of all the Japanese constructors that have earned more than 5 points?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM constructors AS T1 JOIN constructorstandings AS T2 ON T1.constructorid = T2.constructorid WHERE T1.nationality = "Japanese" AND T2.points > 5

question: What are the names of circuits that belong to UK or Malaysia?
original_query: SELECT name FROM circuits WHERE country = "UK" OR country = "Malaysia"

question: What is the first and last name of all the German drivers?
original_query: SELECT forename ,  surname FROM drivers WHERE nationality = "German"

question: What are the drivers' last names and id who had 11 pit stops and participated in more than 5 race results?
original_query: SELECT T1.surname ,  T1.driverid FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN pitstops AS T2 ON T1.driverid  =  T2.driverid GROUP BY T1.driverid HAVING count(*)  =  11 INTERSECT SELECT T1.surname ,  T1.driverid FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid  =  T2.driverid GROUP BY T1.driverid HAVING count(*)  >  5

question: How many drivers participated in the race Australian Grand Prix held in 2009?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid WHERE T2.name = "Australian Grand Prix" AND YEAR = 2009

question: What are the names of races held after 12:00:00 or before 09:00:00?
original_query: SELECT name FROM races WHERE TIME > "12:00:00" OR TIME < "09:00:00"

question: What are the unique names of all race held between 2014 and 2017?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM races WHERE YEAR BETWEEN 2014 AND 2017

question: How many drivers were in the Australian Grand Prix held in 2009?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid WHERE T2.name = "Australian Grand Prix" AND YEAR = 2009

question: Find the forename and surname of drivers whose nationality is German?
original_query: SELECT forename ,  surname FROM drivers WHERE nationality = "German"

question: What are the names of races that were held after 2017 and the circuits were in the country of Spain?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM races AS T1 JOIN circuits AS T2 ON T1.circuitid = T2.circuitid WHERE T2.country = "Spain" AND T1.year > 2017

question: What are the first and last names of all drivers who participated in the Australian Grand Prix but not the Chinese Grand Prix?
original_query: SELECT T3.forename ,  T3.surname FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid WHERE T1.name = "Australian Grand Prix" EXCEPT SELECT T3.forename ,  T3.surname FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid WHERE T1.name = "Chinese Grand Prix"

question: What are the names of races held between 2009 and 2011?
original_query: SELECT name FROM races WHERE YEAR BETWEEN 2009 AND 2011

question: What is the name of the race that occurred most recently?
original_query: SELECT name FROM races ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the driver id and number of races of all drivers who have at most participated in 30 races?
original_query: SELECT T1.driverid ,  count(*) FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid GROUP BY T1.driverid HAVING count(*)  <=  30

question: What is the first and last name of the student who played the most sports?
original_query: SELECT T2.Fname ,  T2.Lname FROM Sportsinfo AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.StuID GROUP BY T1.StuID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many sports do we have?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT sportname) FROM Sportsinfo

question: What is the total number of games played?
original_query: SELECT sum(gamesplayed) FROM Sportsinfo

question: What are the first names and ages of all students who are playing both Football and Lacrosse?
original_query: SELECT fname ,  age FROM Student WHERE StuID IN (SELECT StuID FROM Sportsinfo WHERE SportName  =  "Football" INTERSECT SELECT StuID FROM Sportsinfo WHERE SportName  =  "Lacrosse")

question: Show all student ids and the number of hours played.
original_query: SELECT Stuid ,  sum(hours_played) FROM Plays_games GROUP BY Stuid

question: How many students play each sport?
original_query: SELECT sportname ,  count(*) FROM Sportsinfo GROUP BY sportname

question: Show all male student ids who don't play football.
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM Student WHERE sex  =  'M' EXCEPT SELECT StuID FROM Sportsinfo WHERE sportname  =  "Football"

question: What are the first names for all students who are from the major numbered 600?
original_query: SELECT Fname FROM Student WHERE Major  =  600

question: What are the names of all the games that have been played for at least 1000 hours?
original_query: SELECT gname FROM Plays_games AS T1 JOIN Video_games AS T2 ON T1.gameid  =  T2.gameid GROUP BY T1.gameid HAVING sum(hours_played)  >=  1000

question: What are ids and total number of hours played for each game?
original_query: SELECT gameid ,  sum(hours_played) FROM Plays_games GROUP BY gameid

question: What is the sport with the most scholarship students?
original_query: SELECT sportname FROM Sportsinfo WHERE onscholarship  =  'Y' GROUP BY sportname ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which sport has most number of students on scholarship?
original_query: SELECT sportname FROM Sportsinfo WHERE onscholarship  =  'Y' GROUP BY sportname ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show all game names played by Linda Smith
original_query: SELECT Gname FROM Plays_games AS T1 JOIN Video_games AS T2 ON T1.gameid  =  T2.gameid JOIN Student AS T3 ON T3.Stuid  =  T1.Stuid WHERE T3.Lname  =  "Smith" AND T3.Fname  =  "Linda"

question: How many video games do you have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Video_games

question: How many games are played for all football games by students on scholarship?
original_query: SELECT sum(gamesplayed) FROM Sportsinfo WHERE sportname  =  "Football" AND onscholarship  =  'Y'

question: What are the ids of all students who have advisor number 1121?
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM Student WHERE Advisor  =  1121

question: What are the different types of video games?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT gtype FROM Video_games

question: Show total hours per week and number of games played for student David Shieber.
original_query: SELECT sum(hoursperweek) ,  sum(gamesplayed) FROM Sportsinfo AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.StuID WHERE T2.Fname  =  "David" AND T2.Lname  =  "Shieber"

question: Show all video game types and the number of video games in each type.
original_query: SELECT gtype ,  count(*) FROM Video_games GROUP BY gtype

question: What are the advisors
original_query: SELECT advisor FROM Student GROUP BY advisor HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What is the name of the game that has been played the most?
original_query: SELECT gname FROM Plays_games AS T1 JOIN Video_games AS T2 ON T1.gameid  =  T2.gameid GROUP BY T1.gameid ORDER BY sum(hours_played) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the game name that has most number of hours played.
original_query: SELECT gname FROM Plays_games AS T1 JOIN Video_games AS T2 ON T1.gameid  =  T2.gameid GROUP BY T1.gameid ORDER BY sum(hours_played) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show all advisors who have at least two students.
original_query: SELECT advisor FROM Student GROUP BY advisor HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Show student ids who don't have any sports.
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM Student EXCEPT SELECT StuID FROM Sportsinfo

question: How many video games exist?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Video_games

question: Which game type has least number of games?
original_query: SELECT gtype FROM Video_games GROUP BY gtype ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: How many different students are involved in sports?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT StuID) FROM Sportsinfo

question: What type has the most games?
original_query: SELECT gtype FROM Video_games GROUP BY gtype ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the first name and age of the students who are playing both Football and Lacrosse.
original_query: SELECT fname ,  age FROM Student WHERE StuID IN (SELECT StuID FROM Sportsinfo WHERE SportName  =  "Football" INTERSECT SELECT StuID FROM Sportsinfo WHERE SportName  =  "Lacrosse")

question: Show ids of students who play video game and play sports.
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM Sportsinfo INTERSECT SELECT StuID FROM Plays_games

question: Show total hours per week and number of games played for students under 20.
original_query: SELECT sum(hoursperweek) ,  sum(gamesplayed) FROM Sportsinfo AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.StuID WHERE T2.age  <  20

question: Show all video games with type Collectible card game.
original_query: SELECT gname FROM Video_games WHERE gtype  =  "Collectible card game"

question: What are the ids of all students who are not video game players?
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM Student EXCEPT SELECT StuID FROM Plays_games

question: What is the type of video game Call of Destiny.
original_query: SELECT gtype FROM Video_games WHERE gname  =  "Call of Destiny"

question: Show student ids who are on scholarship and have major 600.
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM Student WHERE major  =  600 INTERSECT SELECT StuID FROM Sportsinfo WHERE onscholarship  =  'Y'

question: What are the ids of all students who live in CHI?
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM Student WHERE city_code  =  "CHI"

question: Show all video games and their types in the order of their names.
original_query: SELECT gname ,  gtype FROM Video_games ORDER BY gname

question: What are the ids of all students who played video games and sports?
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM Sportsinfo INTERSECT SELECT StuID FROM Plays_games

question: Show all game ids and the number of hours played.
original_query: SELECT gameid ,  sum(hours_played) FROM Plays_games GROUP BY gameid

question: Count the number of video games with Massively multiplayer online game type .
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Video_games WHERE gtype  =  "Massively multiplayer online game"

question: Show all sport name and the number of students.
original_query: SELECT sportname ,  count(*) FROM Sportsinfo GROUP BY sportname

question: Show ids of students who don't play video game.
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM Student EXCEPT SELECT StuID FROM Plays_games

question: How many students play video games?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT StuID) FROM Plays_games

question: For each injury accident, find the date of the game and the name of the injured player in the game, and sort the results in descending order of game season.
original_query: SELECT T1.date ,  T2.player FROM game AS T1 JOIN injury_accident AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.game_id ORDER BY T1.season DESC

question: How many games has each stadium held?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  count(*) FROM stadium AS T1 JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.stadium_id GROUP BY T1.id

question: How many games are held after season 2007?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM game WHERE season  >  2007

question: How many games are free of injury accidents?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM game WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT game_id FROM injury_accident )

question: What are the id and name of the stadium where the most injury accidents happened?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM stadium AS T1 JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.stadium_id JOIN injury_accident AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.game_id GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the ids, scores, and dates of the games which caused at least two injury accidents?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.score ,  T1.date FROM game AS T1 JOIN injury_accident AS T2 ON T2.game_id  =  T1.id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: How many distinct kinds of injuries happened after season 2010?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.injury) FROM injury_accident AS T1 JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.game_id  =  T2.id WHERE T2.season  >  2010

question: In which season and which stadium did any player have an injury of 'Foot injury' or 'Knee problem'?
original_query: SELECT T1.season ,  T2.name FROM game AS T1 JOIN stadium AS T2 ON T1.stadium_id  =  T2.id JOIN injury_accident AS T3 ON T1.id  =  T3.game_id WHERE T3.injury  =  'Foot injury' OR T3.injury  =  'Knee problem'

question: Which stadium name contains the substring "Bank"?
original_query: SELECT name FROM stadium WHERE name LIKE "%Bank%"

question: What are the different main industries for all companies?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT main_industry FROM company

question: find the location and Representative name of the gas stations owned by the companies with top 3 Asset amounts.
original_query: SELECT T3.location ,  T3.Representative_Name FROM station_company AS T1 JOIN company AS T2 ON T1.company_id  =  T2.company_id JOIN gas_station AS T3 ON T1.station_id  =  T3.station_id ORDER BY T2.Assets_billion DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many gas station are opened between 2000 and 2005?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM gas_station WHERE open_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005

question: What are the headquarters without companies that are in the banking industry?
original_query: SELECT headquarters FROM company EXCEPT SELECT headquarters FROM company WHERE main_industry  =  'Banking'

question: For each headquarter, what are the headquarter and how many companies are centered there?
original_query: SELECT headquarters ,  count(*) FROM company GROUP BY headquarters

question: order all gas station locations by the opening year.
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM gas_station ORDER BY open_year

question: What is the total number of companies?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM company

question: What are the main industries of the companies without gas stations and what are the companies?
original_query: SELECT company ,  main_industry FROM company WHERE company_id NOT IN (SELECT company_id FROM station_company)

question: Show the manager name for gas stations belonging to the ExxonMobil company.
original_query: SELECT T3.manager_name FROM station_company AS T1 JOIN company AS T2 ON T1.company_id  =  T2.company_id JOIN gas_station AS T3 ON T1.station_id  =  T3.station_id WHERE T2.company  =  'ExxonMobil'

question: What are the names and headquarters of all companies ordered by descending market value?
original_query: SELECT company ,  headquarters FROM company ORDER BY market_value DESC

question: What are the gas station ids, locations, and manager names for the gas stations ordered by opening year?
original_query: SELECT station_id ,  LOCATION ,  manager_name FROM gas_station ORDER BY open_year

question: Show headquarters with at least two companies in the banking industry.
original_query: SELECT headquarters FROM company WHERE main_industry  =  'Banking' GROUP BY headquarters HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What are the names of the managers for gas stations that are operated by the ExxonMobil company?
original_query: SELECT T3.manager_name FROM station_company AS T1 JOIN company AS T2 ON T1.company_id  =  T2.company_id JOIN gas_station AS T3 ON T1.station_id  =  T3.station_id WHERE T2.company  =  'ExxonMobil'

question: Show the manager name with most number of gas stations opened after 2000.
original_query: SELECT manager_name FROM gas_station WHERE open_year  >  2000 GROUP BY manager_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the rank, company, and market value of every comapny in the banking industry ordered by sales and profits?
original_query: SELECT rank ,  company ,  market_value FROM company WHERE main_industry  =  'Banking' ORDER BY sales_billion ,  profits_billion

question: Show all locations where a gas station for company with market value greater than 100 is located.
original_query: SELECT T3.location FROM station_company AS T1 JOIN company AS T2 ON T1.company_id  =  T2.company_id JOIN gas_station AS T3 ON T1.station_id  =  T3.station_id WHERE T2.market_value  >  100

question: What are the headquarters with at least two companies in the banking industry?
original_query: SELECT headquarters FROM company WHERE main_industry  =  'Banking' GROUP BY headquarters HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What are the headquarters that have both a company in the banking and 'oil and gas' industries?
original_query: SELECT headquarters FROM company WHERE main_industry  =  'Banking' INTERSECT SELECT headquarters FROM company WHERE main_industry  =  'Oil and gas'

question: For each main industry, what is the total number of companies for the industry with the highest total market value?
original_query: SELECT main_industry ,  count(*) FROM company GROUP BY main_industry ORDER BY sum(market_value) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the locations of all the gas stations ordered by opening year?
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM gas_station ORDER BY open_year

question: Show all main industry for all companies.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT main_industry FROM company

question: find the rank, company names, market values of the companies in the banking industry order by their sales and profits in billion.
original_query: SELECT rank ,  company ,  market_value FROM company WHERE main_industry  =  'Banking' ORDER BY sales_billion ,  profits_billion

question: What is the name of the manager with the most gas stations that opened after 2000?
original_query: SELECT manager_name FROM gas_station WHERE open_year  >  2000 GROUP BY manager_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: what is the largest city in smallest state through which the mississippi runs
original_query: SELECT city_name FROM city WHERE state_name IN ( SELECT state_name FROM state WHERE state_name IN ( SELECT traverse FROM river WHERE river_name  =  "mississippi" ) AND area  =  ( SELECT MIN ( area ) FROM state WHERE state_name IN ( SELECT traverse FROM river WHERE river_name  =  "mississippi" ) ) ) ORDER BY population DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Which services are used by the customer "Hardy Kutch" or are rated as "good" in a customer interaction? Give me the service details.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t3.service_details FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customers_and_services AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id JOIN services AS t3 ON t2.service_id  =  t3.service_id JOIN customer_interactions AS t4 ON t3.service_id  =  t4.service_id WHERE t1.customer_details  =  "Hardy Kutch" OR t4.services_and_channels_details  =  "good"

question: Which services were used by customers by more than 3 times? Give me the service details.
original_query: SELECT t1.service_details FROM services AS t1 JOIN customers_and_services AS t2 ON t1.service_id  =  t2.service_id GROUP BY t1.service_details HAVING count(*)  >  3

question: Find details of all the services that have been marked as `` unsatisfied '' in customers and services details .
original_query: select distinct t1.service_details from services as t1 join customers_and_services as t2 on t1.service_id  =  t2.service_id where t2.customers_and_services_details  =  "unsatisfied"
