original_query: SELECT T2.product_name FROM problems AS T1 JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.product_id = T2.product_id GROUP BY T2.product_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the product ids for the problems reported by Christop Berge with closure authorised by Ashley Medhurst?
original_query: SELECT product_id FROM problems AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.reported_by_staff_id = T2.staff_id WHERE T2.staff_first_name = "Christop" AND T2.staff_last_name = "Berge" INTERSECT SELECT product_id FROM problems AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.closure_authorised_by_staff_id = T2.staff_id WHERE T2.staff_first_name = "Ashley" AND T2.staff_last_name = "Medhurst"

question: What is the list of distinct product names sorted by product id?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT product_name FROM product ORDER BY product_id

question: List the problem id and log id which are assigned to the staff named Rylan Homenick.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.problem_id ,  T2.problem_log_id FROM staff AS T1 JOIN problem_log AS T2 ON T1.staff_id = T2.assigned_to_staff_id WHERE T1.staff_first_name = "Rylan" AND T1.staff_last_name = "Homenick"

question: Which problems are reported by the staff with last name "Bosco"? Show the ids of the problems.
original_query: SELECT T1.problem_id FROM problems AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.reported_by_staff_id = T2.staff_id WHERE T2.staff_last_name = "Bosco"

question: For each product that has problems, find the number of problems reported after 1986-11-13 and the product id?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T2.product_id FROM problems AS T1 JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.product_id = T2.product_id WHERE T1.date_problem_reported > "1986-11-13" GROUP BY T2.product_id

question: Which problems are reported by the staff with first name "Christop"? Show the descriptions of the problems.
original_query: SELECT T1.problem_description FROM problems AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.reported_by_staff_id = T2.staff_id WHERE T2.staff_first_name = "Christop"

question: For which product was there a problem reported by Christop Berge, with closure authorised by Ashley Medhurst? Return the product ids.
original_query: SELECT product_id FROM problems AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.reported_by_staff_id = T2.staff_id WHERE T2.staff_first_name = "Christop" AND T2.staff_last_name = "Berge" INTERSECT SELECT product_id FROM problems AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.closure_authorised_by_staff_id = T2.staff_id WHERE T2.staff_first_name = "Ashley" AND T2.staff_last_name = "Medhurst"

question: Which problems were reported before the date of any problem reported by the staff Lysanne Turcotte? Give me the ids of the problems.
original_query: SELECT T1.problem_id FROM problems AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.reported_by_staff_id = T2.staff_id WHERE date_problem_reported  <  ( SELECT min(date_problem_reported) FROM problems AS T3 JOIN staff AS T4 ON T3.reported_by_staff_id = T4.staff_id WHERE T4.staff_first_name = "Lysanne" AND T4.staff_last_name = "Turcotte" )

question: What is the id of the problem log that is created most recently?
original_query: SELECT problem_log_id FROM problem_log ORDER BY log_entry_date DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the ids of the problems reported after 1978-06-26.
original_query: SELECT problem_id FROM problems WHERE date_problem_reported > "1978-06-26"

question: Which problems were reported by the staff named Dameon Frami or Jolie Weber? Give me the ids of the problems.
original_query: SELECT product_id FROM problems AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.reported_by_staff_id = T2.staff_id WHERE T2.staff_first_name = "Dameon" AND T2.staff_last_name = "Frami" UNION SELECT product_id FROM problems AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.reported_by_staff_id = T2.staff_id WHERE T2.staff_first_name = "Jolie" AND T2.staff_last_name = "Weber"

question: How many train stations are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM station

question: Show station names without any trains.
original_query: SELECT name FROM station WHERE station_id NOT IN (SELECT station_id FROM train_station)

question: Show all locations that have train stations with at least 15 platforms and train stations with more than 25 total passengers.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT LOCATION FROM station WHERE number_of_platforms  >=  15 AND total_passengers  >  25

question: Show the station name with greatest number of trains.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM train_station AS T1 JOIN station AS T2 ON T1.station_id  =  T2.station_id GROUP BY T1.station_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: show the train name and station name for each train.
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T3.name FROM train_station AS T1 JOIN station AS T2 ON T1.station_id  =  T2.station_id JOIN train AS T3 ON T3.train_id  =  T1.train_id

question: Show the names and main services for train stations that have the top three total number of passengers.
original_query: SELECT name ,  main_services FROM station ORDER BY total_passengers DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the names of the trains that do not pass any station located in London.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM train_station AS T1 JOIN train AS T2 ON T1.train_id  =  T2.train_id WHERE T1.station_id NOT IN (SELECT T4.station_id FROM train_station AS T3 JOIN station AS T4 ON T3.station_id  =  T4.station_id WHERE t4.location  =  "London")

question: What are the names of the stations which serve both "Ananthapuri Express" and "Guruvayur Express" trains?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM train_station AS T1 JOIN station AS T2 ON T1.station_id  =  T2.station_id JOIN train AS T3 ON T3.train_id  =  T1.train_id WHERE T3.Name  =  "Ananthapuri Express" INTERSECT SELECT T2.name FROM train_station AS T1 JOIN station AS T2 ON T1.station_id  =  T2.station_id JOIN train AS T3 ON T3.train_id  =  T1.train_id WHERE T3.Name  =  "Guruvayur Express"

question: What are all locations of train stations?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT LOCATION FROM station

question: Show all locations which don't have a train station with at least 15 platforms.
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM station EXCEPT SELECT LOCATION FROM station WHERE number_of_platforms  >=  15

question: Show the names and total passengers for all train stations not in London.
original_query: SELECT name ,  total_passengers FROM station WHERE LOCATION != 'London'

question: Show the transmitters of radios and the station names of the channels they are associated with in descending order of the ERP of the radios.
original_query: SELECT T3.Transmitter ,  T2.Station_name FROM city_channel_radio AS T1 JOIN city_channel AS T2 ON T1.City_channel_ID  =  T2.ID JOIN radio AS T3 ON T1.Radio_ID  =  T3.Radio_ID ORDER BY T3.ERP_kW DESC

question: Show the transmitters of radios and the cities of the channels they are associated with.
original_query: SELECT T3.Transmitter ,  T2.City FROM city_channel_radio AS T1 JOIN city_channel AS T2 ON T1.City_channel_ID  =  T2.ID JOIN radio AS T3 ON T1.Radio_ID  =  T3.Radio_ID

question: What are the names and original air dates of tv shows?
original_query: SELECT tv_show_name ,  Original_Airdate FROM tv_show

question: What is the transmitter of the radio with the largest ERP_kW?
original_query: SELECT Transmitter FROM radio ORDER BY ERP_kW DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the transmitters of the radios and the number of city channels they are associated with.
original_query: SELECT T2.Transmitter ,  COUNT(*) FROM city_channel_radio AS T1 JOIN radio AS T2 ON T1.Radio_ID  =  T2.Radio_ID GROUP BY T2.Transmitter

question: List the station names of city channels whose affiliation is not "ABC".
original_query: SELECT Station_name FROM city_channel WHERE Affiliation != "ABC"

question: Show the transmitters of radios whose ERP is bigger than 150 or smaller than 30.
original_query: SELECT Transmitter FROM radio WHERE ERP_kW  >  150 OR ERP_kW  <  30

question: What are the countries that have cartoons on TV that were written by Todd Casey?
original_query: SELECT T1.country FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T2.written_by  =  'Todd Casey'

question: What is the series name and country of all TV channels that are playing cartoons directed by Ben Jones and cartoons directed by Michael Chang?
original_query: SELECT T1.series_name ,  T1.country FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T2.directed_by  =  'Michael Chang' INTERSECT SELECT T1.series_name ,  T1.country FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T2.directed_by  =  'Ben Jones'

question: What are the languages used by the least number of TV Channels and how many channels use it?
original_query: SELECT LANGUAGE ,  count(*) FROM TV_Channel GROUP BY LANGUAGE ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the content of TV Channel with serial name "Sky Radio"?
original_query: SELECT Content FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = "Sky Radio";

question: What is the number of cartoones written by Joseph Kuhr?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Cartoon WHERE Written_by = "Joseph Kuhr";

question: What is the weekly rank for the episode "A Love of a Lifetime"?
original_query: SELECT Weekly_Rank FROM TV_series WHERE Episode = "A Love of a Lifetime";

question: What are the ids of all tv channels that have more than 2 TV channels?
original_query: SELECT id FROM tv_channel GROUP BY country HAVING count(*)  >  2

question: What is the name of the series that has the episode "A Love of a Lifetime"?
original_query: SELECT T1.series_name FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN TV_series AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T2.Episode = "A Love of a Lifetime";

question: What are the titles of all cartoons directed by Ben Jones or Brandon Vietti?
original_query: SELECT Title FROM Cartoon WHERE Directed_by = "Ben Jones" OR Directed_by = "Brandon Vietti";

question: What are the package options of all tv channels that are not playing any cartoons directed by Ben Jones?
original_query: SELECT package_option FROM TV_Channel WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT channel FROM cartoon WHERE directed_by  =  'Ben Jones')

question: What is the air date of TV series with Episode "A Love of a Lifetime"?
original_query: SELECT Air_Date FROM TV_series WHERE Episode = "A Love of a Lifetime";

question: What is the TV Channel that shows the cartoon "The Rise of the Blue Beetle!"? List the TV Channel's series name.
original_query: SELECT T1.series_name FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T2.Title = "The Rise of the Blue Beetle!";

question: How many TV Channels use the English language?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM TV_Channel WHERE LANGUAGE = "English";

question: What are all of the episodes ordered by ratings?
original_query: SELECT Episode FROM TV_series ORDER BY rating

question: How many TV Channel using language English?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM TV_Channel WHERE LANGUAGE = "English";

question: find the pixel aspect ratio and nation of the tv channels that do not use English.
original_query: SELECT Pixel_aspect_ratio_PAR ,  country FROM tv_channel WHERE LANGUAGE != 'English'

question: List the title of all cartoon directed by "Ben Jones" or "Brandon Vietti".
original_query: SELECT Title FROM Cartoon WHERE Directed_by = "Ben Jones" OR Directed_by = "Brandon Vietti";

question: What are the ids of the TV channels that do not have any cartoons directed by Ben Jones?
original_query: SELECT id FROM TV_Channel EXCEPT SELECT channel FROM cartoon WHERE directed_by  =  'Ben Jones'

question: which countries' tv channels are not playing any cartoon written by Todd Casey?
original_query: SELECT country FROM TV_Channel EXCEPT SELECT T1.country FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T2.written_by  =  'Todd Casey'

question: What are the Package Options of the TV Channels whose series names are Sky Radio?
original_query: SELECT Package_Option FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = "Sky Radio";

question: List the Episode of all TV series sorted by rating.
original_query: SELECT Episode FROM TV_series ORDER BY rating

question: What is the episode for the TV series named "Sky Radio"?
original_query: SELECT T2.Episode FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN TV_series AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T1.series_name = "Sky Radio";

question: What is Weekly Rank of TV series with Episode "A Love of a Lifetime"?
original_query: SELECT Weekly_Rank FROM TV_series WHERE Episode = "A Love of a Lifetime";

question: Which country has the most of TV Channels? List the country and number of TV Channels it has.
original_query: SELECT Country ,  count(*) FROM TV_Channel GROUP BY Country ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many cartoons did each director create?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  Directed_by FROM cartoon GROUP BY Directed_by

question: What is the name and directors of all the cartoons that are ordered by air date?
original_query: SELECT title ,  Directed_by FROM Cartoon ORDER BY Original_air_date

question: What is the country with the most number of TV Channels and how many does it have?
original_query: SELECT Country ,  count(*) FROM TV_Channel GROUP BY Country ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Find the package choice and series name of the TV channel that has high definition TV.
original_query: SELECT package_option ,  series_name FROM TV_Channel WHERE hight_definition_TV  =  "yes"

question: What is minimum and maximum share of TV series?
original_query: SELECT max(SHARE) , min(SHARE) FROM TV_series;

question: List all cartoon directed by "Ben Jones".
original_query: SELECT Title FROM Cartoon WHERE Directed_by = "Ben Jones";

question: What is the maximum and minimum share for the TV series?
original_query: SELECT max(SHARE) , min(SHARE) FROM TV_series;

question: What is the partition id of the user named "Iron Man".
original_query: SELECT partitionid FROM user_profiles WHERE name  =  'Iron Man'

question: List the text of all tweets in the order of date.
original_query: SELECT text FROM tweets ORDER BY createdate

question: Find the name of each user and number of tweets tweeted by each of them.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  count(*) FROM user_profiles AS T1 JOIN tweets AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.uid GROUP BY T2.uid

question: Find the name and email of the user whose name contains the word ‘Swift’.
original_query: SELECT name ,  email FROM user_profiles WHERE name LIKE '%Swift%'

question: Find the average number of followers for the users who had some tweets.
original_query: SELECT avg(followers) FROM user_profiles WHERE UID IN (SELECT UID FROM tweets)

question: Find the number of tweets in record.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM tweets

question: Find the id of users who are followed by Mary and Susan.
original_query: SELECT T2.f1 FROM user_profiles AS T1 JOIN follows AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.f2 WHERE T1.name  =  "Mary" INTERSECT SELECT T2.f1 FROM user_profiles AS T1 JOIN follows AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.f2 WHERE T1.name  =  "Susan"

question: List the names of 5 users followed by the largest number of other users.
original_query: SELECT name FROM user_profiles ORDER BY followers DESC LIMIT 5

question: Find the name and partition id for users who tweeted less than twice.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.partitionid FROM user_profiles AS T1 JOIN tweets AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.uid GROUP BY T2.uid HAVING count(*)  <  2

question: List the name and number of followers for each user, and sort the results by the number of followers in descending order.
original_query: SELECT name ,  followers FROM user_profiles ORDER BY followers DESC

question: Find the name of the user who has the largest number of followers.
original_query: SELECT name FROM user_profiles ORDER BY followers DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the names of the users whose number of followers is greater than that of the user named "Tyler Swift".
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM user_profiles AS T1 JOIN follows AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.f1 GROUP BY T2.f1 HAVING count(*)  >  (SELECT count(*) FROM user_profiles AS T1 JOIN follows AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.f1 WHERE T1.name  =  'Tyler Swift')

question: Return the text of tweets about the topic 'intern'.
original_query: SELECT text FROM tweets WHERE text LIKE '%intern%'

question: Show the enrollment and primary_conference of the oldest college.
original_query: SELECT enrollment ,  primary_conference FROM university ORDER BY founded LIMIT 1

question: Find the number of universities that have over a 20000 enrollment size for each affiliation type.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  affiliation FROM university WHERE enrollment  >  20000 GROUP BY affiliation

question: How many schools are in the basketball match?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT school_id) FROM basketball_match

question: What are the schools that were either founded before 1850 or are public?
original_query: SELECT school FROM university WHERE founded  >  1850 OR affiliation  =  'Public'

question: Find the total number of students enrolled in the colleges that were founded after the year of 1850 for each affiliation type.
original_query: SELECT sum(Enrollment) ,  affiliation FROM university WHERE founded  >  1850 GROUP BY affiliation

question: What is the founded year of the non public school that was founded most recently?
original_query: SELECT founded FROM university WHERE affiliation != 'Public' ORDER BY founded DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of all the teams in the basketball competition, sorted by all home scores in descending order?
original_query: SELECT team_name FROM basketball_match ORDER BY All_Home DESC

question: When was the school with the largest enrollment founded?
original_query: SELECT founded FROM university ORDER BY enrollment DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the team names of the universities whose enrollments are smaller than the average enrollment size.
original_query: SELECT t2.team_name FROM university AS t1 JOIN basketball_match AS t2 ON t1.school_id  =  t2.school_id WHERE enrollment  <  (SELECT avg(enrollment) FROM university)

question: What are the enrollment and primary conference for the university which was founded the earliest?
original_query: SELECT enrollment ,  primary_conference FROM university ORDER BY founded LIMIT 1

question: What is the team name and acc regular season score of the school that was founded for the longest time?
original_query: SELECT t2.team_name ,  t2.ACC_Regular_Season FROM university AS t1 JOIN basketball_match AS t2 ON t1.school_id  =  t2.school_id ORDER BY t1.founded LIMIT 1

question: What is the total and minimum enrollment of all schools?
original_query: SELECT sum(enrollment) ,  min(enrollment) FROM university

question: Find the total student enrollment for different affiliation type schools.
original_query: SELECT sum(enrollment) ,  affiliation FROM university GROUP BY affiliation

question: What are the total enrollments of universities of each affiliation type?
original_query: SELECT sum(enrollment) ,  affiliation FROM university GROUP BY affiliation

question: What are the different affiliations, and what is the total enrollment of schools founded after 1850 for each enrollment type?
original_query: SELECT sum(Enrollment) ,  affiliation FROM university WHERE founded  >  1850 GROUP BY affiliation

question: Return the primary conference of the school with the lowest acc percentage score.
original_query: SELECT t1.Primary_conference FROM university AS t1 JOIN basketball_match AS t2 ON t1.school_id  =  t2.school_id ORDER BY t2.acc_percent LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of teams from universities that have a below average enrollment?
original_query: SELECT t2.team_name FROM university AS t1 JOIN basketball_match AS t2 ON t1.school_id  =  t2.school_id WHERE enrollment  <  (SELECT avg(enrollment) FROM university)

question: What are the public schools and what are their locations?
original_query: SELECT school ,  LOCATION FROM university WHERE affiliation  =  'Public'

question: What are the different schools and their nicknames, ordered by their founding years?
original_query: SELECT school ,  nickname FROM university ORDER BY founded

question: Count the number of different affiliation types.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT affiliation) FROM university

question: What are the all games score and location of the school called Clemson?
original_query: SELECT t2.All_Games ,  t1.location FROM university AS t1 JOIN basketball_match AS t2 ON t1.school_id  =  t2.school_id WHERE team_name  =  'Clemson'

question: Find the schools that were either founded after 1850 or public.
original_query: SELECT school FROM university WHERE founded  >  1850 OR affiliation  =  'Public'

question: What are the average enrollment size of the universities that are founded before 1850?
original_query: SELECT avg(enrollment) FROM university WHERE founded  <  1850

question: Show name, city, and state for all universities in  alphabetical order of university name.
original_query: SELECT university_name ,  city ,  state FROM University ORDER BY university_name

question: Show all majors and major ranks for the university with name Augustana College.
original_query: SELECT T1.rank ,  T3.major_name FROM Major_Ranking AS T1 JOIN University AS T2 JOIN Major AS T3 ON T1.university_id  =  T2.university_id AND T1.major_id  =  T3.major_id WHERE T2.university_name  =  'Augustana College'

question: How many universities are in Illinois or Ohio?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM University WHERE state  =  'Illinois' OR state  =  'Ohio'

question: What is the total enrollment of universities with a overall rank 5 or below?
original_query: SELECT sum(enrollment) FROM University AS T1 JOIN Overall_ranking AS T2 ON T1.university_id  =  T2.university_id WHERE T2.rank  >=  5

question: What is the name of the university with the most research points?
original_query: SELECT T1.university_name FROM University AS T1 JOIN Overall_ranking AS T2 ON T1.university_id  =  T2.university_id ORDER BY T2.research_point DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of all universities in ascending order of reputation points?
original_query: SELECT T1.university_name FROM University AS T1 JOIN Overall_ranking AS T2 ON T1.university_id  =  T2.university_id ORDER BY T2.reputation_point

question: which states do have more than two universities with enrollment smaller than 3000?
original_query: SELECT state FROM university WHERE enrollment  <  3000 GROUP BY state HAVING count(*)  >  2

question: What is the name of the university with the most majors ranked number 1?
original_query: SELECT T2.university_name FROM Major_Ranking AS T1 JOIN University AS T2 ON T1.university_id  =  T2.university_id WHERE T1.rank  =  1 GROUP BY T2.university_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all major name and major code in the order of their major code
original_query: SELECT major_name ,  major_code FROM Major ORDER BY major_code

question: For every home conference, how many universities attended that conference?
original_query: SELECT home_conference ,  count(*) FROM University GROUP BY home_conference

question: Show all university names without a major with rank 1?
original_query: SELECT university_name FROM University EXCEPT SELECT T2.university_name FROM Major_Ranking AS T1 JOIN University AS T2 ON T1.university_id  =  T2.university_id WHERE T1.rank  =  1

question: What are the names of all teams from universities that have more people enrolled than average ?
original_query: select team_name from university where enrollment  >  (select avg(enrollment) from university)

question: What is the name and overall ranking of universities in Wisconsin state?
original_query: SELECT T1.university_name ,  T2.rank FROM University AS T1 JOIN Overall_ranking AS T2 ON T1.university_id  =  T2.university_id WHERE T1.state  =  'Wisconsin'

question: Show all home conferences with average enrollment of universities above 2000.
original_query: SELECT home_conference FROM University GROUP BY home_conference HAVING avg(enrollment)  >  2000

question: What are the names of all universities without any majors ranked number 1?
original_query: SELECT university_name FROM University EXCEPT SELECT T2.university_name FROM Major_Ranking AS T1 JOIN University AS T2 ON T1.university_id  =  T2.university_id WHERE T1.rank  =  1

question: List team name for all universities with enrollments above the average.
original_query: SELECT team_name FROM University WHERE enrollment  >  (SELECT avg(enrollment) FROM University)

question: What is the university name with highest research point?
original_query: SELECT T1.university_name FROM University AS T1 JOIN Overall_ranking AS T2 ON T1.university_id  =  T2.university_id ORDER BY T2.research_point DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the home conferences with the fewest number of people enrolled?
original_query: SELECT home_conference FROM University GROUP BY home_conference ORDER BY sum(enrollment) LIMIT 1

question: What is the name and rank of every university in Wisconsin?
original_query: SELECT T1.university_name ,  T2.rank FROM University AS T1 JOIN Overall_ranking AS T2 ON T1.university_id  =  T2.university_id WHERE T1.state  =  'Wisconsin'

question: Show all home conferences and the number of universities in each conference.
original_query: SELECT home_conference ,  count(*) FROM University GROUP BY home_conference

question: What is the name and citation point of the unversities with the top 3 reputation points?
original_query: SELECT T1.University_Name ,  T2.Citation_point FROM University AS T1 JOIN Overall_ranking AS T2 ON T1.university_id  =  T2.university_id ORDER BY T2.Reputation_point DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the names, cities, and states of all universities in alphabetical order (by name of the university).
original_query: SELECT university_name ,  city ,  state FROM University ORDER BY university_name

question: Return the id of the vehicle that has been driven the fewest times.
original_query: SELECT vehicle_id FROM vehicle_driver GROUP BY vehicle_id ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many drivers have been racing in each racing series?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  racing_series FROM driver GROUP BY racing_series

question: Return the models of vehicles that have never been driven.
original_query: SELECT model FROM vehicle EXCEPT SELECT T1.model FROM vehicle AS T1 JOIN vehicle_driver AS T2 ON T1.vehicle_id  =  T2.vehicle_id

question: Return the ids and models of vehicles that have been driven by exactly two drivers or built by Ziyang.
original_query: SELECT T1.vehicle_id ,  T1.model FROM vehicle AS T1 JOIN vehicle_driver AS T2 ON T1.vehicle_id  =  T2.vehicle_id GROUP BY T2.vehicle_id HAVING count(*)  =  2 OR T1.builder  =  'Ziyang'

question: Count the number of different drivers who have driven vehicles built in 2012.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.driver_id) FROM vehicle_driver AS T1 JOIN vehicle AS T2 ON T1.vehicle_id  =  T2.vehicle_id WHERE T2.build_year  =  2012

question: Count the number of drivers who have not driven any vehicles.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM driver WHERE driver_id NOT IN ( SELECT driver_id FROM vehicle_driver )

question: Give the models of cars that have a total production of over 100 or a top speed over 150.
original_query: SELECT model FROM vehicle WHERE total_production  >  100 OR top_speed  >  150

question: How many drivers have not driven any cars?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM driver WHERE driver_id NOT IN ( SELECT driver_id FROM vehicle_driver )

question: Show all driver names in the alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT name FROM driver ORDER BY name

question: What are the build year, model name and builder of the vehicles?
original_query: SELECT build_year ,  model ,  builder FROM vehicle

question: Return the names and citizenships of drivers who have driven the vehicle with the model 'DJ1'.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.citizenship FROM driver AS T1 JOIN vehicle_driver AS T2 ON T1.driver_id  =  T2.driver_id JOIN vehicle AS T3 ON T2.vehicle_id  =  T3.vehicle_id WHERE T3.model  =  'DJ1'

question: Return the top speed and power of the vehicle that was built in the year 1996.
original_query: SELECT top_speed ,  power FROM vehicle WHERE build_year  =  1996

question: Give the build year, model, and builder of each vehicle.
original_query: SELECT build_year ,  model ,  builder FROM vehicle

question: How many vehicles have maximum top speed?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM vehicle WHERE top_speed  =  (SELECT max(top_speed) FROM vehicle)

question: What is the model of the vehicle with maximum top speed whose power is higher than 6000?
original_query: SELECT model FROM vehicle WHERE power  >  6000 ORDER BY top_speed DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the model and build year of cars that include "DJ" in their model names.
original_query: SELECT model ,  build_year FROM vehicle WHERE model LIKE '%DJ%'

question: Return the names of drivers with citizenship from the United States.
original_query: SELECT name FROM driver WHERE citizenship  =  'United States'

question: Of vehicles with power over 6000, return the model of the vehicle with the greatest top speed.
original_query: SELECT model FROM vehicle WHERE power  >  6000 ORDER BY top_speed DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many drivers have driven vehicles built in 2012?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.driver_id) FROM vehicle_driver AS T1 JOIN vehicle AS T2 ON T1.vehicle_id  =  T2.vehicle_id WHERE T2.build_year  =  2012

question: What are the distinct driver names who have driven vehicles with power more than 5000 ?
original_query: select distinct t1.name from driver as t1 join vehicle_driver as t2 on t1.driver_id  =  t2.driver_id join vehicle as t3 on t2.vehicle_id  =  t3.vehicle_id where t3.power  >  5000

question: What are the names of drivers, returned in alphbetical order?
original_query: SELECT name FROM driver ORDER BY name

question: Show the name and total hours of renting for each vehicle.
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  sum(T1.total_hours) FROM renting_history AS T1 JOIN vehicles AS T2 ON T1.vehicles_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T2.id

question: Show the type of powertrain with at least two vehicles, and the average annual fuel cost for vehicles in each such type.
original_query: SELECT type_of_powertrain ,  avg(annual_fuel_cost) FROM vehicles GROUP BY type_of_powertrain HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What are the names of vehicles, sorted descending by total hours of renting?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM renting_history AS T1 JOIN vehicles AS T2 ON T1.vehicles_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T2.id ORDER BY sum(T1.total_hours) DESC

question: Show types of powertrain with vehicles both from 2014 and 2013.
original_query: SELECT type_of_powertrain FROM vehicles WHERE model_year  =  2014 INTERSECT SELECT type_of_powertrain FROM vehicles WHERE model_year  =  2013

question: What are the names, ages, and membership credits for all customers?
original_query: SELECT name ,  age ,  membership_credit FROM customers

question: What are the names and total rental hours for each vehicle?
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  sum(T1.total_hours) FROM renting_history AS T1 JOIN vehicles AS T2 ON T1.vehicles_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T2.id

question: What are the different types of powertrains?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT type_of_powertrain FROM vehicles

question: What are the names, types of powertrains, and yearly fuel costs for vehicles with model years in either 2013 2014?
original_query: SELECT name ,  type_of_powertrain ,  annual_fuel_cost FROM vehicles WHERE model_year  =  2013 OR model_year  =  2014

question: What are the names and powertrain types of cars that have more than 30 total rental hours?
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T2.Type_of_powertrain FROM renting_history AS T1 JOIN vehicles AS T2 ON T1.vehicles_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T1.vehicles_id HAVING sum(T1.total_hours)  >  30

question: How many vehicles have each type of powertrain?
original_query: SELECT type_of_powertrain ,  count(*) FROM vehicles GROUP BY type_of_powertrain

question: What is the name and age of the customer with the most membership credit?
original_query: SELECT name ,  age FROM customers ORDER BY membership_credit DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show all types of powertrain and the number of vehicles in each type.
original_query: SELECT type_of_powertrain ,  count(*) FROM vehicles GROUP BY type_of_powertrain

question: What is the average age for customers with a membership credit above the average?
original_query: SELECT avg(age) FROM customers WHERE membership_credit  >  (SELECT avg(membership_credit) FROM customers)

question: Show the name of customer with at least two renting history records.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM renting_history AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T2.id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Show names for all vehicles in descending order of model year.
original_query: SELECT name FROM vehicles ORDER BY model_year DESC

question: Return the name of the discount that corresponds to the most rental history records.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM renting_history AS T1 JOIN discount AS T2 ON T1.discount_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T2.id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show all information for all discounts.
original_query: SELECT * FROM discount

question: Show name and model year for vehicles with city fuel economy rate less than or equal to highway fuel economy rate.
original_query: SELECT name ,  model_year FROM vehicles WHERE city_fuel_economy_rate  <=  highway_fuel_economy_rate

question: Show the name and model year of the vehicle with most number of renting history records.
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T2.model_year FROM renting_history AS T1 JOIN vehicles AS T2 ON T1.vehicles_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T2.id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the name and powertrain type of the cars that rented for more than 30 total hours.
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T2.Type_of_powertrain FROM renting_history AS T1 JOIN vehicles AS T2 ON T1.vehicles_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T1.vehicles_id HAVING sum(T1.total_hours)  >  30

question: Show the name of vehicles with no renting history.
original_query: SELECT name FROM vehicles WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT vehicles_id FROM renting_history)

question: Show minimum, maximum, and average annual fuel cost for all vehicles.
original_query: SELECT min(annual_fuel_cost) ,  max(annual_fuel_cost) ,  avg(annual_fuel_cost) FROM vehicles

question: Please list the title and platform name of games.
original_query: SELECT T1.Title ,  T2.Platform_name FROM game AS T1 JOIN platform AS T2 ON T1.Platform_ID  =  T2.Platform_ID

question: What are all the distinct franchises?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Franchise FROM game

question: What are the titles and developers of all games, sorted by units sold descending?
original_query: SELECT Title ,  Developers FROM game ORDER BY Units_sold_Millions DESC

question: Return the names and ids of all platforms with the download rank of 1.
original_query: SELECT Platform_name ,  Platform_ID FROM platform WHERE Download_rank  =  1

question: List the name of franchise that have the most number of games.
original_query: SELECT Franchise FROM game GROUP BY Franchise ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names and colleges of all players, ordered by rank of year descending?
original_query: SELECT Player_name ,  College FROM player ORDER BY Rank_of_the_year DESC

question: What are the titles and platform names of all games?
original_query: SELECT T1.Title ,  T2.Platform_name FROM game AS T1 JOIN platform AS T2 ON T1.Platform_ID  =  T2.Platform_ID

question: What is the average number of units sold in millions of games played by players with position "Guard"?
original_query: SELECT avg(Units_sold_Millions) FROM game AS T1 JOIN game_player AS T2 ON T1.Game_ID  =  T2.Game_ID JOIN player AS T3 ON T2.Player_ID  =  T3.Player_ID WHERE T3.Position  =  "Guard"

question: Show all distinct franchises of games.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Franchise FROM game

question: What are the titles of games that have platforms in the market districts of Asia or the USA?
original_query: SELECT T1.Title FROM game AS T1 JOIN platform AS T2 ON T1.Platform_ID  =  T2.Platform_ID WHERE T2.Market_district  =  "Asia" OR T2.Market_district  =  "USA"

question: List the names of franchises that have at least two games.
original_query: SELECT Franchise FROM game GROUP BY Franchise HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: What are the names and id of platforms whose download rank is 1?
original_query: SELECT Platform_name ,  Platform_ID FROM platform WHERE Download_rank  =  1

question: Show the title of games that are played by both players from college "Oklahoma" and players from college "Auburn".
original_query: SELECT T1.Title FROM game AS T1 JOIN game_player AS T2 ON T1.Game_ID  =  T2.Game_ID JOIN player AS T3 ON T2.Player_ID  =  T3.Player_ID WHERE T3.College  =  "Oklahoma" INTERSECT SELECT T1.Title FROM game AS T1 JOIN game_player AS T2 ON T1.Game_ID  =  T2.Game_ID JOIN player AS T3 ON T2.Player_ID  =  T3.Player_ID WHERE T3.College  =  "Auburn"

question: What are the maximum and minimum rank of the year of players.
original_query: SELECT max(Rank_of_the_year) ,  min(Rank_of_the_year) FROM player

question: Show the title of games that are not played by any player who is in the Guard position.
original_query: SELECT Title FROM game EXCEPT SELECT T1.Title FROM game AS T1 JOIN game_player AS T2 ON T1.Game_ID  =  T2.Game_ID JOIN player AS T3 ON T2.Player_ID  =  T3.Player_ID WHERE T3.Position  =  "Guard"

question: List all player names in ascending alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT Player_name FROM player ORDER BY Player_name ASC

question: Count the number of games.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM game

question: What are the names of players who do not play any games?
original_query: SELECT Player_name FROM player WHERE Player_ID NOT IN (SELECT Player_ID FROM game_player)

question: What are the names of all players in alphabetical order?
original_query: SELECT Player_name FROM player ORDER BY Player_name ASC

question: Count the number of players that have a rank of year of at most 3.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM player WHERE Rank_of_the_year  <=  3

question: Return the average number of units sold in millions for games not developed by Nintendo.
original_query: SELECT avg(Units_sold_Millions) FROM game WHERE developers != 'Nintendo'

question: What is last date created of votes from the state 'CA'?
original_query: SELECT max(created) FROM votes WHERE state  =  'CA'

question: What are the create dates, states, and phone numbers of the votes that were for the contestant named 'Tabatha Gehling'?
original_query: SELECT T2.created ,  T2.state ,  T2.phone_number FROM contestants AS T1 JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.contestant_number  =  T2.contestant_number WHERE T1.contestant_name  =  'Tabatha Gehling'

question: Return the names of the contestants whose names contain the substring 'Al' .
original_query: select contestant_name from contestants where contestant_name like "%al%"

question: What are the distinct states and create time of all votes?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT state ,  created FROM votes

question: What are the number of votes from state 'NY' or 'CA'?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM votes WHERE state  =  'NY' OR state  =  'CA'

question: What are the names of the contestants whose names are not 'Jessie Alloway'
original_query: SELECT contestant_name FROM contestants WHERE contestant_name != 'Jessie Alloway'

question: Of all the contestants who got voted, what is the contestant number and name of the contestant who got least votes?
original_query: SELECT T1.contestant_number , T1.contestant_name FROM contestants AS T1 JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.contestant_number  =  T2.contestant_number GROUP BY T1.contestant_number ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Find the first and last name of all the students of age 18 who have vice president votes.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Fname ,  T1.LName FROM STUDENT AS T1 JOIN VOTING_RECORD AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.VICE_President_VOTE WHERE T1.age  =  18

question: What are the distinct last names of the students who have class president votes?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.LName FROM STUDENT AS T1 JOIN VOTING_RECORD AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.CLASS_President_VOTE

question: Find the major that is studied by the largest number of students.
original_query: SELECT Major FROM STUDENT GROUP BY major ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the oldest age among the students?
original_query: SELECT max(Age) FROM STUDENT

question: For each advisor, report the total number of students advised by him or her.
original_query: SELECT Advisor ,  count(*) FROM STUDENT GROUP BY Advisor

question: What is the average age of the female students with secretary votes in the spring election cycle?

question: How many male (sex is M) students have class senator votes in the fall election cycle?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM STUDENT AS T1 JOIN VOTING_RECORD AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  Class_Senator_Vote WHERE T1.Sex  =  "M" AND T2.Election_Cycle  =  "Fall"

question: Which students live in the city with code "NYC" and have class senator votes in the spring election cycle? Count the numbers.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM STUDENT AS T1 JOIN VOTING_RECORD AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  Class_Senator_Vote WHERE T1.city_code  =  "NYC" AND T2.Election_Cycle  =  "Spring"

question: How many students are there in total?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM STUDENT

question: Tell me the ages of the oldest and youngest students studying major 600.

question: Count the number of voting records for each election cycle.
original_query: SELECT Election_Cycle ,  count(*) FROM VOTING_RECORD GROUP BY Election_Cycle

question: List all the distinct president votes and the vice president votes.

question: Find the distinct first names of the students who have class senator votes.

question: What are the first names of all the students aged above 22?

question: Who are the advisors for students that live in a city with city code "BAL"?
original_query: SELECT Advisor FROM STUDENT WHERE city_code  =  "BAL"

question: What are the first and last names of all the female students who have president votes?

question: How many voting records do we have?

question: What are the distinct first names of the students who have class president votes?

original_query: SELECT Advisor FROM STUDENT WHERE city_code  =  "BAL"

original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Registration_Date ,  Election_Cycle FROM VOTING_RECORD

original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Fname FROM STUDENT AS T1 JOIN VOTING_RECORD AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.VICE_PRESIDENT_Vote EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT Fname FROM STUDENT WHERE city_code  =  "PIT"

question: What is the average age of students who have city code "NYC" and have secretary votes for the spring election cycle?
